name: Fabi.ai
one_liner: Conversational AI engine that frees data teams from writing SQL for ad hoc requests
description: Business intelligence and data analysis platform that combines SQL, Python, and an integrated AI assistant in one collaborative environment to help lean teams explore data, build dashboards, and automate workflows significantly faster. The product centers on AI-powered notebooks and “Smartbooks” that let analysts query warehouses and spreadsheets, generate and debug code, and publish interactive, shareable reports without switching tools. It supports analytics as code with a fully Python-backed execution model, enabling portable, reproducible, and version-controlled analyses. The platform includes an AI Analyst Agent for self-service analytics, natural language querying, and assisted exploration, plus reactive cells and scheduled publishing for automated, always-fresh reporting delivered to Slack and email. Fabi.ai connects to warehouses like Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, and Databricks, as well as Google Sheets, Airtable, and file uploads (CSV, Excel, Parquet, JSON), unifying ad hoc analysis and production reporting workflows.

name: SocialCrowd
one_liner: Automates employee incentives by tracking goals and rewarding achievements to boost workplace productivity
description:
SocialCrowd is a platform designed to enhance employee performance through automated incentives. It functions by tracking employee progress towards set goals, providing reminders about their tasks, and rewarding them instantly upon achieving these goals. The service is likened to a 'Fitbit for work,' emphasizing its role in keeping employees on track and motivated.

Key features of SocialCrowd include:
- Goal Setting: Allows managers to set team goals and assign point values for achieving these goals.
- App Integration: Connects with existing work applications such as PoS systems, HubSpot, Monday.com and others to track employee progress.
- Automated Reminders: Sends periodic reminders via text, email, and push notifications to keep employees focused on their tasks.
- Instant Rewards: Awards points to employees upon goal completion, which can be redeemed for various rewards, including gift cards and custom incentives.
- Performance Tracking: Provides real-time tracking of employee performance, along with a progress view and leaderboard.
investors: Bread and Butter Ventures (fka The Syndicate Fund)

name: adversarialcompany
one_liner: Develops adversarial AI countermeasures to neutralize computer vision surveillance and targeting systems
description: Adversarial AI is a technology company dedicated to creating solutions that counteract AI-driven surveillance and targeting systems. Its flagship product, Wraith, generates patterns specifically designed to neutralize computer vision and AI targeting models, thereby enhancing operational security for users. This solution addresses the increasing concerns surrounding AI surveillance across various sectors, particularly in defense and security. Additionally, the company offers Decoy, which creates false targets to mislead adversaries, providing tactical advantages. Adversarial AI's platform is engineered for seamless integration into existing manufacturing processes, ensuring adaptability across diverse applications. By delivering these capabilities, the company supports users in maintaining operational dominance in complex environments, safeguarding their activities from AI detection and targeting.

name: Apptronik
one_liner: Apptronik designs and manufacturers humanoid robots initially focused on logistics and manufacturing.
description:
Apptronik is a spinout from the Human Centered Robotics Lab at the University of Texas at Austin. They were founded in early 2016 with the goal of bringing forth the next generation of robots that will change the way we live and work. They have built some of the most diverse robots, spanning from exoskeletons to humanoid torsos, biped mobility platforms, and unique robotic arms that lift more than they weigh. 

Apptronix unveiled their latest humanoid robot, Apollo, standing at 5 feet 8 inches and weighing 160 pounds, designed for mass-production and safe collaboration with humans. With electric power and a four-hour battery life, Apollo aims to address labor shortages in logistics, marking its initial deployment in warehouses. The company envisions Apollo's versatility extending from logistics to exploration, aiming to make it the 'iPhone of robots' capable of various tasks through software updates. With ongoing improvements and affordability, Apptronix plans for full commercial production by 2024, starting with factory tasks and expanding into diverse fields like construction and elder care.

name: HypergameAI
one_liner: HypergameAI builds AI-driven, adaptive decisions that detect, learn, adapt, and control high-end cyber adversaries.
description:
Our A-TIER™ platform autonomously deploys and manages sophisticated decoys that replicate your actual environment, from network infrastructure to application interfaces. Advanced machine learning algorithms ensure decoys remain believable and engaging, while our automation reduces operational overhead for your security team.​

By engaging threats in a controlled deception environment, you gain precious time to respond while keeping critical assets protected. name: Altaport
one_liner: Software platform for automating heliport and vertiport operations to support helicopter and eVTOL traffic.
description:
Altaport develops software and operational infrastructure for heliports and vertiports, enabling safer and more efficient management of rotorcraft operations. The company addresses a current gap in aviation ground operations where most heliports rely on manual processes, fragmented communication, and limited automation. By providing a digital operations layer, Altaport supports existing helicopter traffic while preparing these sites for the higher-volume workflows required by advanced air mobility.

The platform integrates scheduling, resource allocation, traffic coordination, and ground services management into a unified software environment. Automated workflows manage rotorcraft arrivals and departures, maintain situational awareness, and streamline communication between pilots, ground crews, and facility operators. The system is engineered to meet the operational demands of electric and autonomous air vehicles, incorporating modules for turnaround optimization, safety monitoring, and scalable traffic handling.

Altaport enables operators to improve throughput, standardize procedures, and reduce the labor and communication overhead associated with traditional heliport management. Facilities gain more predictable operations, improved slot utilization, and reduced delays for both commercial helicopter services and future eVTOL fleets. Airport authorities, private vertiport operators, offshore platforms, and emergency response hubs can use the platform to modernize workflows and enhance operational reliability.

By building a digital backbone for low-altitude aviation infrastructure, Altaport positions itself as a core enabler of advanced air mobility. Its system supports current helicopter operations while offering a scalable path to manage significantly higher aircraft volumes as electric and autonomous vehicles enter service. This dual relevance provides immediate operational value and strategic positioning ahead of next-generation aviation demand.
tags: Air / Aircraft / Aircraft Technology / Airports / Airport Security / Flying Cars / Mobility

name: Safe Air Mobility
one_liner: Safe Air Mobility (SAM) provides tailored insurance and safety solutions for drones & eVTOLs.
description:
Safe Air Mobility (SAM) provides tailored insurance and safety solutions for drones & eVTOLs. SAM offers safety assessment for drone & eVTOL operations and evaluates risks of drone & eVTOL flights in any environment.

The App provides a digital solution to aerial safety challenges and enables the operators to understand their flight safety concerns in just a few clicks. 

eVTOLs will occupy our urban spaces starting in 2024/2025. But our urban environments, insurance providers, city planners & citizens are not ready yet! SAM is the first app that provides eVTOL flight risk evaluation.

SAM provides drone package delivery companies with the ability to optimize drone flight routes in urban environments, enhance drone battery efficiency, avoid unsafe flights, & minimize drone noise complaints.

Safety of drones & eVTOLs, noise disturbance & compromised privacy seem to be the most common homeowners' concerns. SAM is the first step in addressing all these. This feature will be available in Q2 2023.

SAM is designed by a team of experts with deep knowledge of the real estate market & is going to address these issues soon! The current version of SAM addresses the flight safety challenges, but Version 2 will address airspace design challenges brought by drones and eVTOLs.

name: GenLogs
one_liner: Freight Intelligence on every carrier, shipper, and asset via a nationwide sensor network
description: GenLogs operates a proprietary network of roadside sensors and commercial/open-source data collated to track and analyze commercial truck activity. Their platform ingests >50k truck images every five minutes, linking license plates, VINs, USDOT and MC numbers to build live visibility on equipment movement and freight lanes. Core offerings include carrier capacity sourcing, asset traceability (stolen/misplaced truck/trailer recovery), motor carrier insurance underwriting, compliance monitoring (BASIC/CSA data), fraud and double‑broker detection, and law‑enforcement asset investigations. Founded in 2023 by ex‑US intelligence professionals, GenLogs aims to unlock latent freight capacity while mitigating inefficiencies and criminal activity across supply chains.

name: memQ

Their technology uses rare earth atoms as qubits.

name: Supplyhub AI
one_liner: Easy to use, AI driven software solution for strategic sourcing.
description:
Addressing Key Sourcing Challenges to Drive Superior Results

Spend Visibility
Effortlessly merge business spend data from multiple sources, including ERP systems, transforming unstructured cost data into strategic categories for sourcing and savings, achieving results over 100 times faster than traditional methods!

Savings Identification
Quickly analyze your company’s costs and supply market trends to uncover savings at the category level. Seamlessly craft a sourcing strategy that optimizes the balance between size cost reduction and ease of implementation, significantly enhancing value creation!

Supplier Discovery
Identify suppliers across industries and target regions worldwide, focusing on specific categories. Create a curated list of suppliers that are well matched to provide necessary parts or services, ensuring precision and speed in your sourcing efforts!

Sourcing Co-Pilot
Transform your sourcing with an automated system that speeds up and simplifies the request for quotation (RFQ) process, analyzes bids, and develops award scenarios. Tailor sourcing recommendations to meet both your short-term targets and long-term business strategies.

name: DeepAgro
one_liner: AI-powered computer vision platform for automated weed detection and precision herbicide application
description:
In Deep Agro we do weed recognition in video for herbicide application in an intelligent way. We have developed recognition software that uses Artificial Intelligence techniques (Deep Learning) and we commercialize the license to use this software.

This allows the industry to empower simplifying the difficult task of detecting and identifying weeds in order to generate solutions to the existing problem, reducing costs and chemical product, and caring for the environment.

The Goal?
The use of herbicides is under intense debate as it has been shown to cause irreversible damage to health and the environment. This solution drastically reduces the volumes of agrochemicals used, achieving a perfect balance between economic benefit for the producer and reduction of the impact on health and the environment.

name: VelocitiPM
one_liner: AI powered, end-to-end product management platform for software companies to manage the entire product development lifecycle from idea, through build, launch, and scale.
description:
Most startups and new product launches fail. The main reason is failure to reach product-market fit, or running out of money before pivoting to a new idea. There are no complete Product Management software tools or platforms in the industry today to address this problem. The existing solutions only focus on part of the entire PDLC, and don't have a methodology embedded in the solution. 

VelocitiPM is a Product Management platform for software companies. Using AI, we help founders, product teams, and other product development roles create a strategy, then execute and manage the PDLC on our platform. We address the entire PDLC, and we include our methodology in every step of the process. 

The Product Management Software category is currently at $8B+ and expected to grow to $14B by 2025. We're launching our MVP in May 2023, and are projecting $100M in ARR by EOY 2026.

description: Sensix provides crop performance analysis using data on the history and condition of the crop. By correlating data from drones, satellites, soil samples, rain, productivity and machinery, we consolidate the information in a standardized manner and directly influence the profitability of the crops, providing savings in inputs, greater yields and operational efficiency. Through advanced machine learning and data mining techniques, the platform is able to deliver weed location maps, quantify planting gaps, identify vigor/biomass variability and soil fertility for application at variable rates of fertilizers, correctives, nematicides , growth regulators (cotton), resistance inducers and herbicides, communicating directly with the application machinery.

name: Auxilium Technology Group
one_liner: Auxilium Technology Group focuses on tailings valorization using sustainable solutions to aid mining companies achieve net-zero.
description:
Auxilium is a technology company focused on developing innovative modular solutions for the processing of tailings. We valorize waste streams producing high value added products while using tailings to achieve net-zero. Our approach centers on our innovative new generation tailings based eco-construction material - “Geofoam”. Byproducts we produce from tailings include bio-gas, green hydrogen, metal concentrate including critical materials and rare earths, reagents for mineral processing, direct reduced iron, potable water, additives for the cement industry and an ultra-pure silica precursor for the semi-conductor industry. 

Auxilium is constantly working with new technology providers and licensing technology to foresee the next game-changers for mineral processing. Our solutions are environmentally friendly focused on tailings valorization through efficient metal recovery, energy generation, water treatment and building materials. Based in Tucson, Arizona, our team of scientists, engineers and business professionals are working to create further value in the mining industry using a game changing sustainable model.

name: CaPow
one_liner: Provides wireless in-motion charging technology for warehouse robotic fleets enabling 24/7 operations
description: Capow Energy’s Genesis platform, an “in-motion” energy transfer solution, provides robotic fleets with continuous power flow during operation, enabling 24/7 functionality. This innovative technology optimizes manufacturing, logistics, and commerce by ensuring 100% uptime for AGVs and AMRs, without the need for fleet expansion or charging stations. Unlike traditional battery-dependent systems, which require frequent recharging, replacing, and recycling, leading to reduced throughput and safety concerns, Capow’s Power-In-Motion platform eliminates these challenges. It offers a next-generation power delivery solution that significantly enhances operational efficiency and sustainability while reducing overall operational expenses.

name: BLACKLEAF
one_liner: Blackleaf produces low cost, green graphene to be used in coatings in many different industries.
description:
BLACKLEAF (BL) has developed a new method to produce Few Layer Graphene (FLG) that meets customer requirements in terms of cost and available quantities. In parallel to the production process, BL also holds patents allowing to realize graphene-based coatings on all materials and geometries for various applications, including electrical conduction on polymers, surface heating or anti-corrosion. Late 2019, BLACKLEAF has initiated a preliminary scale-up of its production capacities and is now capable to daily produce up to 80kg of graphene – with one single production unit.
Existing solutions for remedying corrosion are suffering from a wide range of issues: 
- Chromium-based paints (mainly chromium VI) was banned in septembre 2017 under Europres, REACH regulations, as they are responsible for 300 deaths per year from lung cancer 
- Zinc based coating ( Zinc oxide nanoparticles) was classified as 'extremely toxic' (50% lethal concentration [LC50] < 0.1 mg/L) to aquatic organisms. 
- Polymers based coatings suffers from weak mechanical properties (abrasion resistance and decomposition) which can lead to the proliferation of micro- and nano-particles of polymer.
tags: Advanced Materials / Aircraft Technology / Hydrophobic Coating / Material Processing / Nano Coating

name: Lavoisier Composites
one_liner: Develops Carbonium®, a sustainable high-performance composite material upcycled from aerospace manufacturing waste
description:
Production hazards lead to the removal of materials or parts because they go beyond the limits of an established specification or an expected period of use.
This process is at the origin of a major wastage. While their residual properties would be considered of very good level for a number of applications, these materials excluded from the aeronautical processing industry unfortunately end up in an incinerator or landfilled.
The famous 18th century chemist Antoine LAVOISIER‘s law 'Nothing is lost, nothing is created, everything is transformed' is at the foundation of Lavoisier Composites and Carbonium®.
Implemented following a process that has been the subject of 3 patents, Carbonium® brings its aerospace grade structural properties and a totally unique aesthetic to the parts obtained.

name: Sprayer Mods LLC
one_liner: Sprayer Mods allows farmers to reduce their herbicide costs 80% by applying herbicide only to weeds.
description:
Sprayer Mods allows farmers to reduce their herbicide costs 80% by applying herbicide only to weeds. Our retrofit kit for your existing agricultural sprayer detects weeds in crop fields and fallow land, then applies herbicide only when the weed passes underneath the sprayer.

Using our system allows farmers to reduce their chemical costs, use chemical mixes to control resistance, and save time refilling their tank. Additionally, using less herbicide means that less chemicals are needed, lessening your environmental impact.

name: Arkestro
one_liner: The only predictive procurement software that helps your team continuously exceed targets.
description:
Arkestro is a cutting-edge predictive procurement software designed to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of procurement activities through advanced forecasting and real-time collaboration. By leveraging its predictive capabilities, Arkestro allows organizations to orchestrate their procurement processes seamlessly across various systems. The platform is particularly noted for delivering a significant improvement in KPI reporting, with claims of achieving savings that are 2-5 times faster compared to traditional methods.

Arkestro’s suite of services includes:

Predictive Sourcing: This feature uses predictive analytics to forecast supplier performance and market conditions, helping organizations make more informed sourcing decisions and optimize their supplier selection process.

Predictive Purchasing: By analyzing historical data and market trends, Arkestro provides insights that help organizations predict future purchasing needs and trends, enabling proactive management of procurement strategies and inventory levels.

Predictive Monitoring: This service continuously monitors procurement activities and supplier performance, using predictive models to identify potential issues before they arise. This proactive approach helps mitigate risks and ensures smoother procurement operations.

Procurement: Arkestro supports end-to-end procurement processes, streamlining activities from requisition through to order fulfillment. The software integrates with existing systems to ensure a cohesive and efficient procurement workflow.

Data Cleansing Services: Arkestro offers data cleansing solutions to improve the quality and accuracy of procurement data. By eliminating errors and inconsistencies, the service ensures that organizations have reliable and up-to-date information for making critical procurement decisions.

Overall, Arkestro’s advanced predictive capabilities and comprehensive service offerings position it as a powerful tool for modernizing procurement processes and driving operational efficiency.

name: Treetoscope
one_liner: Develops plant-based sensors that directly measure internal water flow to optimize precision irrigation and crop health.
description:
Our technology is the first and only commercial device that senses the internal water flow of a plant and directly measures its water consumption and real-time irrigation needs without extrapolations based on indirect sensing technologies.

Plant-based sensors provide farmers with an opportunity to monitor the water status of their crops and make decisions about irrigation and pest/disease management.These sensors use plants as 'biosensors' to measure the interplay between soil moisture, atmospheric conditions, and plant response. By continuously monitoring these factors, plant-based sensors can provide valuable data for optimizing crop health and productivity.

Sap flow sensors have been largely abandoned because of technical challenges and the availability of simpler indirect measures for measuring a crop's water status. These indirect measures are easier to use, but they do not provide a direct measure of a crop's water use. We have developed a novel sensor technology that is a game-changer in the precision irrigation market, offering unparalleled accuracy, simplicity, and reliability in measuring actual crop water consumption.

name: Soil Steam
one_liner: Soil Steam develops technology and equipment for chemical-free treatment of soil.
description:
Soil Steam, founded by 3 farmers in the 1990-ies (Finn Limseth, Hans Kristian Westrum and Arvid Laksesvela) and led by CEO Oddbjørn Bergem, developed a technology that uses vacuum to force steam into the ground. The purpose is to make the crops bigger and to prevent vegetables from rotting without the use of harmful pesticides. The technology is patented for use in mobile machines, and Soil Steam claims to be the only company in the world that does this.

SoilSaver is a world-leading technology that ensures that the soil is free of weeds and harmful organisms. It is both profitable and sustainable. SoilSaver is a machine with high capacity (5-40 tons per hour), which is easy to install, easy to operate and easy to move.

one_liner: Develops directed energy technologies for chemical-free weed control in agriculture
description:
Global Neighbor develops a solution in controlling weeds using clean, environmentally friendly, Directed Energy technologies. 

They seek to accelerate the adoption of sustainable AG practices and maximize farm profits through non-chemical, directed energy (DE) solutions. 

Global Neighbor currently has consumers that use DE weed control products selling online and in big-box retailers. 

Their next product, the WDSD, addresses the challenge of herbicide-resistant weeds in grain crops. The WDSD quickly attaches to combine harvesters and applies DE to weed seeds making them nonviable without chemicals.

name: Mearas
one_liner: Develops rugged electric all-terrain vehicles for defense and civilian applications
description: Mearas is a technology company developing rugged electric all-terrain vehicles for civilian and defense applications. The company’s first product, ATHENA, is an ultra-lightweight, 4×4 electric vehicle platform designed for operation in harsh terrain with up to a 150-mile range, modular payload capability, external generator-compatible charging, remote operation via mobile app, and an open architecture control stack that can integrate a range of autonomy and mission systems. ATHENA is intended to support diverse missions where traditional combustion vehicles struggle, including remote logistics, disaster response, defense deployments, and off-road mobility challenges. Mearas is focused on practical powertrain innovation, scalable engineering execution, and early field validation with planned operational test units in 2025.

name: AMOS Power
one_liner: Builds autonomous electric tractors for precision farming
description:
AMOS Power, is an American-made autonomous electric tractor manufacturer based in Cedar Falls, Iowa. The AgTech industry is experiencing an exciting time for innovation because of AMOS – a configurable farming solution designed to meet the needs of almost any grower. When it comes to nurturing high value crops like fruits, grains, and vegetables, AMOS brings the most configurable tractor for precision farming to the table. 

AMOS currently comes in two models A3 and A4; A3 offering a 37-inch track spacing (center track to center track) and A4 a 60-inch track spacing (center track to center track), and a third tractor is in development with 80” track spacing. Both tractors feature a tri-motor design creating 85 hp with a 40 hp PTO, tracks allowing growers to operate in almost any terrain, and a CAT II hitch so growers can utilize implements they already own. Each tractor has 8-hours of runtime followed by 8-hours of charging.

Their approach to autonomy adds value to all grower’s operations. By integrating advanced technologies and intelligent systems, their tractors are more efficient, durable, and intuitive than tractors of the past. With AMOS Power, the future of farming is being redefined, one tractor at a time.

description:
SoilReader is a patented new technology that uses a coulter to bring a spectrometer to the soil, instead of the soil to the spectrometer. SoilReader provides real-time, multi-constituent, variable-depth, on-the-go analysis for 9 soil constituents.

SoilReader Technology Corp. is a Canadian based company that has developed from the ground up patented, real time, on-the-go variable depth soil sensing technology. The system is farm rugged and relatively compact and can be used as stand alone- example crop consultants or integrated in existing and new farm tillage, seeding, planters etc.

Our technology allows for thousands of data points per acre to be collected at low cost. This sets our technology apart from all methods/technologies currently used or planned for soil organic carbon documentation .

name: Socitty
one_liner: AI-powered predictive maintenance platform for residential buildings to optimize performance and achieve net zero emissions
description:
The vision for SoCitty is to become the global leader in maintenance practices and monitoring the overall performance and sustainability of medium and high-density residential buildings to achieve net zero. The vision encompasses the following key elements:
Comprehensive Adoption: SoCitty's technology becomes the standard solution adopted by a vast network of medium and high-density residential buildings worldwide. The platform is embraced by building owners, managers, residents, and stakeholders, leading to widespread implementation and transformation of maintenance practices on a global scale.
Resilient Built Environment: The vision is for SoCitty's technology to drive the creation of a resilient built environment that thrives amidst the challenges posed by climate change and extreme weather events. By harnessing predictive, prescriptive maintenance, and pinpointing decision points for investments and retrofits, buildings become better prepared to withstand disruptions and minimize risks, ensuring the safety and well-being of occupants.
Efficiency and Sustainability: The ideal future for SoCitty is one where predictive and prescriptive maintenance practices lead to optimized resource utilization and increased energy efficiency. Maintenance actions are carried out with precision and purpose, maximizing the lifespan of components and systems, reducing waste, and contributing to a greener, more sustainable world.
Proactive and Data-Driven Decisions: SoCitty's technology empowers stakeholders with proactive and data-driven decision-making capabilities. Building managers and residents can rely on real-time insights and recommendations from the digital twin to make informed choices that enhance building performance, increase operational efficiency, and streamline maintenance activities.
Optimized Cost Management: The long-term vision sees SoCitty's platform as a driving force behind cost optimization for building maintenance. By adopting prescriptive maintenance strategies, operational costs are minimized, and financial resources are allocated efficiently to ensure the longevity and reliability of critical systems.
Continuous Innovation: SoCitty remains at the forefront of technological innovation, continuously advancing its machine learning algorithms, data analytics capabilities, and digital twin technologies. The platform evolves with the ever-changing landscape of smart buildings and IoT technologies, staying adaptable

name: BEAM
one_liner: Develops solar-powered EV charging infrastructure and sustainable energy solutions for clean transportation and disaster resilience
description:
Our mission is to lead the world to clean mobility. We believe that every person deserves access to clean sustainable transportation. That every community is safer with a resilient microgrid. That every state can build energized roads rapidly and cost-effectively. That every nation can provide an abundance of free energy to mobilize its goods, services and citizens.

Beam Global is a clean technology company at the nexus of renewable energy and transportation that produces sustainable charging infrastructure for electric vehicles, outdoor media, energy resiliency, and disaster preparedness. Beam solutions eliminate the construction, disruption, risks, carbon footprint, and costs of grid-tied solutions. We are leading the world to clean mobility. The company develops, patents, designs, engineers and manufactures unique, advanced renewably energized products that save customers time and money, protect the environment, empower communities and keep people and goods moving. Based in San Diego, Beam products are proudly Made in America. Beam Global is listed on Nasdaq under the symbols BEEM and BEEMW.

name: Omnix IA Corp
one_liner: OMNIX is a B2B SaaS platform designed for process automation and the improvement of operational fluidity across various industries. The solution focuses on three fundamental pillars: the ability to work with inaccurate data, anomaly detection, and the recovery of operational fluidity.
description:
Clear Description of OMNIX
OMNIX is a SaaS (Software as a Service) platform that uses artificial intelligence (AI) and neural networks to automate and optimize the operational and logistical processes of businesses. This tool helps improve efficiency, detect and solve problems, and maintain smooth business operations. OMNIX is adaptable to various industries, including retail, telecommunications, pharmaceuticals, and mining, among others.

Key Differentiators
Ability to work with inaccurate data: OMNIX can operate efficiently even with imperfect data.
Anomaly detection: Identifies problems in processes and suggests quick solutions.
Operational fluency: Keeps business operations running smoothly without interruptions.
Multi-industry adaptability: Works across various industries, demonstrating its versatility.
Real-time automation: Quickly makes decisions and automates tasks to resolve issues.
Agile integration: Easily connects with existing systems in the company.
Practical Example
Imagine you work for a distribution company. OMNIX can ensure that products arrive on time and in the correct quantity to each store, automatically managing inventory and adjusting processes to minimize any delays or errors.

Market Size
OMNIX operates in eight countries, including Chile, Peru, Colombia, Mexico, Brazil, and the United States, and is designed for medium and large enterprises. It processes millions of transactions daily, ensuring business operations are efficient and smooth.

This allows companies to reduce negotiation cycles, improve supplier relationships, and increase profitability by automating what used to be a time-intensive manual process.

The platform is designed for large enterprises with complex supplier networks, enabling scalable and efficient contract management. Its clients have seen significant cost savings and operational improvements, making it a powerful tool for organizations aiming to streamline procurement while maintaining strong supplier engagement.

Leading organizations in government, telecommunications, energy, utilities, and higher education use HEAVY.AI to support high-impact decision-making in previously unimaginable timelines by harnessing the massive parallelism of modern GPU and CPU hardware. This analytics capability unifies today’s exploding data volumes from multiple sources for a better immersive and real-time, interactive visual experience. It can be deployed in the cloud and on-premise. HEAVY.AI originated from research at Harvard and MIT Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory (CSAIL). HEAVY.AI is funded by GV, In-Q-Tel, New Enterprise Associates (NEA), NVIDIA, Tiger Global Management, Vanedge Capital and Verizon Ventures. The company is headquartered in San Francisco. name: Vidium Animal Health
one_liner: Provides genomic and molecular diagnostic testing for pet cancer to enable precision veterinary medicine
description:
The way we diagnose and treat cancer in pets is evolving, thanks in large part to genomics and precision medicine. And Vidium stands ready to help veterinary teams move into the world of personalized, precision medicine. We combine genomic and molecular diagnostic testing with pathology, providing you with one trusted source for advanced diagnostics.

Our diagnostics leverage the latest science available to provide more information about your patient’s cancer. A better understanding of your patient’s cancer can guide your diagnosis and treatment planning, helping to advance the care of pets with cancer.

By informing veterinarians and pet parents about which mutations are causing their pet’s cancer to grow and spread, we intend to open up the use of precision medicine to combat canine cancer in new and more effective ways.

Vidium is dedicated to unravelling the genetic components of common and complex diseases, including cancer. As a result, the practice of medicine targeting these conditions can be more rational, more precise and more personal. Our focus is on shifting paradigms in cancer treatment to enable cures for cancer and other serious diseases in pets through programs at the intersection of personalized medicine and comparative genomics.

description: AtoMe (pronounced Atom-E) is a startup company seeking to leverage the exciting capabilities of 3D printing to design enhanced materials for high-need sectors such as energy, transportation, and aviation/aerospace. By developing unique nanoparticle-reinforced powders and adopting a machine learning high-throughput approach to optimization, we can improve the properties of today's best-in-class metals faster than ever before and in a way that is highly customizable to the specific needs of the end-user. Born out of research conducted for nuclear fusion reactors by its founders at MIT, AtoMe's materials achieve higher strength, better temperature resistance, and improved radiation survivability, while also decreasing the cracking and pore formation traditionally found in 3D printed metals.

name: Carbon Rivers
one_liner: Develops sustainable glass fiber recycling technology and advanced graphene materials for industrial applications.
description:
Carbon Rivers is a Certified Small Business founded by engineers and scientists, headquartered in Knoxville, TN. We maintain and cherish thei deep relationship with East Tennessee staples especially University of Tennessee and Oak Ridge National Laboratory to provide innovative products, ideas, and solutions for automotive, energy, safety and security industries in both the public and private sector.

Carbon Rivers is dedicated to sustainable, green circular economies. Instead of incineration, landfill, or aggregate in other materials, Carbon Rivers reclaims glass fiber from a variety of production and end of life waste streams in order to provide clean, high-quality glass fiber. The recovered glass fiber is then either provided to glass manufacturers to be competitive in price and quality to vi

Wind turbine blades are made from non-recyclable polymers strengthened by glass fibers. As a result, these structures are unfortunately relegated to landfills following retirement. This presents a major obstacle for wind energy to be truly sustainable. The technology offers an attractive, facile method for responsibly re-using these materials at what normally would be their end of life. Glass to Glass can give these materials a chance to be reborn into sustainable, recyclable composites.

Carbon Rivers社は、自動車、複合材料、石油・ガス、防衛、再生可能エネルギー、送電網、航空宇宙、海洋、インフラストラクチャーを含むがこれらに限定されない様々な産業向けに、エンジニアリング・ソリューションを提供しています。その商業的用途は、ガラス繊維と樹脂油の循環経済から、使用済み製品や製造時のスクラップ複合材、次世代サイクルポリマー、持続可能なコーティングや電力網の強化まで多岐にわたります。例えば、風力タービンブレード（およびその他の使用済み熱硬化性樹脂や熱可塑性樹脂）を、次世代製造のためにガラス繊維と樹脂油を回収することで完全にリサイクルします。この技術はカーボン・マイナスであり、本物の複合材と樹脂の循環経済を提供します。
同社には化学、電気、機械、原子力、材料、その他の分野のエンジニアがいるため、同社は様々な分野で能力と専門知識を有しています。加えて、CRは原始的なグラフェン・ナノフレークの最大手メーカーです。1～3層の不活性炭素は、潤滑剤、建築材料、ポリマー複合材料、繊維、コーティング、金属合金、エラストマー、その他さまざまな材料に対して、驚異的な機械的・性能的能力を発揮する。同社は、原始的なグラフェン溶液を用いて様々な材料応用を商業化してきました。

Swiftly works with over 95 city transit networks around the world, including MBTA in Boston, Capital Metro in Austin, VIA in San Antonio, VTA in San Jose, and MDOT MTA in Baltimore, supporting over 5,500 transit agency professionals and impacting over 1.5 billion passengers per year. Swiftly has helped customers improve arrival predictions by up to 30% and complete planning projects up to 90% faster, resulting in increased ridership, fewer passenger complaints, and more efficient transit operations.

Swiftly is funded by JMI Equity, Renewal Funds, SHAKTI, Via ID, Aster Capital, and many others who share our mission to make cities move more efficiently.

name: Aniah
one_liner: Provides IC verification tools for detecting and correcting electrical errors in chip designs at the transistor level.
description: Aniah provides an IC verification tool for easily cleaning up all electrical errors in chip designs. Aniah detects all errors on the full IC using an electrically accurate analysis at the transistor level, covers all possible power states in a single run, and allows users to focus on correcting real errors rather than filtering out false errors. Aniah delivers relevant results in seconds, allowing users to continuously improve their designs and shorten the time it takes to sign off.

name: HyperSentience
one_liner: Flexible AI to transform passive sensors to intelligent agents that understand the world around us.
description:
HyperSentience is transforming microphone-enabled devices into context-aware agents capable of doing the right thing at the right time. Our relationship with technology today still requires us to adapt our behavior to the various devices we use rather than the devices adapting to us. HyperSentience imagines a future where devices are completely aware of the context we find ourselves in and capable of doing the right thing at the right time. 

Their software-only solution enables any microphone-enabled device to become aware of the context it is situated in
using privacy-friendly audio processing and AI on the edge. Phones, AR/VR headsets, watches, speakers, and laptops become aware of our actions, our behaviors, and the context we find ourselves in, seamlessly adapting and responding to it. 

Data is processed locally on the edge, without the need to upload or share to the cloud. Only fractions of a second are used by their algorithm, and the actual signal is never shared beyond the algorithm processing. The technology is delivered as a seamless AI software overlay which can run on existing smart devices using existing built-in microphones.
tags: Artificial Intelligence / AI / Augmented Reality / AR / Automotive / Connected Car / Connected Home / Smart Home / Human Machine Interface / HMI / Machine Learning / ML / Sensors / Smart Infrastructure / Virtual Reality / VR

It focuses on human-level AI virtual humans, including identity virtual humans and service virtual humans, with many application scenarios. Mindverse provides customized virtual services, including the virtual spokesperson, virtual coach and virtual friends.

MindOS Builds AI Geniuses— the body and the mind of a virtual teammate who can do everything you expect from a sales, customer service, or marketing expert. Your MindOS Genius understands and responds to video, voice, or text questions to Look, listen and talk like you and your customers and Understand substance, context, intent, and emotion to interact like a human. 

A builder of virtual AI beings. Brand-safe controllable LLM and generative AI. Drag and drop training. Customizable personalities and appearances. A quantum leap above the chatbot. Revolutionizing the future of e-commerce, hospitality, events & conferences, gaming, NFTs, XR, education, marketing, sales customer service, automotive, and more.

name: ReLearn
one_liner: Provides AI-powered waste bin sensors to help companies achieve zero-waste goals and accurate sustainability reporting
description:
Pitch Deck: https://www.canva.com/design/DAFNEGUGdiE/PHb0OJE9gNXQWHcSMtSimQ/view?utm_content=DAFNEGUGdiE&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton
Product Brochure: https://www.canva.com/design/DAFQT61MrZU/s6gQOMtQ8QAiJNiFnMYlHQ/view?utm_content=DAFQT61M

Global consumption of materials is expected to double over the next 40 years, while annual waste generation is expected to increase by 70% by 2050. Moreover, according to the European Environment Agency (EEA) waste management is the fourth source worldwide of Greenhouse gas emissions. 
Listed companies, SMEs and those that have committed to being carbon neutral are obliged to report their waste impact. Today, there is no instrument to measure the waste produced, so companies use inaccurate estimation causing high CO2 emissions and inefficiency in waste operation and sustainability strategies. 

ReLearn helps companies to go 'Zero-Waste '' by installing NANDO, our AI powered plug&play sensor on their already existing bins. NANDO collects accurate data on the quantity and type of waste generated each day, enabling more rigorous sustainability reports, reducing the CO2 emission related to waste and engaging the corporate community.
tags: Artificial Intelligence / AI / Cleantech / Internet of Things / IoT / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

name: ViridisChem, Inc.
one_liner: AI-powered cheminformatics platform for chemical toxicity analysis and sustainable manufacturing.
description:
Chemistry and chemical compounds are are needed by every industry. Toxic chemicals when used within products or during product development, are largely responsible for world pollution. ViridisChem’s is addressing this global problem by helping companies world-wide identify the toxic chemicals being used, and select functionally similar safer chemicals, while making sure that toxic chemical waste generation is minimized.

To achieve these goals, ViridisChem has built a powerful Cheminformatics platform with one of the largest toxicity databases containing 100 million chemicals, a property predictor that provides predictive information of novel molecules, and products that offer comprehensive chemical, reaction and complex formulation analysis. And it is developing a unique first-in-market Chemically intelligent Generative AI agent that will take advantage of all the offerings of the company to provide new insights. 

In short, whether you are a pharma company researching a new molecule, an agrochem company defining sustainable product development; or a cosmetic company ensuring that your products are safe and do not have chemical incapability issues; ViridisChem offers powerful tools to help make smart decisions. And best of all, our Generative AI agent will allow you to seamlessly take advantage of the full Viridischem platform to offer even more insights that will benefit your decision-making.

Creating manufacturing (mfg.) specs and detailed designs is a manual, niche expertise-dependent task performed by mechanical, modeler and surfacing engineers and drafters. Transitioning from a render to detailed design and then mfg. specs. for a single component can range from 7 to 90 days, this repeats for all 30k components.

Hanomi is eliminating this bottleneck starting from mfg. specs. thanks to deep reinforcement learning, VLM and Graph Neural Network. Their AI models are trained on 3D models and mfg. specs. provided by their design partners.

name: Hadrian
one_liner: Autonomous offensive security platform providing continuous external attack surface monitoring and digital risk detection
description:
Hadrian is built by hackers with love. Hadrian's hacker-first approach is a new way of looking at security platforms. By constantly probing and analysing the IT infrastructure of a company, Hadrian provides continuous, real-time insight into its attack surface and digital risks. Hadrian uses cloud technology and machine learning to deliver scalable, accurate and detailed security insights from the outside-in perspective. Hadrian can run thousands of scans and tests on thousands of clients continuously, in parallel and without requiring the installation of an agent.

Why proactive security?
Best defence requires offence. Many organisations do not look at their defence systems from the outside. As a result, they run large, unnecessary risks. Cyber criminals can exploit these opportunities. Companies need to start prioritising proactive security in their overall security strategy.

name: Airspace Intelligence
one_liner: Airspace Intelligence is a software-first aerospace company that helps the world’s most complex air operations succeed.
description:
Flyways AI™, an industry-changing platform that uses artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning to assist dispatchers in making flight operations more efficient and sustainable by optimizing routes and improving the predictability and flow of airline traffic. Flyways AI is a 4D mapping, predictive and recommendation platform for commercial air operations that relies on machine learning and artificial intelligence.

The system autonomously evaluates the operational safety, ATC compliance, and efficiency of an airline's planned and active flights. When it finds a better route around turbulence or a more efficient route, it provides actionable recommendations to flight dispatchers. The dispatcher then decides whether to accept and implement the recommended solution. Dispatchers always make the final call, in accordance with existing FAA protocols. The system looks at all scheduled and active flights across the U.S., scanning air traffic systemically rather than focusing on single flights. It treats air traffic more like the way mapping applications look at ground traffic — as a dynamic and constantly changing ecosystem of moving objects.

This kind of predictive modeling allows Flyways to provide its airlines partners with the ability to 'look into the future', as far as 8h.

one_liner: Develops microalgae-based soil amendments that activate beneficial microbes to improve soil health and crop yields.
description:
Heliae® Agriculture has discovered the microalgae to which the soil microbiome best responds in PhycoTerra®, a microalgal product that activates the soil and fosters healthy crops. Sourced from nature and developed by a company committed to sustainable agriculture, PhycoTerra® is an innovative, renewable resource that helps farmers and growers work toward healthier crops and a healthier world.

PhycoTerra® products use the power of microalgae to build up your soil’s health and quality by feeding the beneficial microbes in your soil.

75% of soil microbes are dormant and inactive. Native beneficial microbes do important work for your soil and your crop, including improving soil structure, increasing water holding capacity, and optimizing nutrient mineralization. When they’re starving, or better understood as asleep, they cannot do these critical jobs to help you maximize yield potential.

PhycoTerra® soil microbial food provides a food source for these microbes to wake them up and put them to work for your crop. Well-fed beneficial microbes, such as fungi and bacteria, improve your soil and crop yield by increasing water and nutrient uptake. They also help support your crop through abiotic stress during the season.

anthym is pioneering the human experience management category in the workplace, helping organizations like Google, Zillow, and Banner Health inspire their people to bring their whole selves to work. anthym leverages the power of personal storytelling, aided by music and other media, to help the members of a team reflect on and catalog some of the more meaningful and important moments from their lives, which is then brought to life in a facilitated moment-sharing experience that goes well beyond the usual team trivia or virtual game activity. It's an amazing trip down memory lane and is proven to bring people closer together and increase overall wellness. People leave fully energized, happy, and in some cases, profoundly transformed. 

We’ve also paid close attention to the needs of individual team leaders as they navigate the changing landscape and have gleaned one key insight: not only is there an ongoing need for team connection & team cohesion in the remote & distributed workplace, but there’s also a massive void in the new hire onboarding & integration process with a lack of human-centered solutions that address the unique challenges of the remote environment. The company partners with BC Cancer, a world-leading cancer research institute, and released the first version of the solution, DeepScene™ 1.0 on colorectal cancer region detection in a portal device in March 2019. Eight hospitals in Canada and Taiwan, including St. Paul's Hospital (Canada), Kaohsiung Medical University Hospital (Taiwan), and MacKay Memorial Hospital (Taiwan) with over 100 pathologists are conducting clinical studies and collaborating product development for DeepScene™. GenerationsE has access to 5 million biopsy slide data globally.

SecureSeniorConnections® was founded to give nearly 50 million older adults a chance to thrive emotionally and physically — and to help those in healthcare and elderly services better serve them.

one_liner: Develops home compostable high-barrier packaging films as sustainable alternatives to traditional plastics
description:
Econic was purpose-designed to allow eco-conscious companies to reduce their impact on the environment while still retaining the same level of functionality provided by traditional plastic films.

The Econic journey began in 1995 when we purchased what was possibly the first commercial cornstarch-based packaging resin from a visionary company in Europe. We developed that resin into a film we market as GreensackTM. Although Greensack is very functional, with similar properties to traditional Polyethylene (PE) plastic – its softness, opaque colour and initial premium price limited its suitability for widespread use so we developed the film further to make it more affordable and functional. We also started working with other resins made from compostable materials, as they became available – and we continue to do so today.

Mandy stands in the gap between consulting and basic surveying by providing rich insights and analysis on employee or customer sentiment to drive decision making, with the speed, convenience, and cost of traditional surveying. name: Reya Reproductive Health
one_liner: Reya matches women to the best birth control option for their unique bodies using an at home test and online matching service.
description: Reya Health is working to match individuals to the best birth control option for their unique body. As it stands, the process of finding a contraceptive that works for someone is trial and error and women are suffering because of it. Reya is building the solution - an at home test that collects saliva samples which will then be mailed to a lab and used to pull data about an individual’s DNA and hormone levels. That person will also outline their preferences and medical history on the website. By combining all of this information together we can use an algorithm to cross reference existing research and information to match the individual to the best contraceptive for them and their body. The results will be delivered through the website. Reya will eliminate the trial error process and minimize negative side effects. Reya will sell the at home test and matching service and provide anonymous info (with consent) to pharma companies so they can continue to better their products.

Televeda provides community engagement and management solutions for: 1) Community Centers, 2) Healthcare Organizations, 3) Insurance Carriers, 4) Individuals.

name: Inara
one_liner: Pay-per-page ebook platform using blockchain micropayments to connect authors and readers
description:
Readers must buy the book or subscribe to a service to find that the book isn’t right for them. Authors pay an “ad tax” on their revenue and give away free ebooks but fail to attract enough readers. With Inara, you only pay for what you read one page at a time. When the page turns the author earns. The bar to reader ebook discovery falls and authors get paid whether the reader reads one page or five hundred in any order..

With Inara, open an ebook on our progressive web application, turn the ebook page, and a micropayment goes from the reader’s digital wallet to the author’s digital wallet in real time. We have Hedera Hashgraph 3rd generation Distributed Ledger Technology and the Dropp payment solution that enable micropayment transactions in USD and HBAR crypto. Inara's proprietary technology renders the book file so that with each text display, we calculate the micropayment charge.   

We are pre-pre-seed and in Closed Beta testing. Inara is an alumnus of the Hedera Boost startup program and an official Hedera Use Case. We found our market and make revenue in the Closed Beta, and solve for  more customers in Open Beta. We are in development of the solution for audiobooks and e-book NFTs to the Metaverse in a virtual land connecting authors and readers with authorland.com
tags: Asset Tokenization / B2B2C / Blockchain / Cryptocurrency / Tokens / E-Commerce

name: Gift of College
one_liner: We help Americans save and pay for education without a lifetime burden of student loan debt.
description:
Nearly every American is touched by the high cost of higher education and the crushing weight of student loan debt that results from not planning ahead for these costs.

The Gift of College crowdfunding platform streamlines the process for friends, family and employers to conveniently make contributions toward 529 college savings and student loan accounts to break the devastating cycle of multi-generational student loan debt. 

Gift of College connects gift givers and receivers through a suite of solutions including its one-of-a-kind gift card available online and at popular retailers nationwide. This same platform facilitates employer auto payroll deduction and optional employer match to student loan and 529 accounts and provides valuable educational resources for employees to learn about 529 college savings plans.

uPetsia focuses on keeping your pet's breath fresh in between regular dental cleanings. Bad dog breath may indicate a serious health risk, with the potential to harm not only your pet's teeth and gums, but also their internal organs.

Spear is one of the most respected companies in continuing education for dentists, leading the way with an exceptional curriculum, inspired faculty and on-demand learning.

Every year thousands of dentists from all over the world come to Spear’s Scottsdale, Ariz. campus to attend workshops and master new skills. Spear Online makes our education available on any Internet-enabled device, with new content added every week. Our Patient Education platform helps patients understand conditions and procedures with non-intimidating, high-definition animations proven to boost case acceptance. Spear also offers turnkey-style Study Clubs for peer-to-peer learning in a dentist’s own community. Our exclusive Faculty Club is a community of like-minded dentists dedicated to continued learning, professional growth and providing the best patient care. Finally, with Spear Practice Solutions, members receive dedicated coaching and consultation, targeted learning from Spear faculty, real-time analytics and customized action plans.

name: OXbyEL Technologies
one_liner: Electrochemical water treatment technology that destroys PFAS and co-contaminants
description: OXbyEL Technologies is an innovative water treatment company solving the PFAS water contamination crisis. Found in numerous products including Teflon and fire-fighting foam, PFAS are a group of some 10,000 chemical compounds which are connected to cancer, organ dysfunction, and immunity system disorders. OXbyEL is commercializing the economical and one-step electrochemical technology to destroy PFAS and co-pollutants in water and wastewater. We will disrupt the expensive and inefficient incumbent technologies of carbon/ resin filtering followed by landfilling/incineration- since the incumbent does not completely remove PFAS from the environment. In a market driven by aggressive regulatory action, we have employed a successful dual-use commercialization approach with customers in the US Air Force and Fortune 500 industry. We have established proven prototypes, and we are scaling to revenue- producing Pilots.

name: Vena Insurance
one_liner: Pay-per-second auto insurance with no up front fees, contracts, or monthly minimum payments.
description: We enable users to pay their auto insurance premium in real time as they drive. We call this payment streaming. It works exactly the same as internet video streaming, except we stream money instead of information. Your streaming rate fluctuates in real time based off your driving, and it cuts off instantly upon vehicle shutoff. Don’t drive at all for a month? Don’t pay a dime. Pair your smartphone with any vehicle to be instantly insured — no applications required.

It is their mission as industry trailblazers to help self-funded employers do the right thing. Not only for their bottom line, but for the overall health of their employees.

name: Porton Health Corporation
one_liner: Telehealth and patient engagement platform connecting healthcare providers and patients to reduce no-shows and optimize clinical capacity
description:
Globally, healthcare expenditures are inflating, estimated to reach $9.2 trillion in 2023. Worldwide, Telehealth and Patient Engagement, are forecasted to account for $92.6B of this cost estimate. We envision creating software solutions that transform healthcare positively, are recognized for empowering patients and providers, and have an impact on health education. 

Towards this vision, we built a platform where healthcare service organizations [HCS] connect providers and patients, thus reducing no shows by up to 25%, minimizing 30% of unused clinical capacity, increasing service offerings, increasing income, and resolving access issues by up to 20%. 

Our platform provides patients with options; patients can access the unique patient portal to access their providers, or a global selection of providers, all from the convenience of their handheld devices, computers or Telehealth booths at locations designated by their provider organizations.

one_liner: AI-powered retrofit technology that converts agricultural sprayers into precision weed-targeting systems, reducing herbicide use by up to 90%
description:
Transforming existing spraying equipment into smart spraying. Agriculture is undergoing an evolution - and AgTechLogic is positioning itself in becoming a vital part of the shift, with its omni-focused approach in enhancing, researching, and developing innovative solutions within the AgTech industry. Creative precision agriculture services to address the industry challenges today and new innovations to protect the future of farming.

Advanced sensor technology detects weeds from living crops, sprays only the weeds, saving farmers up to 90% on chemical usage. Effective weed detection and elimination is becoming increasingly important in today’s growing environment with less precipitation, limitations on herbicide usage and resistant weeds.

AgTechLogic transforms precision spray technology to significantly reduce the use of herbicides, along with impactful conservation of water, fuel, and labor costs. We create an opportunity to have every farmer, municipality, and transportation sector to utilize our technology by converting their existing spraying equipment to an intelligent sensor-controlled precision sprayer.

Using Blockem you’ll be able to easily and reliably check if your recipient is relatedto any kind of scams or fraud. It’s the anti-scam software that performs a detailed analysis of the entire Ethereum network in order to validate whether the address is trustworthy or not.

Their innovation addresses many technology and supply chain issues critical to the semiconductor industry. With deep domain expertise and combination of novel materials and processes, they are scaling microelectronic systems towards higher performance, lower power consumption, and increased density. Hyperion offers unparalleled system-level differentiations to our customers. 
End-to-end microelectronics packaging solution provider, offering direct-to-end user service. Specializing in system-level packaging for high-performance computing and heterogeneously integrated systems. Offering manufacturing service for a wide array of market segments including; defense, aerospace, industrial, general-purpose client computing, and high-performance computing.

name: Photocentric
one_liner: Inventors of 3D LCD printing - our disruptive technology is revolutionising manufacturing
description:
Photocentric has been manufacturing photopolymer resin since 2002 and are the undisputed world-leaders in visible light polymerisation. For nearly two decades, Photocentric has prioritised innovation at the centre of our corporate culture, creating new products for the printing industry. Our patented technology has enabled us to become the leading and most trusted company in making crystal clear craft stamps, both in the UK and the USA.

In 2014 we started our journey into 3D printing with the use of LCD screens as the selective light source to harden visible light photopolymer. This has proven to be our company’s greatest innovation and commercial success so far. This technology is starting to change wider volume manufacturing not just additive manufacturing.

Today, we are delivering on our early ambition of using screens to enable custom mass manufacture. This vision has become a reality through the application of a large number of our largest format and technically most advanced printer, the Liquid Crystal Magna. This has proven its disruptive ability by delivering order of magnitude improvements for the customer in terms of cost, productivity and reliability. Our chemical development partnership with BASF is delivering on the promise of producing usable functional parts.
tags: 3D Printing / Advanced Materials / Coatings / Print Technologies

Using popular SmartTVs, Chromecast, FireStick and Apple TV hardware, you can download Neon Screens from the Google, Amazon and Apple App Stores to easily manage your digital signage on any screen. Once you connect your streaming hardare device to a secure WiFi network, you can start uploading incredible content - even from your mobile phone! Whether you have one screen or one thousand, you have complete control of your content and digital signage. Neon's features are catered to serve all business sizes and industries - providing the highest performing, personalized experience possible.

CERT is a finalist in the NRG COSIA Carbon XPRIZE, and is backed by the Breakthrough Energy Fellowship.

For automotive & lighting applications TracXon develpos large-area “endless” R2R printed foils with integrated LEDs. LED size, pitch, and driving can be customized in an application-specific manner. These foils can be delivered with a transparent adhesive backing tape to stick on to e.g. glass panels.
In healthcare, the printed sensors enable wearable devices. The sensors are used to measure impedance, strain, temperature, pressure, motion, and can be printed as arrays on flexible or stretchable substrates, and 'disappear' into clothing. 
In the use-case electronics, tracxon develops sensors for battery management systems. TracXon works with NTC sensors based on unique formulation from TNO.

name: Vaulted Deep
one_liner: Permanent carbon removal through geologic sequestration of organic waste
description:
Vaulted is an emerging leader in permanent carbon removal. A biomass carbon removal and storage (BiCRs) solution, Vaulted delivers permanent, high quality carbon removal at scale through the geologic sequestration of carbon-filled organic waste. 

Vaulted’s approach is designed to be the lowest-cost, gigaton scale, permanent carbon removal. We sequester sludgy organic wastes (biosolids, manure, agricultural, food waste, paper sludge, etc.) that today are sent to a landfill, dumped into an ocean/river, land applied, or otherwise left to decompose, releasing GHGs into the atmosphere. Vaulted leverages a suite of patented, mature, geologic slurry sequestration technologies which allow us to sequester organic waste with minimal processing. We inject deep under the earth’s surface, where the carbon is permanently trapped under a layer of impermeable rock - the same formations that have kept hydrocarbons underground for millions of years. We have two permitted, operational, facilities allowing us to reach near-term meaningful scale. 

Our carbon removal approach goes beyond vaulting carbon. It inherently improves local environmental and human health. In doing so, our operations redress historically unjust waste management practices and advance environmental justice. 

Vaulted is backed by leading carbon removal and climate investors, including Lowercarbon Capital, Earthshot Ventures, and WovenEarth Ventures.

name: Orbital Arc
one_liner: Space propulsion company developing next-generation electric thrusters to reduce the cost of moving payloads in orbit and beyond.
description:
Orbital Arc is developing a new class of in-space electric propulsion aimed at lowering the cost of moving mass in orbit and beyond. The company’s long-term objective is to enable large-scale economic activity throughout the solar system by making spacecraft propulsion significantly more efficient, scalable, and affordable.

Orbital Arc’s first product is an ion thruster based on a patented ionization method that is fundamentally more power-efficient than conventional plasma-based systems such as Hall-effect and gridded ion thrusters. The technology produces high ion current density from a compact emitter while minimizing wasted energy. Because the ionization process is unusually gentle, it preserves molecular bonds, allowing the use of low-cost molecular propellants that can match or exceed xenon performance at a fraction of the cost.

These capabilities enable a modular propulsion architecture that can scale from CubeSat-class spacecraft to missions requiring thrust levels comparable to major interplanetary systems. Relative to existing electric propulsion technologies at similar performance levels, Orbital Arc’s approach offers meaningful advantages in size, mass, power efficiency, and operating cost.

Orbital Arc is currently at TRL 3, with a working physics demonstration prototype and active development toward full-scale systems.The technology addresses a core constraint in the space economy: the high cost of delta-v. By reducing cost per meter-per-second per kilogram of payload, Orbital Arc aims to make physical operations in space more economically viable.

name: Wardstone

The company’s approach centers on designing, building, and deploying a constellation of satellites that can detect, predict, and kinetically neutralize missiles and other space-based threats, addressing gaps in current defense architectures that were not optimized for high-speed or maneuverable threats. 

Wardstone positions its technology as a global layer of defense that can provide coverage from any launch location, complementing existing terrestrial and sea-based systems. The company is part of the Y Combinator Fall 2025 cohort and is advancing early-stage development while building relationships with U.S. defense stakeholders including Space Force and Air Force research entities.

name: Assembly OSM
one_liner: Assembly OSM delivers architecturally distinctive high-rise buildings through a technologically advanced process of digital design, manufacturing, assembly, and on-site installation.
description:
Assembly OSM is redefining how buildings are designed and delivered through advanced off-site manufacturing systems that address the cost, speed, and risk challenges of traditional construction. As demand grows for faster, more sustainable, and higher-quality buildings, Assembly OSM provides a modern alternative that replaces fragmented, on-site processes with a controlled, industrialized approach to building delivery.

At the core of Assembly OSM’s platform is a modular building system that produces architecturally refined, high-performance structures without sacrificing design intent. The system combines premium aesthetics with superior building performance by using sustainable materials and precision-engineered components. This allows developers and owners to achieve both visual excellence and long-term operational efficiency within a repeatable and scalable framework.

Assembly OSM’s standardized yet flexible componentry is manufactured in factory-controlled environments, enabling consistent quality and rapid production. By shifting construction off-site, the company minimizes labor variability, weather delays, and material waste while significantly reducing on-site risk. This industrialized fabrication process enables tighter coordination across design, manufacturing, and assembly phases.

As a result, Assembly OSM delivers dramatically shorter construction timelines and far greater cost and schedule certainty compared to conventional projects. Buildings can be completed in a fraction of the time while maintaining high standards for sustainability, durability, and design quality. Assembly OSM’s approach enables more predictable outcomes for developers and owners, reshaping expectations for how quickly and reliably buildings can be brought to market.

name: Innovaer Technologies
one_liner: Designs and manufactures air and gas sensing solutions for HVAC, refrigeration, and electric vehicle battery safety applications
description:
Innovaer Technologies is a company that specializes in the design, manufacture, marketing, and support of unique sensing solutions that align with customer needs. The company's mission is to provide full-service solutions comprised of market-leading air and gas sensing technologies with an optimized price-to-performance ratio. Their product portfolio includes sensor modules that employ various detection principles such as NDIR (non-dispersive infrared) technology, ultrasonic technology, and metal oxide semiconductor technology. These sensors are designed to detect a variety of gases including R32/R454B/R454C/R454A/R290/R1234ze, O2, CO2, and CO.

One of Innovaer's notable products is the ATRS-1000, an early warning sensing system for EV battery thermal runaway. This product uses NDIR Carbon Dioxide and MOX Carbon Monoxide sensors to ensure detection at the first venting within the battery module. It offers a long life of up to 15 years and features auto-calibration to ensure long installed life. The ATRS-1000 can communicate via CAN, LIN, or J1939 interfaces.

Relevant product: https://innovaertech.com/product/atrs-1000/

one_liner: Develops energy-harvesting MEMS sensors that operate without batteries for industrial IoT and logistics applications
description:
BelluTech is a provider of patented sensor technology for demanding IoT in industrial, automotive, cold-chain and logistics, and medical applications requiring integrated multi-sensing with long battery-life or batteryless operation.  
Our always-on sensors use a digital MEMS sensor array to directly scavenge energy from the environment or the sense parameter for operation. This happens with zero stand-by power draw. 
The sensors include Temperature, Humidity/moisture, Motion & impact, Pressure, UV light, Gas/Chemical.   BelluTech sensor technology also provide cumulative exposure sensing such heat, moisture, chemical or UV exposure.   
The Bellutech sensors are manufactured using MEMS and semiconductor processes suitable for mass scale low-cost production.  BelluTech sensors include wireless link and can operate with or without batteries.

name: Flip
one_liner: Empowering every employee. Simple, efficient and engaging: the employee app changing deskless work.
description:
Customers: McDonald's, Rewe, Bauder, toom, EuroPart, Stuttgart

Flip works across multiple industries.

Problem:
Many deskless workers, who were previously marginalized and lacked effective communication channels, faced challenges in accessing important information, updates, and relevant HR tools for their daily job. Employers struggled to efficiently communicate with their deskless employees, resulting in potential gaps in information dissemination and feedback collection.

Solution: 
Flip - that is the app empowering deskless work. The app combines the digitised bulletin board, the newsfeed, with an intuitive chat and bundles on top of that relevant (HR) tools in one place.  With Flip, employers and managers can reach their entire workforce with just 2 clicks. Employees receive relevant information instantly and know where to find everything they need for their daily job. Customer feedback is carried directly to the administration. Flip can be used to schedule shifts and to complete training. The app doesn’t just offer a scheduling program, it also provides employees with opportunities for development. This increases flexibility and makes things faster for you – including onboarding new employees.

name: Circ (formally Tyton BioSciences)
one_liner: Chemically recycle blended textiles into raw materials for new fibers, creating a circular system for fashion.
description:
Circ (formally Tyton) is headquartered in Danville, VA where our research takes place. Danville is a former textile town located on the Virginia/North Carolina border, an hour north of the Research Triangle.

Circ developed a solution to chemically recycle blended waste textiles (cotton and polyester) to economically recover both products. The system uses sub-critical water to de-polymerize the polyester so that the TPA and Ethylene Glycol can be recovered from the liquid stream. These polyester monomers can then be polymerized into polyester, replacing oil; as a feedstock. The solid fraction, residual cotton, is converted into a high quality cellulose for use in making viscose, lyocell or acetate, replacing trees as a feedstock.

Circ is in the process of scaling its technology and is currently testing with multiple corporate partners across the textile supply chain, through to major global fashion brands.

name: RePurpose Energy
one_liner: RePurpose Energy reuses electric vehicle batteries to create lower-cost, more sustainable energy storage systems
description: RePurpose Energy meets both the need for more affordable, more sustainable energy storage systems (ESS) and the need to manage electric vehicle (EV) battery waste by reusing EV batteries to create “second-life” ESS. We begin by precisely measuring EV battery health in <90 seconds using machine learning. We then optimize battery reassembly into new circuits to maximize safety, efficiency, and longevity. Finally, we equip the batteries with proprietary controls and fire suppression systems. This allows us to repurpose used EV batteries safely for 7+ years in “second-life” ESS at a 30%+ price advantage over new battery alternatives.

name: Liminal
one_liner: AI-powered ultrasound inspection platform for real-time battery manufacturing quality control
description:
Liminal is a battery manufacturing intelligence provider that combines ultrasound technology with machine learning to deliver advanced insights that empower manufacturers.

As demand for EVs surges, the battery industry must quickly scale up manufacturing of batteries with best-in-class performance, reliability, and safety while reducing overall battery costs. Our solution is EchoStat®, an advanced inspection and analytics platform that provides visibility inside batteries throughout the manufacturing process. This allows customers to catch and resolve design or production flaws in real time, quickly improving quality and productivity and minimizing the exposure to defects.

EchoStat® is the only technology that uses ultrasound imaging and machine learning analytics for fast, efficient, high-quality inspection and process control in battery manufacturing. It detects flaws during production at their source and records the environment in which they occurred. This data is then used to continually improve the manufacturing process, resulting in higher output and less waste.

Liminal’s inspection solutions are non-invasive, non-destructive, and offer a comprehensive analysis of each battery cell’s physical condition during production – and it all takes only a matter of seconds.
