Leveraging the unique capabilities of iRIS®, Dynexus Technology provides the following options to support battery research needs and provides independent battery testing and analysis. This includes iRIS-based assessments and integration responsive to customer needs, battery screening and matching, battery characterization, accelerated aging protocols, performance degradation assessments and scoping studies.

Dynexus Technology offers a hardware device, the iRIS P1, a single-channel benchtop measurement system available in two maximum voltage configurations. This allows to perform broadband AC impedance battery measurements quickly (typically 1 second to  80 seconds) while in any operational state.

name: Amionx Inc.
one_liner: SafeCore prevents a lithium battery from being the source of fire/explosion.
description:
Amionx is a spinout from American Lithium Energy Corporation (ALE). ALE has been designing, manufacturing, and supplying batteries to the Department of Defense for more than ten years. ALE successfully developed and delivered batteries to the U.S. Army that can be penetrated by a bullet without the risk of fire or explosion. Amionx was spun out from ALE to license the patented SafeCore® technology for implementation in every Li-ion battery sold in commercial markets.
 
SafeCore was designed to combat the major hazards associated with batteries including overcharge, internal short, and high temperature. It is a layer within the cell that creates a delamination of the electrode from the current collector when triggered by a temperature, voltage, or current threshold. Because it works at the core of the battery, it remains a final line of defense even when other security measures fail.

We design and develop the chips for our sensors at our Silicon Valley headquarters and manufacture the silicon wafers in an ISO/TS 16949 and ISO 9001 certified fab in the western United States.

Posifa's product portfolio consists of gas and liquid flow sensors, air velocity sensors, and vacuum sensors. Our flow sensors can be found in demanding applications from medical ventilators and oxygen concentrators to the mass flow controllers used in fuel cell generators and semiconductor equipment. Posifa's micro-Pirani vacuum sensors are powering the next generation of ultra-portable, internet-connected vacuum gauges.

Posifa serves its global customer base through direct sales and a network of distributors in the United States, Europe, Korea, and Taiwan.

name: Foodration4All
one_liner: FOODRATION4ALL is dedicated to the design, development, management, commercialization and implementation of technological innovation and social impact projects. (Social Impact tech)
description:
FOODRATION4ALL is dedicated to innovation and impact projects, all framed in the food sector (attacking both in the field of food waste, as well as in the field of food donations) and environmental sustainability (C02 footprint reduction and use of sustainable materials). From now on, verticals are already being defined in order to replicate the technology system in other sectors such as the clothing industry and the electronic components industry.
The core business project is Nadie sin su ración diaria, it's based on an innovative system that is committed to the improvement and digital transformation of the current food donation system. A project that uses advanced and avant-garde technologies, such as a mobile app, virtual donation machine, blockchain technology and VR technology to favor the integration of people at risk of exclusion and improve their daily diet; betting on the experience of using the donor, considered the driving force behind donations.

At MarineCFO, our mission is to provide technology leadership and digital transformation solutions to the maritime industry, enabling our customers to operate more safely, securely, and profitably.

Some of the best-run commercial and government maritime companies trust their operations, personnel, maintenance, and compliance related management to MarineCFO software.

name: ANGARA GLOBAL
one_liner: AI-powered decarbonization platform that optimizes industrial heat exchangers to reduce emissions
description:
ANGARA DeCarbonX is a NL-based technology scale-up with quickly growing sales.
In sum, AI-driven solution unlocks a new market of >$50 billion / year through digital transformation of an old b2b services segment.

Rolling out globally — a very PRAGMATIC & HIGH IMPACT decarbonization technology that pays for itself. It is profitable for customers. For a customer, the 1st sizable results are achieved within 12 months. Globally, the CO2 impact abatement potential exceeds 1Gt CO2 / year at scale.

The PROBLEM solved:
 - High emission industries run zillions of HEX.
- They run dirty WITH fouling, and hence — inefficiently.

The SOLUTION: fully digital AI-driven patented technology enables HEX to run cleanly AND efficiently all the time.
tags: Artificial Intelligence / AI / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Optimization / HVAC / Heating / Cooling / Machine Learning / ML / Oil & Gas / Renewable Energy / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Sustainability

name: Bluefoundation
one_liner: Engineering consultancy helping industrial and energy companies decarbonize through digital twin modeling and sustainable technology planning
description:
Bluefoundation was established in response to the growing need to identify effective solutions for reducing climate-changing emissions and achieving sustainable development goals in the industrial and energy sectors.

Bluefoundation's core service is based on a structured approach to bridge the gap between having declared sustainability goals and actually achieving them, through the planning of appropriate technological and structural interventions. The transformation towards the 'factory of the future' is planned thorugh a rigorous methodology on a case-by-case basis depending on the options available, aiming at the best combination of electrification, renewables, alternative fuels, process optimization, and CO2 capture and reuse.

The working method includes scouting of innovative technologies, creation of digital twin models for simulation of the optimal sustainability scenarios (economic, technical and environmental) converging into an intervention roadmap flanked by business models and identification of technology partners needed for the implementation.
tags: Carbon Capture / Circular Economy / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Optimization / Renewable Energy / Sustainability

name: Mipise
one_liner: Technological solutions for the digitization of Private Markets (private equity, private debt, real estate) and crowdfunding solutions
description:
Founded in 2013 by Michel Ivanovsky and Jean-Michel Errera, two former bank executives, Mipise specializes in technological innovation for financial players wishing to engage in their digital transformation, to increase efficiency, productivity and respond to new customers use cases. 

At the heart of the Mipise project, the vision of a finance that must reinvent itself thanks to digital tools, Saas platforms and blockchain technology, to enable the success of a truly collaborative and efficient financial economy.

Mipise operates in two closely-related lines of businesses :

Primarily, Mipise provides a fully digital and modular solution for private markets firms (private equity, private debt, real estate, infrastructure). The services provided include investor onboarding (KYC-AML), online subscription, capital calls, securities registration, post-souscription monitoring or investor/distributor portals. 

Second, Mipise provides a white-label crowdfunding solution allowing any player to develop their own platform and bring together project leaders seeking funding and investors. Asset classes include real estate, equities, bonds, loans, royalties or donations. 

For any further information, please contact us at contact@mipise.com

description:
IUNA AI Vision Systems GmbH was founded in Heilbronn in 2020. We develop Deep Learning-based Vision Software and Camera Systems to automate visual inspection and quality assurance in industrial manufacturing.

With the help of high-resolution cameras, deep-learning-based AI models and continuous tracking of the object position, parts and defects of different types can be classified and localized fully automatically. Measurement results are displayed in real time in the IUNA user interface. 

The software also includes a database function and tools for visualizing statistics. This allows the current and past quality level to be tracked precisely. Through the autonomous and consistent data collection, statistics can be generated and process-related errors can be detected.

IUNA AI vision systems are easy to use and can be easily integrated into the existing manufacturing process due to their low hardware complexity.

name: KyberLabs
one_liner: Artificial muscle for robotics arms
description:
ROBOTS DESIGNED FOR AI
We're building a robotic manipulation platform that is designed from the ground up for AI based controls. Our novel, low cost artificial muscle fiber actuators mimic the functionality of human muscle and allow for fluid and dexterous movement that is not feasible with conventional actuation systems.

We're developing a versatile robotic manipulation platform aiming to emulate the upper arm and hand functionalities of humans at a fraction of the cost. This adaptable system can be tailored for various applications, extending beyond current robotic capabilities. It's capable of stationary operations, performing assembly and fabrication tasks in logistics or manufacturing settings with minimal setup. Moreover, it can be mounted on a mobile base for tasks in flat facilities like warehouses or on a legged base to create full humanoid robots. Our focus is on creating robots that effectively manipulate objects in real-world scenarios alongside humans. While technically challenging, we're taking incremental steps towards our long-term goal with earlier, more manageable product iterations.

name: Zensors
one_liner: AI platform that transforms existing cameras into smart sensors for business operations
description:

They believe that advances in AI should be accessible to everyone, not just those with a degree in computer science, and applied to everyday problems to make customer experiences more delightful and employees more efficient. 

A single camera combined with state-of-the-art machine learning can become a one-stop sensing solution, able to replace dozens of IoT type sensors. From counting people and cars to more complex questions, such as table cleanliness and equipment utilization, Zensors delivers actionable data using your existing camera investment.

ClearBlade enables companies to ingest, analyze, adapt and act on any data in real-time and at extreme scale.  Unleash your data at the edge by leveraging local compute, artificial intelligence and actionable visualizations while integrating with any enterprise system - all from a single platform.

The industry leading ClearBlade Edge delivers the full power of the ClearBlade Platform directly to devices and gateways.  The ClearBlade Edge runs autonomously - independent of network connectivity - ensuring resiliency and security. one_liner: AI-powered geospatial analytics platform providing situational awareness for defense, disaster response, and insurance
description:
Slingshot Aerospace is a venture backed signal processing and advanced geospatial analytics company that provides situational awareness products to stakeholders in defense, disaster response and insurance. One of these products is Earth Portal, a low click GIS (Geographic Information System) solution that provides users with rapid post-CAT and underwriting insights by leveraging Earth observation imagery (satellite, manned aerial and UAV), remote sensing data, and AI-fueled geospatial analytics (e.g. debris detection, damage detection, flood detection).  Earth Portal also offers various collaboration and annotation tools to streamline claims triage, disaster response and underwriting operations. 

Slingshot recently secured a 2-year, $6 million contract with the US Air Force. By working with the D.O.D, Slingshot looks to continue the advancement of its geospatial product and capabilities to provide state of the art solutions to commercial customers.

one_liner: Provides high-resolution satellite imagery and Earth observation data for defense, intelligence, and analytics applications.
description:
Umbra Space is on a mission to democratize access to Earth observation data, leveraging cutting-edge satellite technology to offer unprecedented high-resolution images of our planet. Founded by a team passionate about harnessing the power of space to solve Earth's most pressing challenges, Umbra aims to empower businesses, governments, and researchers with the data needed to make informed decisions. Since its inception, the startup has successfully launched a constellation of satellites capable of capturing sub-meter resolution images, marking a significant milestone in the commercial space industry.

Umbra's product suite includes tailored mission solutions that cater to a wide range of applications, from environmental monitoring and urban planning to defense and intelligence. The company's innovative approach combines advanced remote sensing capabilities with a user-friendly platform, ensuring clients can easily access and utilize the data.

Shelf Engine's unique business model handles the entire ordering process from vendor management to shelf optimization, saving retailers money and reducing risk by buying back any remaining unsold items. name: Ceres Technology
one_liner: Ceres uses AI to predict supply chain delays months in advance.
description: Ceres Technology is a company specializing in AI-driven supply chain management solutions, offering a platform called Nostradamus. This platform leverages over six billion real-time data points to provide procurement intelligence tailored to various industries. Nostradamus enables businesses to analyze vast amounts of data quickly, transforming months-long processes into minutes. It supports industries such as automotive, pharmaceuticals, food and beverage, and more by identifying risks and opportunities across supply chains. For instance, it can assess demand and capacity constraints in semiconductor components, analyze pricing risks for lithium-ion batteries, or monitor drought and vegetation health using satellite imagery to manage commodity costs. The platform is accessible via a dashboard or API and integrates seamlessly with major ERP systems. It allows users to configure analyses based on their specific needs, such as raw materials, suppliers, or logistics, providing a holistic view of risks and enabling rapid decision-making.

name: AWM Smart Shelf
one_liner: AI-powered smart shelf platform for automated retail inventory tracking and in-store digital advertising
description:
Smart Shelf uses small, high-def cameras to power computer vision algorithms and AI to automatically keep track of what people purchase (and thus, real-time store inventory), while linking this commerce with in-store branding and advertising via digital smart displays.

The AWM SMART SHELF ® is designed to replicate key benefits of the online experience into physical retail environments. The platform utilizes ruggedized shelf-edge displays combined with high definition optical sensors to automate intelligence into on-the-shelf inventory levels and planogram compliance, play optimal video based on shopper distance (including product pricing and information), provide insight into demographics, and allow for content triggering on detected age, gender, or ethnicity. The technologies work together to enhance operational efficiencies and to provide sales uplift and valuable data.

Our clients include Pepsi, Walmart, Hershey, Albertsons and many more.

name: Lambda

description: Lambda is a deep-learning infrastructure company, that provides computation to accelerate human progress. The company's cloud technology, servers, and workstations are pre-configured with common ML frameworks, enabling clients to simplify and accelerate the training and deployment of deep learning models. The company empowers AI engineers toeffortlessly, securely, and cost-effectively construct, test, and deploy AI products on a large scale. name: Pictorus
one_liner: A cloud-native solution, designed from the ground up for today’s engineers developing software to run on hardware devices
description:
Pictorus is low-code Visual Programming, designed from the ground up for modern engineers. Develop and deploy powerful, reliable code from any browser to hardware instantly. 

People say 'hardware is hard,' but it's often the software interface that makes working with devices so challenging. This is the problem, faced by hardware developers all over the world, that Pictorus is solving.

The team has been building vehicle software for over 20 years combined - for NASA, the DoD, and drone startups Saildrone, DroneDeploy, and Matternet.

one_liner: Generates synthetic training data for computer vision models using game engines
description: We generate synthetic data to train computer vision models. Unbiased, diverse, perfectly-labeled data, free from privacy concerns. And lots of it.

name: RunPod
one_liner: RunPod is a GPU cloud provider for AI developers.
description: RunPod provides cost-effective GPU cloud computing services for training, deploying, and scaling AI models. With Secure Cloud and Community Cloud, users can spin up an on-demand GPU cluster in a few clicks. With Serverless, users can create Serverless API endpoints for running inference on custom models, or use RunPod's existing API endpoints to leverage 15+ different open-source models. RunPod was launched in 2022 and is headquartered in New Jersey.

name: SensCy
one_liner: SensCy provides sensible cybersecurity solutions for small and medium-sized organizations.
description: SensCy provides sensible cybersecurity solutions for small and medium-sized organizations. The company was founded in 2021 and is headquartered in Ann Arbor, Michigan, United States.

name: Replicate
one_liner: Cloud platform for running and deploying machine learning models
description:
You can use Replicate to run machine learning models in the cloud from your own code, without having to set up any servers. Their community has published hundreds of open-source models that you can run, or you can run your own models.

Replicate lets you run machine learning models with a cloud API, without having to understand the intricacies of machine learning or manage your own infrastructure. You can run open-source models that other people have published, or package and publish your own models. Those models can be public or private.

Run
Replicate lets you run machine learning models with a few lines of code, without needing to understand how machine learning works.

Push
You're building new products with machine learning. You don't have time to fight Python dependency hell, get mired in GPU configuration, or cobble together a Dockerfile.

That's why we built Cog, an open-source tool that lets you package machine learning models in a standard, production-ready container.

Scale
Deploying machine learning models at scale is horrible. If you've tried, you know. API servers, weird dependencies, enormous model weights, CUDA, GPUs, batching. If you're building a product fast, you don't want to be dealing with this stuff.

name: RapidFort
one_liner: RapidFort is the first Software Attack Surface Optimization Platform.
description:
Modern cloud workloads include a large number of unused or seldom used components. These components are present either because they might be needed in an emergency or because engineers aren’t sure if they are needed or not. Attackers frequently use these same components to help them “live off the land” and avoid detection once they have compromised a system or, in some cases, facilitate an initial compromise.

Software attack surface is the sum of all software opportunities that unauthorized parties can exploit to access a system. Reducing your software attack surface is an essential security measure.

RapidFort solves this problem by providing organizations with a platform to continuously monitor and minimize their software attack surface. An immediate benefit of RapidFort's solution is that, even before the workload arrives for production deployment, there is a clear understanding of which packages and vulnerabilities are in use by the workload, reducing vulnerability remediation and patch management backlog by 80% on average.

It’s simple to start with RapidFort and see for yourself. It’s easy; it’s magical! Visit us at www.rapidfort.com, and let us help you run free and stay secure.

name: Arago
one_liner: Scalable and integrated optical processing unit for neural computation.
description:
Arago is a DeepTech startup pioneering practical optical computing to make AI infrastructure radically more energy efficient. Its proprietary photonic AI accelerator delivers the same compute power as leading GPUs while consuming up to 10× less energy and remaining fully compatible with standard AI frameworks like PyTorch. This breakthrough enables data centers and developers to scale AI sustainably without rewriting code or overhauling infrastructure.

Founded in 2024, Arago operates across France, North America, and Israel with a world-class team of AI engineers, physicists, and hardware experts.

name: Ranictek
one_liner: Energy-saving and cost-effective baseband chips for 5G/6G O-RAN base stations & satcom.
description:
Ranictek is an IC design company, founded in 2022 & headquartered in Taiwan, in developing 5G/6G base station and satellite communication chips. Especially, we focus on the baseband chips for O-RAN massive MIMO base stations, satellites, and ground stations. We provide both energy-saving and cost-effective chip solutions to our customers. By our chip solution, we try to popularize the 5G/6G and satellite communication technologies. Ranictek also has honored with the 2023 International Innovation Award from EETimes: 'Most Leading-Edge Startups'.
 
Dr. Yi-Fan (Mike) Wang, Ranictek’s founder and CEO. He got his PhD in Communication Engineering from National Taiwan University (NTU). He has published IEEE journal and conference papers on the key technologies of massive MIMO and base stations. Beyond the theoretical innovation, he has worked in R&D and management positions in the three different areas of the IC design (MediaTek Group), telecom operator (Chunghwa Telecom), and system manufacturer (NCSIST, etc). He has the practical experience on the R&D team management and product development in the industry.

one_liner: Software-based quantum security solution protecting enterprise data against quantum computing threats
description:
The quantum security problem.
Solved.

At QuSecure, our pursuit for discovery and advancement never stops. It’s this philosophy that’s enabled us to develop QuProtect™, our state-of-the-art, software-based quantum security solution. Designed to integrate seamlessly with today’s technology, QuProtect gives our clients the protection and assurance they need, so they’re ready for today. And tomorrow.

We know the quantum threat is real. We also know it’s preventable. At QuSecure, we’ve created an all-encompassing software-based solution, QuProtect, that enables our clients to focus on their goals, with confidence.

QuProtect can be easily adapted to suit unique business requirements and industry-specific challenges. It’s this tailored approach that allows us to pre-empt potential challenges and confidently navigate the quantum threat. Together.

At QuSecure, we know that certain industries have unique needs and challenges. When it comes to achieving quantum security, a different approach

name: Quantum XChange
one_liner: Quantum Xchange's products and services enable organizations to be quantum-safe today and quantum-ready for tomorrow's threats.
description: Quantum Xchange gives commercial enterprises and government agencies the ultimate solution for secure communications. Its complete key management system, Phio Trusted Xchange (TX), is uniquely capable of making existing encryption keys quantum safe and supports both post-quantum crypto (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) for true crypto agility and quantum readiness. As the operator of the first quantum fiber network in the U.S., Quantum Xchange also holds the unique distinction of being the only company in the world to make QKD commercially viable by solving the distance and delivery limitations inherent with all other offerings. With a dynamic security infrastructure in place, organizations can enhance their existing encryption environment, select the level of protection needed based on their risk tolerance, and seamlessly scale to QKD at any time, across any distance, between multiple transmission points.
tags: Consumer Electronics / Hardware / Quantum Computing / Quantum Mechanics

name: Qrypt
one_liner: Provides quantum-secure key generation and encryption solutions to protect sensitive enterprise data against quantum computing threats.
description:
Qrypt is a company that provides a solution for quantum-secure key generation, allowing multiple endpoints to independently generate identical keys. Their SDK for KeyGen aims to protect sensitive data from being captured by ensuring that encryption keys remain secure, even in the event of algorithm failure caused by quantum computers or other factors. Qrypt's solution is applicable to various use cases, such as secure transfer of secrets, protection of intellectual property, and reducing crypto-agility costs and risks. True quantum random is the secure foundation of all of our technology. Combined with advanced techniques and algorithms, applications built with the Qrypt SDK can become quantum-secure.


Entropy Generation
We host multiple quantum random number generators based on quantum measurements. The REST API gives you access to a pipeline of unmatched technology from respected national labs.


BLAST Algorithm
Developed by our world-leading Chief Cryptographer, Yevgeniy Dodis, BLAST is a peer reviewed algorithm that generates identical keys at multiple endpoints.


Post-Quantum Cryptography
NIST is standardizing quantum-safe asymmetric algorithms. We use the Kyber and FrodoKEM candidates in our protocols, and have overcome practical adoption of One-Time Pad with BLAST.


Double Ratchet
Our patented key rotation technology provides messaging with perfect forward and backward secrecy as well as post-compromise recovery
tags: Airports / Airport Security / App Security / Website Security / Cloud Computing / Cloud Security / Cybersecurity / Home Security / Security

description: Sepio is disrupting the cyber-security industry by uncovering hidden hardware attacks. Sepio's HAC-1 provides security teams with full visibility into their hardware assets and their behavior in real time. A comprehensive policy enforcement module allows administrators to easily define granular device usage rules and continuously monitor and protect their infrastructure. Leveraging a combination of physical fingerprinting technology together with device behavior analytics, Sepio's software-only solution offers instant detection and response to any threat or breach attempt coming from a manipulated or infected element.

name: Glean
one_liner: AI-powered enterprise search platform that helps employees instantly find information and insights across all company applications
description:
Glean is an AI-powered knowledge management and work assistant designed to streamline information retrieval and discovery across an organization's ecosystem of apps and tools. It allows employees to search for exactly what they need without having to remember where it’s stored or what it’s called. Beyond simple search, Glean enables discovery by surfacing relevant insights, highlighting connections between people and knowledge, and uncovering resources employees might not have known existed. 

What sets Glean apart is its intelligent layer that offers tailored insights for multiple use cases, from enhancing team collaboration to boosting productivity. It leverages AI to not only return results but also provide recommendations, trends, and actionable insights based on the context of each user’s needs. Whether it's identifying experts, surfacing key documents, or suggesting relevant content, Glean adapts to different workflows to provide deeper value and optimize decision-making.

Seamlessly integrating with a company’s existing tools, Glean is easy to deploy and ready to use immediately, eliminating steep learning curves. By centralizing access to scattered information, Glean empowers teams to work more efficiently, collaborate effectively, and make better-informed decisions. Its mission is to bring people the knowledge they need to make a difference—starting with the ability to reliably glean the right information, instantly.

name: Tines
one_liner: No-code automation platform enabling security and IT teams to build complex workflows and automate repetitive tasks without developers
description: Tines is a powerful automation platform that enables security and IT teams to focus on high-impact work. Tines is the only platform that bypasses the need for technical skills and delivers powerful automation straight into the hands of security and IT teams, without the need for a developer. Tines connects every tool in your workflow in one place, executes every step, and lets you know when you need to weigh in on the urgent stuff. Built by security practitioners, Tines securely automates thousands of workflows per day across a diverse range of customers, including Coinbase, Box, Canva, Databricks, McKesson, and OpenTable. The company was founded in 2018 in Dublin, Ireland, by Eoin Hinchy and Thomas Kinsella, with the mission to make the lives of security and IT teams easier by making automation accessible to everyone.

name: Quantara AI, Inc.
one_liner: Cyber Risk Intelligence and Governance Platform that transforms cybersecurity data into executive-ready insights through automated risk quantification and ROI modeling
description:
Quantara AI is a Cyber Risk Intelligence and Governance platform built to bridge the gap between cybersecurity operations and business strategy. Powered by our proprietary Cyber Risk Conscience (CRC™) framework, it delivers industry-specific, business-aligned insights tailored to your unique risk profile. We provide automated, executive-ready outputs across:

-Executive Cyber Risk Reporting
-Cyber Risk Quantification (CRQ) with ROI modeling
-Continuous Cyber Assessment across digital, cyber, and business domains
-Cyber Risk Scorecards and KRIs, aligned with leading frameworks like NIST CSF
-Risk-Based Mitigation Plans, prioritized by Risk Reduction Impact (RRI)
-Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) and ERM Alignment

Quantara AI turns cyber risk into business outcomes—clear, tailored, and measurable. Key benefits:

-Industry-Specific Risk Insights: Threat profiling and risk quantification specific to your sector
-Reduced Cyber Tech Debt: Streamline controls and eliminate redundant tooling
-Faster Time to Value: Deploy in days at 20–40% the cost of traditional solutions
-Prioritized Remediation: Focus on what matters most—based on ROI and risk impact
-Business and Regulatory Alignment: Stay in sync with ERM, TPRM, and compliance needs

Unlike legacy tools or fragmented services, Quantara AI delivers clarity, speed, and executive actionability—right out of the box.

Get Started today at: 
https://quantara.ai/get-started/

name: DevZero
one_liner: DevZero makes developers more productive by providing a platform for cloud-based software development environments.
description: DevZero makes developers more productive by providing a platform for cloud-based software development environments. DevZero helps developers ship better products by writing and testing code in environments that are exactly like production. DevZero provides devs with centrally-managed templates and allows them to reuse existing Dockerfiles, build scripts, and config for K8s to generate environments for coding in, and testing against. By diagnosing your developer tools and processes, developer metrics provide insights and actionable data to remove bottlenecks.

name: Cosine
one_liner: Cosine is an AI co-developer that helps you write better code by understanding your codebase and providing contextual answers, explanations, and suggestions.
description:
Cosine is an AI-powered knowledge engine that acts as an invaluable co-developer for software engineers. It seamlessly integrates with your codebase, gaining a deep understanding of your code and its structure. This enables Cosine to provide comprehensive and contextual answers to your coding questions, offer explanations for complex features, and guide you in building new functionalities.

With Cosine, you can:

Ask complex coding questions and receive detailed explanations: Cosine's AI can process and understand even the most intricate coding queries, providing clear and thorough explanations tailored to your specific context.

Gain insights into existing code features: Cosine can unravel the intricacies of your codebase, providing insights into the purpose and functionality of existing features. This deep understanding allows Cosine to offer suggestions for improvement and optimization.

Plan and develop new features with assistance: As you embark on new development tasks, Cosine can assist you in planning and designing features effectively. It can suggest relevant code snippets, identify potential issues, and guide you towards a more efficient and successful implementation.

Cosine's capabilities extend beyond mere code completion and error detection. It acts as a true AI co-developer, understanding your intent, providing context-aware suggestions, and helping you make informed decisions throughout the development process.

name: CodeComplete
one_liner: CodeComplete is an AI coding assistant for enterprises.
description: An AI-powered coding assistant designed specifically for enterprise needs. Efficient, reliable, and equipped with cutting-edge technology to uplevel your developer productivity. CodeComplete's B2B model can be deployed in the private cloud or on-premises and is fine tuned and only uses permissively licensed code, ensuring compliance.

description: Factory is a developer of an AI-based platform for computer codes and software engineering. one_liner: Decagon provides AI agents that autonomously resolve complex customer support queries, integrating seamlessly with existing systems to enhance operational efficiency.
description: Decagon.ai builds advanced AI-driven customer service agents designed to handle the entire support lifecycle, from natural-language interaction and issue resolution to internal documentation generation, analytics, and escalation. By leveraging foundational models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Cohere, fine-tuned with enterprise-specific historical data, Decagon enables seamless integration with existing support systems. This integration allows the AI to trigger backend actions—such as refund processing—analyze conversation trends, and dynamically update knowledge bases to improve service over time. Since emerging from stealth in June 2024, Decagon has secured top-tier clients, including Substack, Eventbrite, Bilt, Duolingo, Webflow, Rippling, and ClassPass. With strong funding backing, including a $35M seed/A and a $65M Series B round, totaling $100M to date, Decagon is quickly positioning itself as a leader in the AI-powered customer support space. The company continues to scale rapidly, with a focus on expanding its enterprise customer base and refining its AI capabilities to meet growing demand for efficient, automated support solutions.

It addresses the complexities of managing customer inquiries across various channels by offering a unified ticketing and support system. Thena leverages AI to automate repetitive tasks, enabling support teams to concentrate on more intricate issues. Key features include smart routing and auto-triage, which enhance the efficiency of the ticket management process by directing inquiries to the right personnel. Additionally, Thena allows for the creation of branded help centers and knowledge bases, improving the overall customer experience. With a strong emphasis on security and compliance, Thena is built to scale alongside businesses, providing continuous support and insights to enhance customer interactions over time.

The platform supports integration with corporate systems like ERP and CRM, allowing the agents to handle complex tasks while following specific company guidelines. With features like emotional and conscious behavior, Newo's agents aim to provide human-like interactions. It offers a fast deployment process, making it easy to scale operations with digital employees.

name: Pincites
one_liner: AI contract review for busy legal teams
description:
Pincites reduces the time sales and legal teams spend on contract negotiation while achieving better, more consistent results.

Pincites ensures guidance is available where and when it's needed. Using the latest large language models, Pincites allows legal teams to build contract playbooks that any internal team can apply consistently within Microsoft Word using our Word add-in.
An AI-powered onboarding flow that turns existing contracts into playbooks. Simply upload your template, add guidance, and begin redlining. Unlike previous legal tech, manual tagging or model training is unnecessary because Pincites tags clauses based on their semantic meaning.

Their AI solution surfaces relevant guidance for all teams to quickly review and negotiate contracts using their companies' approved terms. Non-legal teams can securely process contracts, while freeing up legal teams to focus on more critical matters.
Flags key risks for review. Pincites highlights deviations from your standard language and missing clauses in your contracts. They compare each clause to your standard language, providing insights on variations and associated risk levels. They offer guidance for each variation, ensuring you can align on the right language and conveniently access relevant guidance as you work.

one_liner: Reducto converts unstructured documents into structured, AI-ready data.
description: Reducto is a software company that provides AI-driven document parsing and extraction solutions. The primary function of Reducto is to convert complex, unstructured documents into structured, AI-ready inputs. This is achieved through advanced vision models that mimic human understanding, developed by a team from MIT. Reducto addresses the challenge of processing unstructured data, such as medical records and financial statements, which is a critical bottleneck in AI workflows. The software reads documents with high accuracy, capturing layout, structure, and meaning, and uses Agentic OCR to review and correct outputs in real-time. This ensures near-perfect results, even in edge cases. Reducto's solutions support the processing of sensitive documents, ensuring precision and compliance in production environments. The platform offers features like intelligent chunking, figure summarization, and graph extraction, enhancing data processing efficiency and effectiveness for enterprises.

name: PreAct Technologies
one_liner: PreAct Technologies offers software-definable flash LiDAR sensors and AI-driven perception platforms, enabling real-time situational awareness for autonomous systems in complex environments
description:
Founded in 2018 and headquartered in Portland, Oregon, PreAct Technologies specializes in near-field, software-definable flash LiDAR sensors designed for real-time perception in dynamic environments. Their TrueSense™ sensors provide high-resolution data, facilitating applications such as collision avoidance, in-cabin monitoring, and gesture recognition. These sensors are optimized for integration into various platforms, including autonomous vehicles and robotics.

In 2023, PreAct acquired Gestoos, a Barcelona-based AI platform that enables users to create custom computer vision models without extensive coding knowledge. This acquisition expanded PreAct's capabilities in activity monitoring, spatial awareness, and touch-free interfaces, enhancing their offerings for industries like automotive, healthcare, and industrial automation. The combined hardware and software solutions allow for rapid deployment and customization across diverse applications.

PreAct's technology is particularly relevant for defense and public safety sectors, offering solutions that enhance situational awareness and operational efficiency. Their sensors can be integrated into existing systems to provide real-time data for decision-making in critical scenarios. By focusing on affordability and adaptability, PreAct aims to make advanced perception technologies accessible for a wide range of applications. 

Using proven US defense technology and entirely rethinking near-field sensing, PreAct's software leverages ADAS & autonomous vehicle sensors and infrastructure to predict and prepare a vehicle and its occupants for an imminent crash, thereby reducing severe injuries and deaths by up to 86%* and saving the economy $22 billion per year* in the US alone.

PreAct Technologies approach to vehicle safety systems differs from any current offerings. This isn’t collision avoidance. PreAct Technologies solution only has a view of a very close area around a vehicle. Within this zone it identifies, classifies, and reacts to threats in milliseconds. In that very short amount of time, PreAct’s algorithms will determine if there is an imminent collision and precisely where the collision will impact the vehicle. With this foresight, they can help prepare the vehicle and occupants for the collision, before it actually occurs. PreAct Technologies software also enhances the effectiveness and reliability of other ADAS and AV sub-systems.

Owl's cameras combine Thermal Imaging with High Accuracy Ranging – no other solution provides this capability in a single sensor. Up until now the ability to see and measure 3D (X, Y, Z) required the fusion of multiple cameras (generally vision and LiDAR).  No longer.  Known as optical fusion, Owl delivers the purest, most efficient registered data sets possible to downstream AI to unlock safe autonomous operation

name: Kapta Space
one_liner: Develops electronically steerable radar satellites for high-resolution Earth observation and defense applications
description: Founded in 2023 by Milton Perque (formerly of Echodyne) and Adam Bily (formerly of Apple and Astranis), Kapta Space is focused on advancing spaceborne radar technology. The company's core innovation lies in its electronically steerable radar systems, which leverage metasurface-based antennas to provide scalable and cost-effective alternatives to traditional Active Electronically Scanned Arrays (AESAs). These systems are designed to deliver high-resolution Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) and Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) imagery, enabling persistent global surveillance and precise monitoring of infrastructure and land displacement. Kapta Space aims to deploy a constellation of satellites in LEO to support both commercial Earth observation and defense applications, including Moving Target Indication (MTI) and ground target tracking. The company has secured a $1.8 million Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) Phase II contract with the U.S. Department of Defense to further develop its technology. In February 2025, Kapta Space emerged from stealth mode, announcing a $5 million seed funding round led by MetaVC Partners, with participation from Entrada Ventures and Blue Collective, to accelerate on-orbit demonstrations of its radar systems.

They offer complete solutions for autonomous drones, advanced driver-assistant systems (ADAS), autonomous vehicles and industrial sensing – incorporating a combination of mmWave radar, sensor fusion and artificial intelligence (AI).

description:

Most of the plastic waste is being incinerated with a high carbon footprint and a lot of toxic air pollution as a consequence. And a lot of plastic waste ends up in the oceans, killing fish, birds and even ending up in our food chain.

Upp! takes action against plastic pollution. Upp! is currently active in the Netherlands and in Vietnam. We want to close the plastic circle locally. The products we make are designed for circular use so should be re-usable or recyclable. Modular, easy to assemble and disassemble when needed. Durable so re-usable at end-of-use and 100% recyclable so truly circular if needed. Products as a service business models to be developed. Lease or deposit schemes to be applied. And everything together with the customer.

name: SkyTL (powered by Improving Aviation)
one_liner: AI-powered sensor fusion platform for real-time disaster prevention and threat detection across aerial and ground operations.
description:
SkyTL provides a hardware-agnostic software platform that fuses multisensor and vehicle data to generate real-time, actionable intelligence across air, ground, and sea domains. By integrating data from drones, ground systems, vehicles, and third-party sensors, SkyTL delivers a unified situational awareness layer that supports target detection, classification, tracking, and threat mitigation. The platform gives operators a single interface for command and control, regardless of hardware vendor or mission environment.

The system uses modular software components to model natural and man-made threats in real time, enabling high-precision monitoring across large and dynamic areas. SkyTL transforms fragmented sensor inputs into a coherent operational picture that strengthens decision-making for critical missions. Its ability to work with existing hardware and infrastructure removes the need for costly upgrades, making advanced threat intelligence broadly accessible.

SkyTL’s capabilities apply to multiple high-stakes domains. In disaster prevention and mitigation, the platform models environmental risks and identifies emerging hazards to protect communities. For emergency response operations, SkyTL gives teams real-time insight into changing conditions, enabling faster and more coordinated deployments. In transportation and aviation, the system detects drones, ground threats, and anomalies to enhance security around airports and sensitive sites.

By combining data fusion, real-time modeling, and universal command-and-control, SkyTL simplifies complex operations that traditionally require multiple systems and teams. The result is a scalable, mission-ready platform that enhances safety, speeds response times, and improves threat awareness across defense, public safety, disaster management, and critical infrastructure.

Dex provides AI powered solutions to growing businesses to help them optimise their operations and workforce leveraging proprietary IoT Sensors, Indoor Location Intelligence and powerful Analytics. They help businesses move from resources based allocation to on-demand based allocation for better productivity and utilisation of resources.

Their AI based SaaS platform and IoT based trackers, sensor and analytics platform give businesses real-time insights on their operations and workforce productivity, helping them achieve better operational efficiency and reduces unnecessary overhead costs.

12 000 trackers were deployed.
350 companies are customers, including General Electric, Volvo, SFR, Saint Gobain, Chep, Ministère des Armées, Havas, etc. 

Added values for companies: time saving, detection of operational anomalies, reduction of customer disputes, energy savings, recovery of lost assets.

Their SAAS and the associated trackers (IoT GSM, BLE, Sigfox technologies) provide real-time knowledge of the position and activity of each of the assets tracked, and gives access to a suite of analyzes on the use of the assets.

With Lystloc, you can make better-informed business decisions based on real-time data reporting, leading to more strategic planning and increased business proficiencies.

Their software has been developed with advanced technologies, incorporating must-needed characteristics such as scalability, security, and user-friendliness. They strive to provide the most reliable, economical, and versatile employee tracking solutions in the market.

name: NSC(New Silicon Chip)
one_liner: Monolithically integrates compound semiconductors with silicon CMOS to create advanced integrated circuits for extended reality, mobility, and telecommunications.
description:
Our integrated chips are produced by co-opting existing manufacturing equipment and processes in order to deliver them at commercial scale, avoiding the cost and yield issues that come from the advanced packaging techniques currently required for different materials to co-exist at a package level.

This easy-to-apply, efficient and cost-effective marriage between silicon and compound semiconductors will reset the boundaries of innovation and performance across sectors that impact every area of our modern economy and lives - allowing people to interact more vibrantly with the world around them.

Our chips are the first to effectively integrate silicon CMOS with other compound semiconductors monolithically, offering the functionalities needed to enable the next great technological leaps across multiple key sectors.

The nsc Innovation Lab is a playground of creativity and a laboratory for exploration. It's the space where we collaborate, design and physically produce breakthrough integrated solutions to the world's greatest chip challenges - setting in motion the next wave of technological innovation in extended reality, mobility, smart lighting, telecommunications and wearables.

It's also home to our on-going research efforts as we seek to bring together the people and knowledge needed to identify new opportunities to reignite momentum within the silicon industry.

name: Merlin Labs
one_liner: Develops autonomous flight systems for aircraft
description:
Merlin Labs' Travel & Hospitality Partners: Dynamic Aviation, Ameriflight, United States Air Force, FAA, and the New Zealand Aviation Authority

Merlin Labs is building an autonomous infrastructure for the sky above us, enabling goods and eventually people, to fly without pilots. It specializes in the fields of software, transportation, and information technology. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.

Our configurable software is designed to adapt and fit any aircraft—whether it has already flown thousands of miles or is coming straight from the factory. Our proprietary Merlin AI integrates into the existing flight deck to augment current flights, and power future autonomous flights. Our technology works in tandem with national airspace systems and an onboard human safety pilot.

Phase 1: We will work with the the Civil Aviation Authority of New Zealand and U.S. Federal Aviation Administration to certify Merlin Intelligence and integrate into NZ commercial flights.
Phase 2: Crews are reduced on large, commercial cargo aircraft.
Phase 3: Large aircraft fly with reduced crew, and small aircraft fly without crew.

400+ Autonomous missions flown.
800+ Hours in the sky.
5 Models of aircraft powered by Merlin.

name: Daedalean
one_liner: Develops AI-powered situational awareness and autonomous flight control systems for aviation
description:
Daedalean develops safety-critical AI systems for situational awareness and flight control, with the ultimate goal of achieving certified autonomy in the air. Founded in 2016 by Luuk van Dijk and Anna Chernova, the company has offices in Zürich, Switzerland; Riga, Latvia; and Phoenix, Arizona (US). The 150+ member team has expertise in machine learning, robotics, computer vision, path planning, software engineering, certification, safety assessment, and flight testing and includes 15 PhDs and 18 pilots. 

Daedalean's situational awareness suite for General Aviation aircraft uses neural networks for advanced semantical recognition and interpretation of information. 

- Traffic Detection independent of cooperative equipment (XPDR, ADS-B) – an innovative solution that recognizes all possible air hazards from other aircraft to balloons, drones, and birds. 
- Landing Guidance for fixed-wing and rotorcraft, recognizing runways and helipads – a navigation system dissimilar to existing ILS, enabling safe autonomous landing under any circumstances. 
- GNSS-independent Positioning as an additional source of reliable and safe navigation in GPS-denied environments – the system observes the landscape below and reconstructs the position of the aircraft within a global coordinate frame using an onboard map that comprises descriptors of visual features.

Daedalean is working in collaboration with  US-based avionics manufacturer Avidyne to develop PilotEye, the product to become the world’s first certified civil aviation cockpit application with a machine-learning component. Avidyne submitted the STC application for the comprehensive list of aircraft models in December 2021. The certification process goes with the FAA with the concurrent validation by EASA.

one_liner: Cloud-based maintenance management software for asset tracking and work order management

Limble CMMS is a modern, cloud-based maintenance management platform designed to simplify how organizations manage assets, work orders, and maintenance operations. Built for teams frustrated with rigid, outdated CMMS and EAM systems, Limble replaces paper-based processes and spreadsheets with an intuitive, flexible digital solution.

The platform enables organizations to manage both planned and unplanned maintenance through automated work requests, scheduling, and real-time tracking. Users can monitor work history, organize assets, generate reports, and gain visibility into maintenance performance across facilities, helping teams operate more efficiently and reduce downtime.

Limble is designed for fast deployment and ease of use, allowing maintenance teams to get up and running quickly without extensive training or complex configuration. Its mobile-first experience supports technicians in the field while providing managers with centralized oversight and actionable insights.

By streamlining maintenance workflows and eliminating administrative friction, Limble helps organizations improve asset reliability, extend equipment lifespan, and lower operational costs. The platform empowers teams to focus less on managing software and more on keeping critical operations running smoothly.

name: CubeNexus
one_liner: AI-powered 4D platform that unifies spatiotemporal sensor data for real-time analytics and autonomous navigation
description:
Industries like aviation, defense, energy, and telecommunications face critical challenges in managing fragmented spatiotemporal data, leading to costly inefficiencies and errors. CubeNexus solves this with a unique 4D SaaS platform that fuses time and 3D spatial data into a seamless, real-time system. Unlike traditional solutions, the platform’s cube- based, neural-net-like structure provides full context and history for every data point, enabling precise, rapid decision- making. With this solution, CubeNexus delivers unmatched accuracy and scalability, transforming how high-stakes sectors leverage data for effective operations and strategic advantage.

Products
- Converts uploaded CSV or sensor data into TUL format; users query this 4 D cube with an AI agent for trend analysis, pattern recognition and predictive modelling.
- Navigation & Geolocation software prototype: Allows UAVs to navigate without GPS by using “signals of opportunity”. Marketing metrics: 100 % Accurate Geolocation, 70 % Cheaper, 65 % Lower Computational Demand.
- Hardware bundles (Sniffer / Helix / Helix Pro): Packages include edge compute (Raspberry Pi or NVIDIA Jetson), software‑defined radios, antennas, battery, and Pelican case.

BosonQ Psi will be at the forefront of this quantum revolution. We vision to be the premier multiphysics simulation software for quantum computing applications.

name: Aspect Aerospace
one_liner: Builds low-cost single-board satellites that reduce space mission costs from millions to tens of thousands
description:
We are Aspect Aerospace -- an early-stage company that is re-defining access to space. We're a university spinoff, but we own the IP for our technology, and have multiple families of patents applied for. After leveraging $450k in grant money to deploy our technology in space, we were able to demonstrate its capabilities and raise our TRL to 9. We also designed, built, and operated the satellite bus almost entirely from scratch, demonstrating our capabilities in building space-rated end-to-end systems. 

We call our Big Idea the 'single board satellite': all of the components of a complete satellite on a single circuit board. The total cost of a satellite (satellite plus launch) drops from millions to tens of thousands. Picture (literally!) a dorm fridge holding one hundred satellites.

Think about the applications: Qualify new components on orbit in space for a fraction of the cost of testing on the ground. Deploy a mesh network of satellites in response to a denial of service. Dispatch dozens of satellites to monitor a solar storm. Keep spares in orbit. Launch a constellation for a fraction of the cost, in one launch.

We are in customer discovery and so far the response has been incredible! Contact us for the latest on our market entry.

The company addresses contemporary warfare challenges by offering solutions that emphasize speed, adaptability, and cost-effective lethality. Utilizing a unique Defense-as-a-Service (DaaS) model, Tiberius separates research and development from manufacturing, facilitating rapid iteration and scalability. Their flagship offerings include guided munitions, advanced missiles, and autonomous platforms, all engineered for precision and effectiveness. Committed to serving the U.K., U.S., and allied nations, Tiberius ensures military personnel are equipped with essential tools for success in complex operational environments. The company's guiding principles of Strength and Honor drive its mission to continuously innovate and deliver next-generation defense solutions that uphold freedom and security.

name: Quantized Technologies
one_liner: Develops quantum-proof cybersecurity and secure quantum networking solutions to protect data from AI and quantum computing threats
description:
Quantized Technologies Inc. (QTi) is developing a next-generation, quantum-proof cybersecurity solution to protect customer data from being decrypted by threat actors with access to AI and quantum computing resources. Our solution will change the world by enabling unprecedented security in quantum-resilient data exchange, cost-effective user network scaling, interoperability and flexibility to meet customer needs and integrate with existing telecom architectures and solutions, and cloud-based quantum security in the form of Quantum as a Service (QaaS). 

QTi envisions a transformation of digital communication through the development and wide-spread adoption of relevant quantum technologies, giving society quantum-based solutions to real-world problems. QTi's mission is to provide relevant communications technologies to meet societal needs. The second quantum revolution and the rapid development of quantum computation open the doors for society to benefit from the advancement of various quantum communications technologies. 

In addition to securing classical network communications, QTi's solution will also enable secure quantum networks, and eventually a quantum internet, as we develop other key components in a collaborative effort to connect quantum computers around the globe.

Our human-centered technology improves employee performance and efficiency and helps decrease downtime, with the ultimate goal of accelerating the development of a skilled workforce.

We are offering your workers distinctive training that fits their work style with no loss of retention. Hands-on learning with step-by-step walkthroughs are guided by text, audio, video, and augmented reality. Workers will solve problems on time, and on their own.

Transferring your expert’s knowledge onto an iPad provides access to workers both newly recruited and veteran alike. Increasing the hiring pool opens up the opportunity for your workforce to never fall short while developing your frontline’s autonomy and efficiency.

Nobel plans to introduce flex-fuel RDEs that supersonically combust hydrogen, natural gas or methane for the power generation market. The commercialization strategy will entail Nobel integrating RDEs into turbo machinery and then manufacturing self-contained microturbines that disrupt the 200-3500 KW generator markets. With supply reliability deteriorating due to infrastructure underinvestment, penalties for carbon intensity on installed capital equipment, and the decentralization of the grid, this marketplace will continue to see rapid growth and innovation, acting as the ideal entry point for our technology.

name: Aklimate
one_liner: Aklimate is software to help enterprises track and reduce the carbon emissions of their supply chains
description:
A growing number of global corporates have ambitious net zero targets that will be impossible to obtain without engaging their suppliers at scale. Their supply chain typically represents 80% of their overall emissions, and they are only engaging ~2% of them at present, despite having short term (2025 or earlier) targets of +50% of suppliers reporting on their emissions.

They license their platform to corporates to engage their suppliers at scale. They guide these suppliers through measuring a Scopes 1-3 carbon footprint, empowering them to reduce this over time, and automating the process of reporting these emissions to third parties like the Carbon Disclosure Project (CDP).
tags: Climate Change / Enterprise / Software as a Service / SaaS

Curbhub’s collaborative transportation technology leverages integrations with local delivery service providers, crowdsourced delivery platforms, and autonomous delivery fleets to dispatch the right courier for each segment of the delivery route to get to a level of transportation efficiency not achievable with the existing last mile delivery alternatives. Curbhub also offers reverse logistics solutions to enable retailers to implement cost-efficient reusable packaging programs.

name: Patch
one_liner: Patch provides solutions to calculate emission and carbon footprint. It provides API to automate the sustainability goal for the business. It integrates with businesses, calculates their emissions, and compensates their environmental footprint by purchasing verified from carbon removal projects.
description:
Patch is a provider of a negative emissions platform intended to patch the environmental footprint of clients. The company's platform integrates with businesses to calculate their carbon footprint and systematically compensates by funding verified carbon removal projects, enabling businesses of all sizes to automate their sustainability goals with just a few lines of code. Businesses can leverage their API to programmatically calculate their emissions and make any transaction climate positive. 
 
Whether 1 kilogram or 1000 tonnes of carbon-dioxide, Patch helps automate sustainability goals with just a few lines of code. Their API gives developers the opportunity to leverage data already captured to neutralize their carbon impact via a diverse selection of carbon sequestration projects. As a result, businesses can ship climate positive products, whether at an additional opt-in cost to the customer or built-in to their pricing strategy.

Patch works with e-commerce marketplaces, banking & payment companies, and B2B climate tech customers. Using Patch, businesses can either pay for the offsets themselves or pass the choice on to their consumers to help them participate in the carbon offset marketplace.
tags: API / Carbon Capture / Financial Infrastructure / Payment Infrastructure / Sustainability

Bext360 improves the quality of the products supplied, the communities that supply them, and the overall environment for sourcing in developing countries.

Bext360 utilizes machine vision and artificial intelligence (AI) to source high-quality agricultural products directly from the source. They make digital/mobile payments to farmers, communities, banks, and other stakeholders utilizing blockchain payments directly to the stakeholders. The Bext360 system then tracks the goods from the source to the end consumer, allowing the end consumer to interact directly with the communities that provide the goods. Lastly, Bext360 provides a complete RESTful API to allow wholesalers and retailers to embed the technology into their own websites, marketing, point-of-sale systems, and supply chain management tools.

one_liner: Blockchain-based supply chain traceability platform ensuring ethical sourcing and transparency from source to customer

Our MIMOSI Connect platform provides a consistent, 360-degree view of data to assure the conduct of organizations, make transparent the provenance and protocols used in producing materials, securely document, immediately cross-check, track and trace materials, components and products from their source, all the way to the customer.

Since our launch, we’ve given pharmaceutical companies a tool to ensure the highest level of identity and access management while supporting their efforts to make better drugs and protect their intellectual property. 

PAMP's customer app offers a visual supply chain trace for gold that is powered by MIMOSI Connect data. We also completed a successful proof of concept to trace Canadian steel with business incentives for every participating organization.

We further customized MIMOSI Connect to provide food retailers and their customers with the means to track and trace food items all the way back to their source; mapping food from farm to fork. 

In response to the COVID-19 pandemic, we created MIMOSI Health to remove industry fragmentation issues such as handoff delays and opacity, and ensure public health authorities get high quality, actionable data.

We work with organizations ranging from governments and Fortune 10 companies to product traders.

Necessarily, the cost drivers for producing fuel will also change. Factors such as (but not limited to) carbon pricing and cost of renewable will become critically important whereas before they were afterthoughts.
The Altroleum team is building a Digital Exploration and Production Platform that uses deep learning to optimize for and forecast non-traditional cost drivers in fuel production - the key role in the value chain as that of a digital Schlumberger, albeit with an emphasis on decarbonization.
This will enable Altroleum customers to produce the next generation of cleaner fuels at scale (a huge environmental benefit).

description:
FlexiDAO’s software helps corporate energy buyers to (1) automate energy and emissions data collection and reporting and (2) to prove and communicate a real impact in the energy transition to stakeholders.

The software tracks the origin of renewable energy at source in real time It connects directly to the generation plant and matches production data to each consumption point. Sustainability managers can visualize and download energy data and claimed certificates from the plant source. Additionality is ensured by data such as technology type, location age of the plant, hourly CO2 emissions and 24/7 renewable match, and automatic reports with critical KPIs are produced for internal and external sustainability reporting.

This service is delivered through an energy supplier and no operational effort is needed from the energy buyer. REspring® has already been used by Fortune 500 companies all over the world tracking more than 3 TWh of energy per year.

name: TreaTech
one_liner: Reinvents liquid waste disposal by converting sewage sludge into biogas and fertilizers
description:
TreaTech Sàrl is a Swiss-based private company specialized in sewage sludge treatment technology. The company was founded in 2015 by engineers from École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL) aiming to develop a cost-efficient and eco-friendly solution for converting sewage sludge into biogas and fertilizers contributing to a circular economy. Currently, we are a team of 8, mainly chemical and mechanical engineers, with a strong know-how in heterogeneous catalysis, process and energy systems. 

We have developed a ground-breaking treatment technology that will enable an eco-friendly treatment of the ever-increasing quantities of wastewater while recycling, for the first time, 100% of its valuable by-products in a sustainable manner. 

TreaTech technology consists of a catalytic hydrothermal gasification system (HTG) that can convert different types of liquid wastes such as sewage sludge that are typically incinerated or landfilled into added value products including biogas, clean water and fertilizers.

Our HTG unit is a cost-efficient, eco-friendly and on-site solution that can be integrated into the customers’ existing infrastructure and easily customized to match any type of liquid waste disposal.
investors: EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs

name: Uzer
one_liner: Uzer provides local authorities and food and beverage companies with digital solutions to promote waste recycling, helping them to reach their recycling targets.
description:
Uzer provides cities and CPG players with technologies to improve packaging recycling performance through consumer awareness and motivation :

- Eugene mobile app is a plug and play and customizable app, adapted to the visual identity and waste management services provided by cities. With a simple scan of the product’s barcode, Eugene tells users how to recycle the packaging according to local rules, and decrypt the products labels (nutritional facts, additives etc.).

- Eugène smart home device is a scan engine that can be installed above any kitchen bin. It is designed to increase products’ scan frequency by making it more simple and collaborative within the household.

- Eugene smart outdoor device device is a scan engine that can be installed on any street waste container. It allows municipalities to incentivize recycling in the same way that a deposit scheme or a reverse vending machine.
tags: Analytics / Internet of Things / IoT / Recycling / Upcycling / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Sustainability / Waste Reduction / Waste Management / Web App / Mobile App

name: Refiberd
one_liner: Refiberd develops an AI and robotics-based textile recycling system that sorts and recycles unsorted, discarded textiles into new.
description:
Globally, 93 million tons of textiles are discarded each year, but less than 1% of these textiles are recycled into new clothing. Most companies depend on recycled plastic bottles for sustainable textile production, which does nothing to reduce the textile waste problem.

Why? Because all recycling processes need to know exactly what materials are entering their systems to properly treat each material. Since textiles are an inconsistent mix of materials and colors, textile waste has been notoriously difficult to recycle.

Refiberd has developed an AI and robotics-based textile recycling system that sorts and recycles unsorted, discarded textiles into new ones. Their integrated textile recycling system uses:
1) AI and robotics-based systems to sort discarded textiles
2) Patent-pending textile recycling process to recycle the sorted textiles resulting in 100% repurposed thread.
tags: Artificial Intelligence / AI / Industrial Robotics / Robotics / Software as a Service / SaaS / Sustainability

BlockTexx is positioned at the end of the value chain, where raw materials and end-of-use solutions have the highest environmental impact and revenue potential.

description:
Empowering you to Reach a Carbon Balanced Lifestyle: Almond is a free app that empowers you to become carbon balanced by helping you to ‘Buy Better, Act Better and Offset the Rest'.

For users, use our short Carbon Calculator to understand your personal footprint, discover responsible brands in our directory to find the best in class alternatives to unsustainable products & services, and link your bank cards and automatically receive offsetting rewards every time you shop with participating brands. We use 100% of the offsetting rewards you have earned to plant trees and protect rainforest via our charity partners.

For brands, Almond is a groundbreaking solution that helps responsible brands grow their sales and build deeper and more meaningful relationships with their customers. The Almond certification label enables responsible brands to demonstrate their commitment to protecting the environment, consumer health, and building a better society for all.

name: CompPair Technologies
one_liner: Develops self-healing composite materials that enable sustainable, repairable structures for aerospace, automotive, and sports industries.
description:
Composites are widely used in aerospace, automotive, windmill, and sport industries. The global composite market is $83 billion and has grown 40% since 2014. However, a major limitation of composites is their sensitivity to damage; they are brittle by design due to the resin properties. Current repair solutions are costly and time consuming; and recycling is still nowadays almost nonexistent. 

CompPair tackles these composite limitations, and leads a paradigm change for the industry. CompPair's innovation is a structural composite that (i) has an improved crack resistance, (ii) can repeatedly heal small damage, (iii) is compatible with current manufacturing processes and (iv) improves recyclability. The products are smart prepregs (preimpregnated textiles) integrating their chemistry and compatible with existing production lines. They are now focusing on industrialization as well as seeking additional pilot tests in-line with our strategy of market entry (marine and sports industries).
tags: Advanced Materials / Material Science / Textiles / Repair and Servicing / Sustainability / Transportation / Wind

name: PHOENXT
one_liner: Develops patented technology to separate and regenerate mixed-fibre textile waste into recycled raw materials
description:
The world produces 57 million tonnes of fibre every year and 73% of them goes to landfill or incinerators. The reason why it's hard to recycle because most of them are made with mixed fibres, made it hard to biodegrade. 

Hence our vision is to create circular economy eco-system where we can enable waste fibre regeneration, waste fibre tracking, trading and production. Therefore Vivify Textiles (e-commerce waste textile manufacturing) and PHOENXT (waste fibre regeneration) are born to initiate our plan of building the eco-system. We are an award winning company, already profitable and we are self funded and have bootstrapped. We have an invincible team with a strong advisory board. And we have what it takes to be that next topnotch investment opportunity. 

The technology we build is unique and patentable, it takes all these mixed fibre textile waste with polyester and natural fibres, separate the fibre, and recycle them to create the new value from these waste. We will take the polyester to recreate raw material of recycled polyester, and we will turn the natural fibres into high value recycled commodity such as jet fuel, fertiliser or recycled cellulose. We currently already been working with numbers of reputable brands and have already a stable sales pipeline.
tags: Circular Economy / Material Science / Textiles / Recycling / Upcycling / Sustainability / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

They want to become leaders in the generation of value from mining waste.

Their technology is now focused in the recovery of precious metals from mining tailings in the Andean Region.

At Circleback we are planning improve packaging sustainability by making it returnable to Pfand (reverse vending) machines, guaranteeing that it is recycled or re-used, and giving brands access to high-quality PCR material at a predictable price. 
 
We are a new venture. However, we are funded by BEUMER Group, a large German logistics firm and, we are developing our first product in partnership with TOMRA, the world's leading producer of reverse vending machines.

name: Minimum
one_liner: Minimum's software provides environmental data management at scale for large, complex Enterprises — enabling robust reporting and effective decarbonization.
description:
Minimum is the environmental data layer for large enterprises. We centralise environmental data from across the business and its value chain, connect and validate it, and keep it ready for audit and decision-making. The result is always-on compliance and a single source of truth for sustainability.  ￼

Built as a foundational platform, Minimum adapts to each organisation and scales with changing regulations and programmes. It integrates with existing systems to streamline collection, governance, and workflows, so teams can codify sustainability management across the company.  ￼

With Minimum, companies meet mandatory reporting standards year-round; accelerate progress across decarbonisation and other initiatives through high-resolution data and richer insights; reduce cost and boost productivity with simpler processes; and lower audit risk by tracing every data point back to source—giving leaders more control and confidence in the numbers.
tags: Climate Change / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Sustainability
