name: Pledge
one_liner: Climate action platform helping businesses measure, reduce, and offset carbon emissions
description:
Pledge makes it simple for businesses of every size to understand and manage the climate impact of their products. 

By providing single integration tooling and infrastructure, we automate the delivery of climate solutions - such as footprint measurement, reduction and offsetting - into customer journeys. 

We calculate emissions in adherence to the strictest standards
(e.g. GHG, GLEC, ICAO). Our objective is to provide transparency to you and your customers, and derive actionable insights to support your sustainability journey.

Access verified carbon projects & removal technologies on one platform and neutralise unavoidable emissions. Our partner selection is based on the Oxford Principles for Net Zero Aligned Carbon Offsetting. Projects are vetted by independent experts and registries (e.g. Verra, Gold Standard, Climate Action Reserve), and are reviewed by our team.

Share your climate actions with internal and external stakeholders. Pledge follows globally recognised standards allowing you to export insights and data that can be shared with your customers, employees, investors or regulators.

Pledge was founded in 2021 by early employees of Revolut and the co-founder of Freetrade.
tags: Big Data / Carbon Capture / Data Analysis / Data Enrichment / Internet of Things / IoT

name: Carbon Calories
one_liner: Carbon Calories makes carbon accounting and reporting, easy and affordable for brands.
description:
Carbon Calories has built and builds solutions for carbon accounting and reporting, made available via SaaS. We make carbon accounting easy and affordable for small businesses. Our reporting framework is a first-of-its-kind, being both consumer-centric and cross-comparable. We will transform how companies around the world prepare and report product carbon footprint results to their customers.

It currently costs around $10,000 to $20,000 per product to prepare a product carbon footprint assessment. Assessing most products in the world (assuming 1 billion products, as there are 500 million on Amazon) would cost $10 trillion at the lower rate. That's 10%+ of global GDP. That's why businesses aren't performing carbon accounting. And that's why regulation can't make them. They literally can't afford it. Carbon Calories can deliver robust, reliable PCFs for less than $500 per product. We will transform the world of consumer-centric carbon accounting and reporting, and with that, keep companies accountable and consumers informed.
tags: Accounting / Bookkeeping / Data Analytics / Data Mining / Software as a Service / SaaS / Supply Chain Optimization

name: Sweep
one_liner: Software to reduce carbon emissions in your business and value chain
description:
Sweep's Travel & Hospitality Customers: Swoopin

Sweep is an SaaS-based platform to reduce carbon emissions in business and value chain of big corporations. Sweep's platform helps to organize and measure the carbon footprint of a company. It also provides dashboards to track and visualize the carbon footprint of the company tasks. Sweep is a hierarchical database, capable of handling data gathering and workflows at any scale.

Sweep's product can be divided in 4: 

1. Organise: adjust your carbon programme to your company and value-chain, not the other way around
2. Collect and measure data
3. Reduce: suggestions of actions and initiatives
4. Reporting and communication: simulations and dashboards

Sweep works with large tech and telcom companies, such as Orange and Ubisoft, so is comfortable on focusing on specific use cases and measure carbon footprint of numerical activities and digitals ads.

Problem To Be Solved: Carbon footprint measurement

Solution: Sweep provides dashboards to track and visualize the carbon footprint of the company tasks. Sweep is a hierarchical database, capable of handling data gathering and workflows at any scale.

name: Minviro
one_liner: A deeper level to sustainable mining.
description:
Whether you work in mining, minerals processing, or the refining stage and look to understand your environmental impacts, Minviro can help. Minviro assesses your performance through life cycle assessment (LCA) to help quantify and reduce impacts for your project.

Minviro is using Life Cycle Assessment to quantify the environmental impacts of production, identifying environmental ‘hotspots’, and offering solutions for impact mitigation.

Simply put, Minviro makes you better informed to minimize the impact of your project.

name: GreenArc
one_liner: Impact analytics platform helping financial institutions and governments quantify the social and environmental impact of lending portfolios
description:
GreenArc is an impact analytics firm funded by Franklin Templeton that helps financial institutions and governments quantify the impact of lending and economic development programs. The solution impactGINI, offers customised impact measurement and reporting aligned to globally recognised standards including UN sustainable development goals and has received a number of industry accolades including UN SDG Aligned Tech Crunch Extreme Tech challenge, Tokyo Metropolitan government’s sustainable finance grant, Asian Development Bank’s financial inclusion challenge etc. 
Some select engagements include: US Development Finance Corporation’s social impact bond program in SE Asia, New Mexico Economic Development Department’s SSBCI program and Mitsubishi UFJ bank’s agri financing platform.

We strive to become the leading force in safely, efficiently and economically decarbonizing haulage in surface mining with a fully vertically integrated offering.

Together with industry support we already have built a real life size 240ton payload POC vehicle ready for demonstrations.

Behault group of companies develops automation technologies to reduce emissions, increase safety and gain on efficiency.

one_liner: Einride provides autonomous and all-electric freight transportation.
description: Intelligent movement is the new, sustainable way to move goods – changing transportation at its core. The company's unmanned transportation vehicles are safe, cost-efficient and emission-free, enabling clients to reduce transportation costs along with creating a cleaner environment. Einride partners with forward looking, transport-intensive companies to facilitate their transition to a sustainable transportation system. Rethinking road transport from scratch, Einride’s solution is based on autonomous, all-electric vehicles, coordinated by an intelligent routing software, that integrates customer data, traffic data, etc. to optimize delivery time, battery life and energy consumption — making the journey from A to B as efficient as possible.

name: Breathe Battery Technologies
one_liner: Develops battery management software that enhances performance and longevity for electric vehicles and consumer electronics
description:
Breathe Battery Technologies is a spin-out from Imperial College London that creates battery management software that enhances battery performance, longevity, and safety for the automotive and consumer electronics markets.

Breathe Battery's product Lincc is the first battery management software to bring battery physics and battery models that traditionally can only be run on powerful workstations or desktop computing environments to the low-power, low-cost microcontrollers in electric vehicles and consumer electronics. The software improves battery capacity by 5% and allows for twice more uses in the battery’s lifetime, without requiring any costly or time-consuming hardware changes.
tags: Automotive / Connected Car / Battery / Battery Materials / Battery Membrane / Distributed Energy / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Optimization / Energy Storage / Energy Trading / Grid Storage / Energy Grid / Renewable Energy / Solid State Battery / Transportation

name: H2 Green Steel
one_liner: Produces fossil-free steel using hydrogen and renewable energy to eliminate CO2 emissions from steel manufacturing
description:
Steel production accounts for 25 percent of Europe’s industrial CO2 emissions, which is more than the Nordics’ total CO2 emissions, or more than all flights departing from the EU. Decarbonization is a must for the industry and disruptive technology will be a key enabler. H2 Green Steel is committed to accelerating change in the industry by eliminating virtually almost all CO2 emissions from the steel making process.

H2 Green Steel's first project is a greenfield steel plant in Boden that will be fully integrated, digitalized, and automated. By bringing together raw materials, renewable energy, leading expertise, and artificial intelligence, H2 Green Steel aims to bring emissions down to zero. That’s why they are planning to build the first large-scale production site for fossil-free steel in collaboration with customers across multiple segments including automotive, commercial vehicle, white goods, furniture, and industrial equipment. Together, they will achieve their dual mission of creating fossil-free high-quality steel near term.

name: Seabound
one_liner: Builds carbon capture equipment for cargo ships
description: Seabound builds carbon capture equipment for large cargo ships. They're the only way for shipowners to reduce up to 95% of their CO2 emissions from existing ships and comply with new global regulation.

name: AirCarbon Exchange
one_liner: Blockchain commodities  exchange for carbon markets
description:
AirCarbon is a Singapore-based Commodities Exchange which is regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) and built on a blockchain architecture based on Ethereum and ERC20 & ERC721 tokens.  The Exchange is a platform for the distribution and trading of carbon mitigating investment opportunities and carbon credits generated by those carbon mitigating projects.

AirCarbon also operates an investment fund (the AirCarbon Fund) which provides development capital to carbon sequestration projects as well as liquidity to the carbon markets.  The fund is designed to reduce atmospheric carbon through CORSIA and ICAO certified and verified projects like reforestation, methane capture, and carbon emissions reduction.  The fund also generates carbon credits for airlines to offset their own emissions.

The founders have deep experience in the carbon markets, the commodities industry , and blockchain space as well as extensive contacts in the world of Singapore business and government.
tags: Air Quality / Aircraft Technology / Blockchain / Financial Technology

name: Yayzy
one_liner: Fintech app to automatically track, reduce and offset personal carbon footprints
description: YAYZY is a fintech platform that makes it easy to live a sustainable lifestyle. The YAYZY app helps you understand your carbon footprint and get guidance to reduce and offset it effortlessly. Use YAYZY to calculate your carbon footprint automatically, understand what your carbon footprint means, keep track of the impact of your purchases, become carbon neutral with offsets, get tips to reduce your impact, and discover eco-friendly retailers.

one_liner: Joro is an app to track and improve carbon footprints.
description:
1) Automatically track your carbon footprint by connecting your credit card
2) Discover impactful actions to improve your score and achieve your carbon goals
3) Buy carbon offsets for flights or subscribe to go carbon neutral 
4) Connect with others to multiply your impact and take collective action

name: Nori
one_liner: API-first carbon removal marketplace helping businesses and their customers achieve carbon neutrality through regenerative agriculture.
description:
Nori is a carbon removal marketplace that provides a simple, verifiable, and credible way for your organization to become carbon neutral or carbon negative.  What’s more, is you can move beyond organizational emissions targets by directly engaging your CUSTOMERS in the positive environmental narrative. With Nori's API for carbon removal, your customers can select to pay for carbon removal to negate the impacts of the product or service they are paying for, whether it’s shipping, manufacturing, or operation.  Currently, Nori sources carbon removal by supporting farmers adopting regenerative agriculture projects that are sequestering CO2 from the atmosphere. In the future, Nori will enable various methods of carbon removal.

Nori is looking for partners to pilot this API in fintech, e-commerce, and travel apps. 
Nori is also open to partnerships with organizations maintaining agricultural supply-chains that are adopting regenerative farming practices.
tags: AgTech / Agtech / Agriculture / Carbon Capture / Customer Engagement / Social Impact / Sustainability

name: Wren
one_liner: Helps users live carbon neutral by accounting for and offsetting CO2 emissions
description:
Wren is a web app that makes it easy to offset your carbon footprint. Our mission is to build tools that help everyone act against climate change. We're starting with a subscription service that offsets your footprint because it's a simple and direct way to take action against climate change.

Starting with a subscription service has the added advantage of funding our future work. Climate change is an urgent problem that we need to address immediately, which means putting 100% of our minds to it. We believe the most effective way we can build a team to tackle this problem is to build a sustainable business.
tags: Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Sustainability

name: Waro
one_liner: At Waro we help companies in the consumers goods industry calculate the environmental impact of their products rigorously and autonomously, identify eco-design levers and communicate their results.
description:
In the consumer goods industry, companies are facing higher than ever pressure from consumers regarding environmental transparency as well as upcoming regulations (eco-labelling in France and in Europe).
That's why at Waro, we help companies in the textile and furnishing industry to measure, reduce and communicate the environmental impact of their products in autonomy and on their entire product catalog.

Concretely, Waro is a SaaS platform that allows companies to perform Life-Cycle Analysis (LCA) internally. We focus on two main aspects to make it fast and simple: automation to connect to internal product management systems and collaboration with suppliers to ensure traceability. 

Once the results are calculated, it is possible to use them in three ways. First, by communicating the impact of their products through visuals on their websites or labels for in-store products. Then by identifying eco-design levers to reduce their products' impact. And finally, by aggregating environmental data on different brands or collections, to have access to quantified data for their CSR policies and reports.
investors: None at this point (we are planning a pre-seed round in June 2022)

name: ClimateTrade
one_liner: ClimateTrade is a climate-tech company that offers innovative solutions for companies and individuals seeking to decarbonize and make a positive impact on the planet through carbon offsetting and sustainable initiatives.
description:
ClimateTrade is a climate-tech company that utilizes blockchain technology to facilitate large-scale decarbonization efforts through innovative solutions. 
Our climate marketplace enables companies and individuals to direct purchases high-quality carbon, plastic, and biodiversity offsets, as well as renewable energy certificates, from verified project developers. 

Our B2B2C plug-and-play tools, including the API and Whitelabel, enable seamless integration into clients' ecosystems, allowing for automatic carbon footprint calculation and offsetting capabilities to offer carbon-neutral products and services. This specialized service is tailored to industries such as airlines, hotels, and transportation & mobility, enabling them to seamlessly integrate carbon offsetting into their commercial transactions, thereby offering carbon-neutral products and services.

We are pioneers in digital certification for carbon mitigation projects and actively support the digitization of national carbon registries, revolutionizing carbon accounting and management practices.
tags: API / B2B / B2B2C / B2C / Blockchain / Carbon Capture / Climate Change / Compensation / Benefits / E-Commerce Logistics / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Optimization / Marketplace / Sustainability

name: CupClub
one_liner: Returnable packaging service for drinks eliminating single-use plastic waste
description:
CupClub™ — a returnable packaging service designed to hold both hot and cold drinks. CupClub™ offers a tailored end-to-end service helping to reduce single-use plastic packaging by up to 47%. Not only does CupClub™ make it easy to do the right thing, but the product itself is a step-up from disposable cups - CupClub™'s service uses only half the CO2e of disposbles and ceramics (including PE lined, sytrofoam and compostable PLA).

All of CupClub™’s products are manufactured in the UK, resulting in the smallest possible carbon footprint. Every time they pick up the used units, they schedule drop-off of fresh cups at the same time – each trip is coordinated to be as eco-friendly as possible. Even the process of washing the cups is optimised to ensure the minimum amount of water is used to clean the maximum amount of units.

CupClub™ partners with businesses to make drinks-on-the-go more sustainable; working together towards the ultimate goal of eliminating single-use plastics.

name: Ecovia
one_liner: India’s first Packaging-as-a-service company that helps e-commerce players switch to reusable, returnable packaging.
description:
We have launched our full-stack solution in India, which includes our reusable packaging, infrastructure for reverse logistics and a rewards program. We supply reusable packaging to brands on a pay-per-use basis, and then use various mechanisms to collect the empty packages back from consumers by incentivising them with rewards. 

Our packaging is made out of fabric made from recycled PET bottles, is very durable and water-repellent. Our smart design makes the packaging size-adjustable and collapsible, to help brands optimise their shipping volumes and costs. This is not just cost-effective and sustainable for brands, but also helps them deliver a more engaging and rewarding customer experience. We take pride in the fact that for every reusable Ecovia bag, the need to manufacture and dispose of 150 single-use packaging is eliminated.

Considering that India oberves around 6 million e-commerce shipments daily, our circular model could prove to be the game-changer in terms of environmental impact.

We ultimately aim to evolve into an enabler, assisting brands implement any kind of take-back program. Brands (online or offline) could use our platform to collect their primary or secondary packaging back from the consumers for EPR compliances, either for reuse or recycle.
tags: B2B / B2B2C / Circular Economy / Female Founder / Packaging / Packaging Design / Social Impact / Sustainability / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

name: barePack
one_liner: barePack replaces the millions of single-use packaging used for takeaway through an app-enabled returnable container ecosystem.
description:
Who said you couldn't change the world with every forkful? 
At barePack, we know that the takeaway culture is here to stay, but that the millions of single-use items used every day absolutely should not! And so we have a solution! We aim to make every takeaway zero-waste with our service to safeguard our oceans and planet while satisfying appetites worldwide. Sounds amazing right?
We partner with cafes and restaurants to whom we deliver returnable containers for their takeaway orders, for those customers who wish to forego disposables. The service is free for F&B businesses, and just SG$3 /month for customers, who eventually refund their expenses via many of the discounts available when they use the service or even take a container to re-use at other cafes offering discounts for BYO. 
barePack also offers corporate solutions and office collection to make the service even more convenient and drive sustainability from within the workplace.

RETURNR is an environmental initiative that aims to replace single use takeaway packaging with equivalent reusable solutions. We are managed and shared through the existing cafe network, minimising waste and resources.

Shared use, less resources, less waste.

one_liner: Reusable Packaging-as-a-Service
description:
Start the Packaging Revolution! We are offering smart & reusable To-Go Packaging-as-a-Service to gastronomy clients & consumers.

In Germany the consumption of take-away, convenience and delivery food & drinks is responsible for about 281 kilotons of single-use packaging waste for immediate consumption and is growing at double digit rates. Most of the time, To-Go food containers, snack boxes or coffee cups have a very short life-span of only 30 minutes after which they are tossed into trash (or litter parks, beaches & the ocean). This is not only a giant waste of economic resources as each single use costs between 15 and up to 0,60€ for a stable bowl/box with a lid. It is a horrendous waste of environmental resources (wood, water, crude oil, metals & energy) that are used to produce this packaging. Therefore, a single use packaging not weighing more than 30 grams can easily come with an ecological backpack of more than 8 kilograms when taking into account all the resources used in prod

We aim to create a sustainable and circular economy for the future.

Shared use, fewer resources, less waste.

Your logo will be on a reusable product in the hands of everyone, showing you care about the environment. Say goodbye to having your brand associated with single-use plastics!

We believe we can end single-use packaging in our lifetime, together. We build technology-enabled systems that support returnable packaging. From Mobile Washing systems, tracking technology for packaging and robotic local manufacturing. We are well equipt to tackle single-use waste and build a global returnable packaging solution.

name: Refillable
one_liner: Zero-waste grocery platform for home care products using reusable RFID-tracked packaging and IoT-enabled refill stations
description:
Recube is a social enterprise that aims to change the way we consume things. Refillable is its 2nd brand which helps FMCG brands become zero waste and consumers to make conscious decisions. It aims to become a zero-waste grocery platform. It tackles the single-use waste issue with its reusable packaging system, enabling anyone to buy in bulk—providing cost savings to customers and reducing plastic waste. Our system includes three key components: reusable containers with radio-frequency identification (RFID) chips to facilitate payment; Internet of Things (IoT)-connected vending machines to dispense products in bulk; and electric tricycles to deliver product refills.
 
This system literally transfers value onto the packaging, so customers are incentivized to take care of it. Our distribution system enables brands to digitally verify how much plastic is offset by reuse. When customers need new products, they simply place an order online to avail at home refill. They get a chance to refill their old packaging itself.

- Customizable to any shape, size and surface finish
- Stronger than concrete pound for pound
- Better thermal insulator than fiberglass
- Limitless sustainable supply​
- Fire resistant, water proof, 100% compostable, odorless, mold resistant, non-toxic​
 
In order to address global climate change, the European Union, 25 other countries and over 100 US cities will ban non recyclable packaging materials, including polystyrene Styrofoam by 2025.
 
Our mission is to eliminate non recyclable plastics from the environment by developing mushroom based packaging material. For more information visit our website or send us a message.

name: GOATOTE
one_liner: GOATOTE creates an omnichannel reusable bag system providing access to clean reusable bags no matter where, when or how you shop.
description:
GOATOTE was innovated by Co-founders and majority owners Renee and Chad Lundahl. An innovation sparked by a single-use plastic bag ban in Santa Monica, CA in 2011. The bag ban shed light on what we believed would hinder the long-term sustainability of the initiative like always forgetting your reusable bags or shoppers never washing their reusable bags. In return, we ended up with GOATOTE.

GOATOTE creates an omnichannel reusable bag system providing access to clean reusable bags no matter where, when or how you shop. Through digital and physical integrations GOATOTE kiosks provide access to reusable shopping and produce bags. 

GOATOTE has Intellectual Property for a reusable bag system and methods 

GOATOTE went to market on July 28th, 2020 at Valley Natural Foods Co-op in Burnsville, MN  

GOATOTE is currently a finalist in the Beyond the Bag Challenge a consortium between Target, Walmart, Kroger, Walgreens, CVS, Hy-Vee, Dicks Sporting Goods and Meijer with winners announced January 25th, 2021. 

Confirming the future of a reuse model in retail, the Beyond the Bag Challenge and COVID-19 thrust our concept forward. We are now looking for partnerships to advance our business model and market position.

name: Ocean Bottle
one_liner: Reusable bottle company that funds ocean plastic collection and supports waste picker livelihoods in coastal communities.
description:
We connect individuals to a global impact on stopping ocean plastic and enable them to be part of it with the world’s most needed reusable bottle.

Ocean Bottle makes consumer products that save our oceans. With the sale of every product we fund collection equivalent to 1000 plastic bottles and stop this from ever entering the ocean, whilst developing recycling infrastructure in coastal communities around the world. Plastic collectors exchange plastic waste for money or credit via blockchain technology to spend on tuition, tech, goods, health care or access to microfinance. 

REMINDER OF THE ISSUE WE’RE UP AGAINST 
Ocean Plastic is expected to double by 2030. 75%+ of ocean plastic is from regions with high levels of mismanaged plastic waste. We have an opportunity to stop ocean plastic at the source and create social mobility for millions.

MISSION 
Enabling anyone that gives a damn about this planet the opportunity to turn the tap of ocean plastic with a reusable bottle that invests people-powered waste management.
tags: Circular Economy / Recycling / Upcycling / Social Impact

one_liner: Algramo aims to establish a wholesale relationship with manufacturers of consumer products.
description:
Their business model is focused on a  distribution channel of basic needs products in bulk. Revolving around retail sale through dispenser machines in returnable packaging they aim at reducing prices, responding to the problem of lack of liquidity in low-income families that cannot buy higher volume formats, combating poverty tax and further reducing the environmental packaging impact.

Algramo aims to establish a wholesale relationship with manufacturers of consumer products such as detergents, rice and oil, amongst others, in order to buy the products in bulk, saving packaging costs significantly without lowering the quality of the product . Thus, bulk suppliers are able to distribute products in stores in large quantities, whilst reducing logistics costs.

name: AYA Cup
one_liner: Reusable cup solutions for restaurants, music festivals & events
description:
This is the beginning of an infinite story:

We chose the name AYA because in the Vietnamese alphabet, “A” is the first letter and “Y” is the last letter.

Therefore, A-Y-A is symbolic of a first-last-first cycle representative of 1 product with many lives.

Our goal to eliminate 1 million plastic cups by the end of 2019 and educate the world about Vietnam as an innovative country in solving the single-use plastic issue that is affecting the entire planet.

To learn more about AYA and our mission to decrease plastic waste, check out our blog.

Join us in saving the planet – 1 cup at a time!

name: Boxes
one_liner: We have developed a smart retail platform that offers brands and retailers a solution to customer engagement, data capture and sustainability.
description:
We are a cutting-edge technology startup focused on creating interactive devices that effortlessly connect customers with their favorite products and brands, providing personalized and immersive shopping and sampling experiences. 
At the core of our approach is the integration of engaging, gamified solutions and dynamic surveys into our devices. This strategy not only improves brand awareness but also captures vital consumer insights and assesses purchasing intentions.

By nurturing a relationship between brands and consumers, we sample and market their products, enhance customer engagement, optimize data collection, and facilitate the distribution of digital discount coupons. Our main goal is to simplify the process of connecting customers with brands, enabling them to try products they might love while capturing valuable first-party data from customers. Here you can see one of our devices:  https://youtu.be/xgWE0t-i53Y

We are also developing a second use case—a refilling device that fosters a circular economy by enabling customers to refill CPG products. This innovation reduces environmental impact and decreases costs for both retailers and consumers, empowering brands and retailers to provide basic needs products in a smart, affordable, and eco-friendly way, with zero waste.

We empower and enable corporate organizations, colleges, campuses, and other communities to go zero waste. We provide our partners with proprietary technology and custom designed stainless steel to-go cups and bowls for users to check-out. Our mission is to reduce waste and revolutionize consumption by providing safe, sustainable, and convenient alternatives to everyday single-use products. 

USEFULL provides a circular solution for returnable to-go cups and containers enabling cafes and restaurants to save money (and waste!!) from single use cups and containers. The USEFULL solution extends beyond retail locations to college and corporate campuses.

name: Sonke
one_liner: Designs and manufactures automated refill stations for fast-moving consumer goods to eliminate single-use plastics and reduce packaging costs.
description:
“Sonke” is a Zulu word meaning “All of Us”. Sonke is an African start-up which was founded to give all people economic incentive to make environmentally friendly choices. Sonke designs, manufactures and manages automated refill stations for fast-moving consumer goods. (Dishwashing Liquid, Fabric softener etc.)

Sonke gives consumers a price incentive to refill packaging, instead of purchasing packaged goods. This saving is achieved by;
1) Eliminating single use plastic packaging.
2) Improving logistics & manufacturing efficiency by only handling bulk product.

Current re-use models are disproportionately aimed at high income shoppers, who comprise a tiny proportion of the total South African population. Sonke aims to democratize sustainable re-use solutions in South Africa, to have a real impact across the income spectrum. Sonke refill technology was designed for FMCG, however, recently the business has started exploring how re-fill models could add value in different industries;
1) Automotive, Marine & Aviation
2) Mining
3) Hospitality 

Current Situation
Achieved product-market fit with 6 machines in trade. (4 more machines launching in June 2021)
In talks with large FMCG companies, retailers and Lubricant distributors to expand offering.
Rebranding of business and products

one_liner: YOUR SUPERMARKET AT HOME WITH NO PLASTICS
description: Re-pot market is the first supermarket of the circular economy in Spain. We offer our customers the usual products without environmental impact through reusable packaging. The customer only has to enjoy the products requested and we take care of giving a new life to the used packaging. Quick and easy!

name: Bagboard
one_liner: A people-owned, sustainable advertising platform and marketplace that enables people to earn from and spend on sustainable brands they love.
description:
Bagboard is a new people-owned sustainable advertising platform and marketplace that enables people to earn from and spend on brands they love. Our solution replaces billions of single-use plastic bags with eco-friendly, reusable ‘mobile billboards’. Just by reusing our bags, consumers can earn our new digital advertising currency which can be spent back on the products in our app. This redirects ad revenues into people’s pockets in a way that changes advertising - for good. This is a disruptive game-changer in the supply of information that prioritises the true source of economic power: the consumer. 

We have signed up 2,000+ independent stores in central London to distribute our bags at scale, have over 6,000 consumers on our waiting list and over 30 brands who have signed financial agreements for upcoming campaigns. Our first-of-its-kind tech creates a never before seen way to measure impressions on moveable objects, which enables us to unlock the millions of previously untapped impressions these bags generate. 

 Since inception, we’ve received significant recognition with funding from Sky Ocean Ventures, established a global supply chain, received multiple industry awards and widespread press coverage including a recent piece in Forbes.
tags: Advertising / Adtech / Direct-to-Consumer / Location Marketing / Marketing / Martech / Programmatic Advertising / Sustainability

name: Circulayo
one_liner: We defeat waste with an intelligent workflow platform for reusable packaging.
description:
Circulayo is on a mission to scale reusable packaging, by making it the most convenient and desirable form of packaging for business and consumer. Our intelligent workflow platform - Flow - provides the tools and infrastructure to achieve scalable, friction-free use of reusable packaging.

We partner with key stakeholders in a cities waste management infrastructure - bin providers, waste collection services, material recovery facilities - to digitalise the system using our IoT devices. This digitalised infrastructure enables full-loop visibility, traceability, and measurability of reusable packaging, even when it is not disposed of in the correct way.

What makes our platform truly special is that after you've signed up, it's 100% automated. Platform users simply fill out a few details (packaging requirements, average daily/weekly order volume etc), set some rules (minimum in-store stock level etc), and then sit back and relax as Flow automates the reverse-logistics for you. Using machine learning, our platform maximises financial and environmental efficiency, by resupplying your stores with the minimum number of individual items required to service the maximum number of orders.
tags: Active Packaging / Aggregators / Analytics / API / Automation / B2B / Big Data / Blockchain / Circular Economy / Data Aggregation / Data Analysis / Data Analytics / Data Mining / Digital Twin / Machine Learning / ML / Workflow Automation

one_liner: Our software enables companies to launch, manage, and transform into a subscription business.
description:
It's time to shift from linear to a contactless circular economy!
The world is shifting to a circular type of business model. That's why we built technology to enable subscription bundles

Prepare and launch subscription bundles:
Bundle services and products into one monthly payment. Package various products together and launch subscription plans the next month.

Manage packages and iterate on monthly plans:
Quickly price and package your offerings. With Fairown you can add new products or scale to other markets within the same set-up.

Arrange renewals cycle and upsell offerings:
Encourage environmentally friendly behavior and increased customers' satisfaction through perfect timing for replacement and upgrade offerings.

name: FUELSAVE
one_liner: Patented efficiency enhancement and emission reduction solution for combustion engines and other sectors related to the cleanfuel transition towards NET zero.
description:
FUELSAVE GmbH is an awarded energy efficiency and cleantech company from Germany that focuses on providing innovations in energy efficiency enhancements and emissions reduction in various segments, with a patent portfolio in 11 fields and patent families around it.  FUELSAVE GmbH has been funded by the EU as TOP SME in Europe, first german company to ever achieve that. FS MARINE+ is the first solution being commercialized, patented, field and lab proven as cost savings & emission reduction for combustion engines with current & future cleanfuels through dynamic injections of hydrogen, oxygen, water & methanol applicable for combustion engines (not limited to maritime). 

FS H2GEN+ for efficient hydrogen production with alkaline and PEM stacks , FS ENGINE+ the worlds most efficient pneumatic engine as turbine replacement for various applications including energy recuperation from gas networks and gas transmissions, as well as turbine replacements with an isochor efficiency validated with TÜV of over 95%, outperforming any other engine in this field by 60-140% which can also be used for long term energy storage with AA-CAES at lower CAPEX and lower TCO. FS Heat2Power+ is transforming efficiently waste heat into usable electricity to reduce OPEX and emissions.
investors: EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs
tags: Biofuel / Cleantech / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Optimization / Energy Storage / Fuel Efficiency / Maritime

name: EVERLESS
one_liner: Develops smart reusable shopping bags to replace single-use plastics
description:
We consume over 1 trillion plastic bags a year globally. Our mission is to help end this. This is why we created the first smart alternative to single-use bags: The GYRE SmartBag. The SmartBag is a design gadget with a revolutionary new technology. It folds in one single motion to the size of a credit card, so you always easily carry it with you in your pocket or purse. 

The casing of the bag is highly customizable. So it's a unique new way for brands to brand their impact, while they impact their brand. A regular shopping bag is viewed an average 40 times. Since our bag can be used at least 100 times, visibility can reach over 4000 times. 

Later this year we will be adding IOT tech to the bag, which will enable mobile payment, loyalty programs and direct impact possibilities.

name: Instream Water
one_liner: Builds smart water refill stations providing affordable filtered, chilled, and sparkling water to reduce single-use plastic waste.
description:
InStream Water is revolutionizing the bottled water industry by providing consumers with an environmentally friendly alternative to traditional bottled water. We are building a network of smart, connected water bottle refill stations across the country that will dispense ambient, chilled, and sparkling water into a reusable water bottle for 1, 2, or 3 cents per ounce using a patent-pending closed-loop NFC payment system. By using a reusable water bottle, we hope to make a big impact on the number of single use plastic water bottles discarded in the United States every year.

Our connected apps and cloud database allow customers to create an account, load funds, store preferences for water type and amount for automated dispensing at the refill station, and track water consumption and bottles saved. We filter our source water at the refill station for chemical and biological contaminants and also track and monitor the performance of each unit in real time.
tags: Beverage / Internet of Things / IoT / Plastics & Paper / Water / Water Treatment

name: GoodBag
one_liner: Smart reusable shopping bags that reward environmental protection and provide retailers with customer analytics
description:
goodbag is a corporate social responsibility program that lets customers plant trees and access exclusive rewards every time they shop with their own smart shopping bag.

goodbag creates a unique customer experience that shows the users real-time feedback on their positive impact and rewards them for their actions. At the same time goodbag is a brand new way for retailers to interact with customers, get valuable data on the shopping behaviour and lets them protect the environment together with them.

name: PathWater
one_liner: Reusable aluminum water bottles filled with purified water, priced to compete with single-use plastic.
description:
We are changing consumer behavior by offering a way to combine the convenience of great water with the sustainability of a reusable container. We are competitively priced and resonate deeply with consumers. This, combined with a passionate and capable team is the formula to change the world. 

Our model is a hybrid between water brands (Smartwater) and bottle brands (Hydroflask). We fill our bottles using modern filtration to make great tasting, purified water. The beauty of our water is that we can make it anywhere in the world - no secret springs, gimmicks, or marketing ploys. 

Today the average user of PathWater refills 5 times before recycling. Based on the current refill rate, PathWater makes a direct impact by reducing the plastic bottle waste stream by over 80%. On a global scale, that's well over 200 Billion plastic bottles per year. Aluminum is 100% recyclable and maintains its properties indefinitely while all recycled plastics are not truly recyclable.

name: Fresh Bowl
one_liner: FRESH.BOWL is a tech-enabled sharing platform that uses closed-loop goods to build direct relationships with consumers.
description:
FRESH.BOWL is a tech-enabled sharing platform that uses closed-loop goods to build direct relationships with consumers.

Through our network of automated zero-waste kiosks/stands, consumers can purchase and return reusable items. To prove our concept, we are disrupting the $143B ready-made-meals market with delicious, made-from-scratch food packaged in reusable containers, which we collect, clean, and reuse after they’re returned.

Next, we will introduce other shareable items (umbrellas, reusable totes…) and consumer products. Our mission is to place our kiosks/stands in store-within-a-store retail, office buildings, transit hubs, college campuses, and retail centers to create an infrastructure that enables the world’s first closed-loop sharing company. ​​​​We already have committed deals with large partners including Aramark, Compass Group, Westfield, the MTA, and RXR.

name: Muuse
one_liner: Muuse is the future of multiple use. Think 'Uber' for all to-go packaging.
description:
Muuse is as much a global movement as we are a company. Through our data-driven platform, our thoughtfully designed togo containers, cups, and bottles, and a growing network of cafes, universities, corporate offices, airports, and large scale events, we are pioneering sustainable reuse models to eliminate single-use packaging. With unique QR codes on each reusable, our system tracks each item’s impact and usability, as it circulates around cities. We are actively scaling our pilots in San Francisco, Singapore, Hong Kong, and Toronto and have ambitious expansion plans in the year ahead.  We are working with most of the largest brands in packaging to design and plan for a more sustainable future.

For Customers:
- Free reusable takeaway
- Exclusive discounts
- Convenient borrow and return points

For Cafés
- Track impact data
- Receive a fully-managed service & support

For Corporates
- Meet your sustainability goals
- Gain user insights
- Collect impact data
- Explore turnkey solutions
tags: B2B2C / Packaging / Packaging Design / Smart Packaging / Social Media / Software / Sustainability

name: RECUP
one_liner: RECUP is the Germany-wide deposit system for coffee-to-go reusable cups.
description:
Around 2.8 billion disposable cups are used for coffee-to-go in Germany alone and thrown away after a single use - 320,000 cups per hour . The deposit system for coffee-to-go cups avoids disposable waste and conserves resources.

THAT'S HOW IT'S DONE:
1. Order coffee-to-go in the RECUP instead of in the disposable cup, deposit 1 € deposit.
2. Enjoy coffee on the go.
3. Return empty cups to all RECUP partners throughout Germany and get a deposit back.

Price advantage: If you order your coffee in the RECUP, you will receive a price reduction at many RECUP outlets. 
Sustainable: drinking coffee and doing good for the environment? Help make the mountain of disposable cup waste disappear gradually. 
Coffee enjoyment: The high-quality RECUP brings your coffee with all its aromas to its best advantage: Optimized cup design, stability and longevity, food safety and taste neutrality are good for you and your coffee.
tags: Active Packaging / Packaging / Packaging Design / Sustainability

name: The Better Packaging Co.
one_liner: World's leading provider of home compostable packaging for eCommerce logistics including courier satchels, padded mailers, and labels.
description:
After working with couriers and eCommerce for years, we became aware, and frankly horrified, at the amount of plastic waste the industry was generating. We believe in a new economy - a circular economy in which generating waste is not an option and the earth’s resources are not treated as infinite.

We now develop the world’s most sustainable packaging solutions that consider the complete lifecycle impact of a product from raw material sourcing, right through to end-of-life disposal. 

Our range of re-evolutionary products have environmental benefits and, let’s face it, shortcomings. Rest assured, we are still looking for the perfect solution, but in the meantime, what we’ve found is WAY better!

After launching in 2018 with our now infamous 'real dirt bags' - home compostable courier satchels - our range has expanded to include compostable garment bags, labels, tape, padded mailers, pallet wrap, magazine wrap, reusable courier satchels and more.
tags: Circular Economy / Packaging / Packaging Design / Sustainability

name: Ecoffee Cup
one_liner: Ecoffee Cup is a new generation of reusable to-go cup.
description:
Ecoffee Cup is the natural reusable. Made from natural fiber (corn stalk and bamboo), corn starch and proprietary plant-based resin, it is light, bright and beautiful to drink from, with no plastic after-taste.

The Cup, lid and sleeve are dishwasher safe and should last for years if treated nicely. They are also BPA, BPS and phthalate-free and contain no animal or animal-derived materials. The lid and sleeve are made with matte, food-grade silicone which is latex-free and designed especially for hot liquids. It has a resealable ‘no-drip’ lid, making it perfect to take with you everywhere you go.

Ecoffee Cup is available in five sizes and a wide range of contemporary patterns, classic prints and bright, vibrant colours; there’s an Ecoffee Cup to suit everyone's style, wardrobe or mood. Maybe that's why Oprah chose it as one of her Favorite Things for Christmas 2019, making the an ideal gift for your workplace, family and/or friends.

At DiFOLD we’re in the business of eliminating single-use packaging. Featuring a proprietary collapsible design technology, DiFOLD offers a new generation of space-saving, foldable, reusable containers and packaging. 

DiFOLD's flagship product is the Origami Bottle - the most compact, stable and sustainable reusable bottle ever created. After an extremely successful crowdfunding campaign and raising over $180K, the product is entering into serial production. The first 6.000 pre-ordered bottles will be delivered to the Kickstarter & IndieGoGo backers by January 2021. 

With the Origami Bottle, DiFOLD is setting the stage for other collapsible reusable products, as the design technology can be applied far beyond bottles. The bigger mission to impact the packaging space by replacing disposable consumer packaging with more convenient and easy-to-adopt, reusable-foldable packaging and containers.

one_liner: Recycling platform that rewards citizens for sorting plastic bottles through localized collection networks
description:
Citizens recycle their bottles through bags provided by yoyo coaches in their cities, and receive reward points for each collected bag. With these rewards they can purchase sport experiences among others (gym membership, classes)

In January 2017, the first Coach, Toufik Sadoun signed up and off we went! Others soon followed suit. Today, we are proud to act on a daily basis in 6 major French cities (plus 5 others in the pipeline).

We are convinced that it is possible to reach the objective of 100% recycled material by 2025 . Provided that we take the problem head on and invent innovative solutions to optimize collection in cities. Above all, we believe that those who take care of their neighborhood deserve to be rewarded.

It is the small streams that make the big rivers!

name: Plast'if
one_liner: Builds machines that recycle plastic waste and 3D print new objects from that waste
description:
Plast’if has developed an offer that helps companies reach their zero waste ambition. In order to do so, the team helps their clients create a roadmap to quantify, reduce and replace plastic by other non-plastic alternatives. 

One of the tools used is the Zero.W machine, a machine that recycles plastic waste (PET, PP, PS, HDPE, LDPE) and 3D prints new products directly from that waste. The machine quantifies the plastic and recycles it locally. In parallels, the team slowly replaces the plastic by other eco-friendly alternatives. 

The promise ? 5 years to transform our clients. After 5 years, no more Plast’if and no more plastic in the office space.

name: Poliloop
one_liner: We make non-biodegradable plastics microbially biodegrade and then turn the byproducts into bioplastics and biogas
description: We developed a microbial cocktail that degrades, metabolises and mineralizes fossil based plastics. Our process is applicable to all sorts of single-use plastics (PET, PP, LDPE, HDPE, PS, CPE, EVA -all tested) and can operate under suboptimal conditions.  we have tested these plastics separately and mixed in together as well. The listed plastics are post-consumer waste plastics: colored, clear, sterilized and plastics with food debris on them. This method not only solves the plastic issue but also generates valuable end-products: bioplastics and biogas. With these, our aim is to create a circular, thus more sustainable economy. The process itself can be described as follows: we take a blend of hydrocarbon based plastics, put them in a batch with the bacteria, our minimal essential media and water. Afterwards in about two days we can macroscopically confirm the beginning of the degradation process. Complete degradation of the polymers will take about two months.
tags: Biogas / Bioplastics / Biotechnology / Circular Economy / Microbiome / Oil & Gas / Plastics & Paper / Renewable Energy / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

name: Giotto
one_liner: Circular rental platform for office and home office furniture
description:
Giotto is a furniture subscription service which allows companies to rent furniture and equipment for their offices or remote employees, just for the time they need it, for a monthly fee, sustainably. 

We deliver and install the furniture at the customer site for free and we give them the possibility to swap the items, buy them out or return them. 

All the rental payments go towards the buyout of the furniture giving to the customers the possibility to buy the items during the rental or to keep them when they have paid them entirely. 

The furniture is carefully selected through specific design criteria and quality standards to optimize logistics and refurbishment in order to match a rental business model and promote sustainable consumption. 

All the furniture is indeed:
-1. flat pack
-2. easy to assemble
-3. easy to disassemble
-4. include the availability of spare parts
-5. are produced with high quality natural or upcycled materials
-6. are produced by Europeans suppliers 
-7. have a timeless design. 

When customers return the furniture we refurbish it and give it multiple lives.
tags: B2B / Circular Economy / Design / E-Commerce / Employee Engagement / Benefits / Employee Wellness / Furniture / Future of Work / Productivity / Employee Management / Sharing Economy / Subscription / Sustainability

name: HERU
one_liner: Turns everyday household waste including coffee cups, nappies, and plastics into energy to fuel your boiler
description:
The HERU is a world-first global solution that literally gives the end user the power of generating hot water for home from everyday items that previously had little option but to discard as waste. 

The patented, micro-scale Home Energy Resources Unit (HERU) is designed to fit seamlessly into the curtilage of  domestic property, changing the life course of most items and materials in your home. It provides a method to keep most household items as a resource by using them to power your boiler, moving you away from a linear approach to consumerism (buy, use, dispose), into a circular one, whereby ‘wastes’ never become. Imagine buying an item, bringing it home, putting the item into use and using the packaging it was wrapped up in to energise your home. The HERU enables users to utilize 100% of most products you buy, without the need to discard anything.

Tortoise is developing the software layer that enables teleoperations and autonomy for low speed (less than 5mph) vehicles. With minimal hardware changes, Tortoise’s solution enables any small connected vehicle to safely move around its environment with simple software integration. Their solution is key to boosting adoption and revenue from shared micromobility vehicles, and is poised to change how operators manage connected vehicles in the last mile delivery and construction sectors.

Our robots are equipped with sensors in order to intelligently reacts its surroundings. Delivers AI Robots uses sidewalks and bicycle roads and drives at pedestrian speed which is 6 - 7 km/h. Our robots are equipped with cameras, and radar sensors to detect and avoid obstacles, pedestrian and traffic. Also, they are  fully autonomous, yet under human monitoring and supervision. Our four wheel driving chassis enable climbing and agile movement, while carrying 15kg equivalent to 4 delivery bags. 
With Delivers AI, benefiting every aspect will result in adoption spiral in terms of Restaurants & Dark Kitchens for utilizing resources, consumers for receiving orders on time, online food order platforms to decrease delivery charges and optimize their logistics, and environment with less carbon emission. FreeWire’s products enable the scalable deployment of ultrafast electric vehicle charging – in a fraction of the time and cost it would take for conventional charging solutions. name: HEVO Power
one_liner: Develops wireless charging infrastructure for electric vehicles
description:
The HEVO Power Network (HPN) consists of the HEVO Power Station (HPS), which is mounted to the pavement or embedded like a manhole cover to deliver up to 10kW of power. Installed along the chassis of the vehicle, the driver can visually align the HEVO Vehicle Receiver (HVR) with the HPS via the HEVO Mobile App. Once optimally aligned, the HVR and HPS form a “handshake” that initiates the process of wireless power transfer.

Seamlessly synced via the cloud, the app provides communication between the hardware components and serves as the sole interface with the end user. As the driver approaches within 25 feet of their selected Power Station, the App automatically displays visual directions to assist the driver with locating the station and vehicle alignment. This feature can also be interfaced with autonomous driving technology. Charging is as simple as a tap of a button. Remotely start and stop charging anytime, anywhere, while accessing real-time charging data like state-of-charge via the Journey App. The Journey App informs you when the charging process is complete. Easily use the app to wireless pay your bill, monitor your receipts and evaluate your charging statistics on the fly.
tags: Commercial / Distributed Energy / Driver Safety / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Optimization / Energy Storage / Energy Trading / Fast Charging / Wireless Charging / Grid Storage / Energy Grid / Hardware / Payments / Mobile Payments / Renewable Energy / Sustainability / Web App / Mobile App

EV drivers enjoy free charging, supported by sponsorship and advertising revenue. Volta's head-turning charging stations are in high demand by advertisers and sponsors, making for a quick payback and high ROI. Volta is the only company in this industry that has built a commercially viable (dare we note 'lucrative') business model providing free EV charging. It owns design patents for its charging station and networking technology.

ElectricFish builds containerized, battery-backed DC Fast Chargers that readily integrate with grid-constrained site hosts for market-leading permitting and installation speeds, cost-effective energy management, and local grid resiliency for supporting their business continuity. 


Their patented product’s dual ability to provide fast charging and grid resiliency at the same location has significant traction at Commercial Sites with Public Access, and they have $1M in executed and planned pilots with IBEW Local 58, National Park Service, Kia Motors, and an undisclosed energy infrastructure developer.

name: Xeal
one_liner: Smart EV charging infrastructure and software platform for property owners to reduce costs and generate passive revenue
description:
Xeal provides affordable chargers, cloud-software management, and effortless installation of electric vehicle chargers. This allows to keep electric bills low and to customize charging access, while reducing CO2 emissions and creating a new passive revenue stream.

At the most basic level, we are an EV driver app to make charging as frictionless and reliable as possible, but we wanted to be more than that. Drivers only switch to electric when chargers are readily available, which means buildings are the leading force for change. We re-engineered every variable of the EV charger equation to make chargers a no-brainer investment for buildings.

Our goal is turning a complex industry into simple, affordable value. We innovate at the intersection of proptech, energy, and mobility to make it easy for buildings to progressively become more intelligent, rather than force an 'All or nothing' mindset. Our software technology integrates across systems to effortlessly help buildings become 100% renewable and self-sufficient.

one_liner: On-demand workforce platform for EV charging station repair and maintenance
description:
Today there are about 100,000 public electric vehicle (EV) charge stations in the U.S., by 2030 McKinsey estimates that 13 million public EV charge stations will need to be deployed. Today 25-30% of deployed public EV charge stations do not work and 80% of the issues experienced are actually non-electrical software and/or communication issues. 

Currently, EV charge station network providers subcontract to electrical contractors at $175 per hour with a 3-hour minimum to validate and troubleshoot non electrical issues. The average resolution time for a down station is about 15-30 days across network providers. 

The ChargerHelp! app enables a community's local workforce to easily validate, troubleshoot, or escalate a software or communication issue of a networked EV charge station within hours instead of weeks. ChargerHelp! aims to utilize technology to drive workforce realignment or development in the new green economy.

name: Veloce Energy
one_liner: Develops modular distributed energy storage and grid infrastructure to accelerate electrification and EV charging deployment.
description:
The existing utility grid is old, inflexible, and expensive to upgrade. Upgrade design and implementation cycles are long relative to other construction. This situation is aggravated as more electrification is required. The distribution grid must be upgraded to allow broad electrification, but traditional methods are too slow and expensive, and do not address increased weather, cyber, and physical threats. 
Veloce Energy creates modular, flexible, intelligent, compact distributed energy storage (VPort), overhead power and communications systems (FastConnect), and intelligent project automation and site control products (ARGOS) to enable the electrification by removing the physical and financial barriers to increased grid power supply. Their systems reduce cost and time for deployment, and reduces OPEX, while supporting broader use cases. The systems also can be deployed in multiple markets including EV charging stations (all uses), C&I and solar storage, and non-wires alternative utility grid upgrades.
The system eliminates most of the digging and the modular design allows digitization and cost reduction throughout site selection, engineering, permitting and construction. The systems are easily expandable after installation, and are removeable / redeployable.

name: Volterio (FKA. NRG-X Charging Systems)
one_liner: Automatic Robotic Charging for EVs
description:
Together with leading automotive OEMs, VOLTERIO is developing an automatic connection device for electric vehicles. VOLTERIO is a smart, fully automatic and affordable high power charging solution. The system does not require precise parking and can be easily integrated/retrofitted to almost every electric vehicle architecture because of the small packaging size as well as the low complexity of the onboard unit. The system comprises an onboard and offboard unit:
 • Vehicle Unit - Onboard unit in the car’s underbody
 • Ground Unit - Offboard charging robot

Charging via a physical connection to the vehicle’s underbody is not only the most logical approach, but also enables the simplest possible robotic for an automatic connection. Due to the revolutionary self-centering, high power 360°-connector design, the angular orientation of the parking electric vehicle does not matter. Unlike inductive charging, whereas the vehicle must be positioned very precisely, the charging robot can handle large parking misalignments 0,4 x 0,4 m. The VOLTERIO ground unit starts automatically to communicate with the electric vehicle's onboard unit via a secure WLAN connection when approaching. The electric vehicle must not be parked precisely over the ground unit.

name: Bonnet
one_liner: One app and subscription for EV drivers to access thousands of public charging networks
description:
By bringing all available options and locations together under one roof, or app as it were, Bonnet provides users with real-time data of what’s available and where. Bonnet makes an application that gives drivers access to all public charging networks. It is a marketplace that brings together Charge Point Owners (CPOs) on one side and EV drivers on the other. The beauty of the app is that it takes constant data directly from the charge point hardware itself – so it will never direct drivers to a charging point unless it's working and available.

For drivers, they offer a single subscription/month and access to all networks without paying any extra fees. For CPOs, they seamlessly integrate in parallel with their already existing platform and clients. The CPOs benefit from extra client influx, without giving up anything they already have. In addition, Bonnet offers upfront payments for electricity to CPOs based on what the customers are expected to use on their network. This provides a guaranteed source of income for CPOs, which is hugely beneficial as newly set-up charge points have an associated risk to do with usage. For Bonnet, this upfront payment makes it possible to pay for electricity in bulk, at cheaper rates, providing cheaper prices to their customers.

name: EVchip Energy
one_liner: Develops intelligent battery management systems for electric vehicles using proprietary chip technology to dynamically control individual cells
description:
EVchip is an Israeli based company offering the world's first system to dynamically control the architecture and usage of individual cells within a battery pack.

EVchip delivers a system solution based on a chip and algorithm that monitors and controls a battery pack while in charging, discharging and resting conditions. The technology makes use of proprietary integrated circuits (IC’s) combined with algorithmic management software that intelligently applies EVchip’s concepts of SmartLoad™ and DynamicPower™.

Products: 
SmartLoad™ by EVchip enhances battery longevity and efficiency in electric vehicles by intelligently managing each battery cell's charging and discharging through a proprietary 3D switching grid. This technology allows for precise monitoring and control of each cell's health and charge status, automatically disconnecting cells at their charge or thermal limits without affecting the entire module. This process optimizes energy use, extends battery life, and provides accurate battery health data, minimizing unnecessary energy reserves and improving the reliability of the battery's 'fuel gauge.'

DynamicPower™ by EVchip enhances electric vehicle battery performance by dynamically adjusting its 3D switching grid architecture to suit varying demands, ensuring low internal resistance and high current delivery for heavy load applications. This innovation eliminates the need for large inverters by allowing the battery to generate both AC and DC waveforms directly, offering significant benefits to automotive, industrial, and domestic battery markets by reducing the reliance on bulky and costly inverters.

name: StoreH Technologies
one_liner: Develops patented hydrogen-on-demand energy storage systems using recyclable zinc powder for grid stability and renewable energy applications
description:
Hydrogen On Demand (HOD) is a patented energy storage system in which two separated electrochemical reactions are used to:
i) produce metallic zinc powder when excess energy is available.
ii) extract hydrogen and electricity from the zinc powder when energy is required. 

Energy is stored in the form of metallic zinc which is stored in a tank. This allows long term energy storage for stationary applications in domestic, industrial and grid stability applications, enabling seasonal storage, 100% self consumption and 100% renewable grids. When the HOD system works in combination with a fuel cell in a micro cogeneration configuration, it can provide electricity and heat in a 100% sustainable and clean way with 0 emissions.

The solution substitutes Lithium Ion batteries storage, but it is up to 90% cheaper, highly scalable (the storage capacity just depends on the volume of the tank storing zinc powder), fully recyclable, and does not use any critical raw materials.
tags: Distributed Energy / Energy Storage / Grid Storage / Energy Grid / Renewable Energy
