name: Aeris Technologies
one_liner: Develops portable laser-based gas analyzers with parts-per-billion sensitivity for real-time industrial and environmental monitoring
description:
Aeris has redefined the state of the art in laser-based gas analysis with its new MIRA Gas Analysis Platform. Aeris offers real-time gas analysis at the 1ppb sensitivity and accuracy level, at 1/10th the size and weight and a fraction of the cost of competing gas analyzers. Aeris gas analysis systems enable new applications in existing and emerging markets.

Aeris Technologies relies on: 

- A portfolio of patented revolutionary multipass cells featuring long pathlength, extremely low volume, and inexpensive manufacturing,
- State-of-the-art custom electronics with industry leading low noise and low power consumption, and
- The know-how of multiple decades of experience in laser spectroscopy and high performance instrument design.

By combining those assets with solid state laser sources, the MIRA series analyzers achieve sub-ppb sensitivity and ppb level accuracy in an ultraportable, low power consumption package. MIRA’s single board computer efficiently controls all critical analyzer functions, with industry-lowest power consumption. The proprietary sensor engine used in every MIRA analyzer uniquely achieves a long absorption path length in an extremely small volume, providing ultra-high sensitivity and a fast response time with reduced pumping requirements.

On Data, Clarity AI has built a large database of environmental and social impact data (more than 29k publicly traded companies, 198 countries, 187 local governments, 200k+ funds, 1,000+ metrics, millions of data points), by aggregating and cleaning structured and unstructured data, and complementing it with estimated data to fill in the gaps. 

Driven by in-house research and data science capabilities, Clarity AI provides various societal and environmental impact / sustainability modules seamlessly integrated into our tech platform (ESG Risk, ESG Impact, UN SDGs, Climate, Impact of products and services). Additionally, their software tool also allows score/rating customization and reporting based on investors´ methodologies and social impact preferences.   

Their unique tech capacity enables seamless sustainability analysis and reporting of investment portfolios and allows us to respond to market needs and new regulatory developments with agility and rigour, developing tailored-made tools (e.g. TCFD & EU Taxonomy).

name: GHGSat
one_liner: Operates satellites to monitor and quantify greenhouse gas emissions from industrial facilities
description:
GHGSat is the global leader in high-resolution remote-sensing of greenhouse gas from space an approach it pioneered – and provides unique emissions data and intelligence to businesses, governments, regulators, and investors worldwide, to optimize their performance and uphold environmental standards.

GHGSat was founded in 2011 following the realization that the overall attitude on climate change was at a turning point. In launching its first satellite in 2016, GHGSat pioneered the monitoring of greenhouse gases at a resolution sufficient to attribute emissions directly to individual facilities. To this day, no other commercial entity nor any national space agency has this capability.

Producing the best quality data is only half of what they do. Making it useful is equally as important. Using proprietary AI and machine learning algorithms, they combine information from their own satellite and airborne sensors with data from other sources to develop innovative GHG intelligence solutions.

name: Persefoni
one_liner: The intelligent carbon footprint management & reporting platform.
description:
Persefoni is currently the only enterprise software platform purpose-built for organizations and financial institutions to enable the automation of the calculation, management, and reporting of carbon footprint data. The cloud platform is able to ingest data from thousands of potential data sources, complete the required carbon calculations instantaneously, and provide results for disclosure and reporting purposes. This ultimately reduces or eliminates the manual processes traditionally required to source and clean data from numerous places, create carbon calculations in spreadsheets, and aggregate results across working groups for reporting. 

The Persefoni platform follows the Greenhouse Gas Protocol (GHGP) and Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials (PCAF) standards for carbon accounting calculations. Because the platform follows the GHGP and PCAF, calculation results can be used for all major sustainability reporting frameworks to include TCFD, SASB, and CDP and is 100% auditable by assurance providers. Organizations using the Persefoni platform experience a more efficient and cost-effective verification process when seeking third party assurance on their emissions data due to everything being organized, transparent, and instantaneous in the Persefoni platform.

name: Heliogen
one_liner: Heliogen is a clean energy company focused on eliminating the need for fossil fuels in all sectors of the economy.
description:
Heliogen’s mission is to create the world’s first technology that can commercially replace fossil fuels in industrial processes with carbon-free, ultra-high temperature heat from the sun and to transform sunlight into fuels, including hydrogen, at scale. Heliogen was created at Idealab, the leading technology incubator.

Heliogen has three main solutions: 
- HelioHeat™: Carbon-free, ultra-high temperature heat to power heavy industrial processes including the making of cement, steel, and petrochemicals.
- HelioPower™: Power made from sunlight using supercritical CO2 turbines to power industrial facilities, data centers, and mining operations.
- HelioFuel™: Clean fuels like green hydrogen that can be used to power industry and as fuel in transportation, heavy equipment, and household heating.

The advanced computer vision software unique to Heliogen’s breakthrough technology precisely aligns an array of mirrors to reflect sunlight to a target on the top of a Sunlight Refinery™ tower, delivering high-temperature, carbon-free thermal energy.
The baseline system will provide industrial-grade heat capable of replacing fossil fuels in industrial processes including the production of cement, steel, and petrochemicals.

Crusoe Energy Systems provides oil and gas companies with a fast, low cost and simple solution to natural gas flaring. As the energy industry struggles with pipeline constraints and increasing regulations around flaring and combusting, Crusoe is here to help. name: Watershed Climate
one_liner: Enterprise platform for carbon accounting and climate program management
description:
Watershed is working to accelerate the fight against climate change. Preventing catastrophic climate change requires businesses to rapidly decarbonize across every sector of the economy. Watershed builds software to enable this: their tools help businesses measure, reduce, remove, and report their climate impact, all in one place.

Watershed helps businesses measure in days, not months. Customers upload raw data from the tools they already use, and Watershed handles the rest. Watershed shows where every kilogram of carbon comes from, helps analyze Scope 3 emissions with granular data on specific suppliers, and benchmarks against your industry identifying high-emitting vendors and categories.

Watershed's data is aligned with the GHG Protocol, the gold standard for carbon accounting. The platform also handles carbon reporting for key disclosure obligations like CD. Watershed recommends steps to reduce carbon, specific to every business. Watershed helps model scenarios and forecast future emissions, design a carbon removal portfolio to get to zero and make a financial plan for your climate program.

Today more than ever, people demand seamless, secure experiences, whether they’re crossing borders, making a purchase, accessing e-government services or logging into corporate networks. Entrust offers an unmatched breadth of digital security and credential issuance solutions at the very heart of all these interactions. It provides identity-based security software and services in the areas of public key infrastructure (PKI), multi-factor authentication, Secure Socket Layer certificates, fraud detection, digital certificates and mobile authentication.

It offers EarthCoating, a mineralized coating alternative to plastic barrier coatings for paperboards to provide barrier properties to moisture, oil, grease, and fatty acids.  Plastic coated paperboards applications such as paper cups, and takeout trays are typically not recyclable.  Applications with EarthCoating  typically have 50% reductions in plastic content, and are fully compatible to conventional paper recycling systems, with certifications by the recycling industry.  The company’s EarthCoating is used in various types of paperboard packaging applications, including paper cups, folding cartons, pouches, bags, sacks, liners, and more. one_liner: Develops water-soluble, edible plant-based packaging materials as sustainable alternatives to plastic
description: Decomer Technology is developing a fast water-soluble and edible packaging material and products thereof. Our material is plant-based, hypoallergenic and can be tuned to dissolve in hot and cold water. By default, the material is transparent, tasteless and odorless, but we can add flavours, colours and labelling. It can be used in the fields on food industry, agriculture, pharmaceuticals, detergents, food supplements etc.The material can be used both as an alternative to existing plastic materials as well as for developing novel products.

name: MicroRio
one_liner: Produces affordable biodegradable plastics from methane using novel production technology to replace petroleum-based plastics
description: MicroRio plans to transform the $654 Billion (2020) plastics industry and its downstream markets using a game changing production technology for Polyhydroxyalkanoate (PHA), the biodegradable plastic that is widely substitutable for all petroleum plastic markets, from industrial uses to consumer goods and clothing.  MicroRio is assembling a new approach to high volume production that is capable of significantly lower costs, allowing PHA to reach lower pricing, wider substitution, and more significant impact on the plastic pollution problem. MicroRio’s process uses methane, a renewable feedstock that does not compete with food and arable land use and will build on IP licensed from Stanford along with additional others and novel MicroRIo engineering.  With strategies that are fit to integrate with industry, supply chain, and brand customers, PHA would be price and property competitive to the conventional plastics it would replace.

name: Bruvi
one_liner: Bruvi is your next generation, patent-protected, single-serve coffee system that delivers noticeably tastier coffee with its sustainable, eco-friendly Bru-Pods.
description:
Bruvi is an LA-based DTC tech start-up founded by Sung Oh (inventor, former engineer/patent attorney) and Mel Elias (former CEO of Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf and current Director of Sassoon Group) that has developed a patent-protected single-serve coffee system that delivers noticeably tastier brewed coffee with our eco-friendly Bru-Pods (100% recyclable and landfill degradable) that are packed with 40% more sustainable premium coffee. We exist to re-imagine & innovate single-serve coffee and to meaningfully enhance this daily beverage ritual for everyone. We are committed to bringing the coffee house experience home by delivering hotter, stronger, smoother coffee in the convenience of an affordable eco-friendly capsule system.

Our short-term goal is to become the #3 player in the single-serve coffee industry which is a potentially $15 billion market just in the US.  Most importantly, we have all the right pieces in place to execute on this realistic goal in a short period of time.

We achieve this by leveraging AI to unlock a new understanding of discarded resources that we call waste intelligence. Waste intelligence provides unprecedented visibility at recovery and recycling facilities across the globe, enabling data-driven decisions to improve recycling efficiency and recover more waste materials more sustainably. Our customers span the entire waste value chain.

name: Polytag Limited
one_liner: AI-powered marking and identification platform for tracking products through the circular economy
description: Polytag is a patent pending marking and identification solution designed primarily for the FMCG sector. It utilises a combination of cloud based, machine vision and AI Technology - CirculAI Cloud - this allows retailers and brands to collect specific and composite data from each individual product, which can then be collated and analysed. Data collection from CirculAI enables greater compliance and conformity with the Circular Economy and carbon reduction goals. It also allows participants the ability to recapture their own material rheology and colour for onward recycling into new products. CirculAI Cloud can also be potentially integrated into existing and upcoming technologies within the recycling infrastructure e.g. DRS, whilst also enhanced home recycling collection services and consumer engagement through a rewards program.

name: Empower
one_liner: Empower is delivering digital plastic waste deposit systems, a solution to the plastic waste problem by giving plastic a value and incentivising cost-efficient collection and segregation at source..
description:
Empower is creating a solution to the plastic waste problem by giving plastic a value.  By introducing an easily deployable digital deposit system, where plastic waste collection and recycling is incentivised, they are cleaning up the world while fighting poverty by providing a wage to those in need. 

The digital deposit systems provides financial incentives to crowdsource collection and segregation at source, vastly lovering the costs of collection and recycling of plastic waste while also contributing to higher quality materials. Empower has piloted its system in 16 countries across Europe, SE Asia and Africa and has permanent collection points in 7 countries where plastic waste is collected and brought to recycling. 

Through Empowers system it is possible to source socially collected plastic waste and track its journey through the value chain, from collection to recycled products. It is a fully digital, scalable & easy to deploy system that can be a core part of any supply chain.
tags: Asset Tracking / Blockchain / Circular Economy / Cleantech / Social Impact / Sustainability / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

name: SmartBlock Beverages
one_liner: Circular economy platform rewarding pro-environmental behaviors through a gamified mobile app and blockchain-based incentives.
description:
SmartBlock Beverages was founded in August 2019 in UAE to develop blockchain solutions for a better world. 
We have launched ZeLoop that aims at the reduction of littering by rewarding consumers for doing pro-environmental gestures with a first focus on the growing issue of plastic littering.

Our system is universal, it directs consumers to registered crowd-sourced points of collection (three-way bins, reverse vending machines, bottle containers) managed by third parties 
We want to drive the flow towards deposit points and avoid leakage to nature.
ZeLoop solution is composed of a mobile phone application focusing on plastic bottles. It is designed to provide interaction between consumers and stakeholders of the plastic bottle circular economy; municipalities, recycling companies, retailers, and brand owners. 
The application is built on our in-house blockchain reward engine that serves as a platform where other eco-friendly applications rewarding citizens can be connected in a suite of solutions for sustainability and environment protection. 
There are in-game challenges that provides space for brands and companies to invest their CSR budget in consumers or employee’s engagement program
The application has been released worldwide less than one year ago.

description: Plastic recovery and packaging compliance platform. 500+ consumer brand customers.

one_liner: Smart waste management platform.
description:
Urbyn is a young clean tech developing a smart waste management platform.

Our mission is to help companies reduce their landfill waste by matching them with the best up-cycling and recycling solutions.

To do that we have built a network of 400+ haulers and recycling companies and a waste management software.
Our solution allows our client to increase their recycling rate by 20%, decrease their waste cost by 20% and improve waste traceability.
tags: Cleantech / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Sustainability / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

name: Topolytics
one_liner: Data aggregation and analytics to make the world's waste visible, verifiable and valuable.
description:
Topolytics, based in Edinburgh, is one of the world’s leading ‘waste tech’ companies and is seen as a significant disruptor in the global waste market.  The company uses machine learning, analytics and mapping to generate a high-quality granular view on the generation, movement and fate of the world’s commercial and industrial waste.  Topolytics has developed a waste data analytics platform called WasteMap® that is used by waste producers, waste processors, investors and regulators to generate better environmental and commercial outcomes for the material. 

WasteMap® is currently being used as the basis for a prototype digital waste regulation system for the UK.  Working with the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (DEFRA) and the UK waste regulators, Topolytics is applying its data driven approach to ingesting, managing, analysing and reporting on the 500 million waste movements across and out of the UK each year.  Also, in 2019, Topolytics was picked by Google Cloud and SAP, from 250 companies world-wide, as the commercial technology that can enable the circular economy at scale.  Topolytics is acknowledge by Cleantech Group, IDC and SAP as a leading AI and analytics player in the €2Bn ‘waste tech’ sector.

name: Greenback
one_liner: Turns post-consumer plastic waste into certified food-grade packaging materials using advanced recycling technologies and blockchain-based traceability
description:
We are solving a global problem by creating an ethical, predictable, and liquid market for certified recycled plastic that’s safe to use in food-grade packaging

Greenback is creating a solution for post-consumer waste plastic which supports the United Nations’ Sustainable Development Goals. We are implementing an efficient, scalable and distributed process that offers consumers a better product while providing full transparency and traceability. We support local economies to help them extract untapped value from waste. In developing countries, we create fairly-rewarded, safe jobs and new income streams for thousands of waste pickers.

We are building a decentralised network of recycling plants near the sources of plastic waste, which we buy from local collectors. We use the infrastructure already in place and combine it with our advanced technologies to provide feedstock for the production of food-grade packaging at scale. To evidence the recycled content in the packaging, we use our ecoVeritas certification system, based on blockchain and AI technologies, giving brand owners and consumers confidence from shelf to shelf.
tags: Plastics & Paper / Recycling / Upcycling / Waste Reduction / Waste Management

one_liner: AVATOUR remote presence makes it possible to visit a facility or job site without travel. Combining full-motion 360° capture with real-time communication, AVATOUR enables remote inspections, marketing tours, training, and more - saving time and money while keeping personnel safe.
description:
The Avatour Remote Presence platform enables real-time multiparty immersive teleconferencing, applying the power of live 360° capture to real-world business for the first time. Using an inexpensive 360° camera and a mobile device, an Avatour host can interact with up to 9 remote guests in a live experience of a real place. Users can bring remote clients on a real-time virtual tour, conduct site inspections, consult remote experts, among many other applications.

Headquartered in San Francisco, Avatour was founded by veterans of the Nokia OZO program, where the modern 360° camera was invented. Avatour entered commercial release in early 2020, and the company now has over 30 customers, including DB Schenker, Thermo Fisher, NEC, Colgate-Palmolive, and the Federal Aviation Administration.

Owners, tenants and 3PLs can monetize unused space while other businesses needing temporary space can search, locate and license space fast. Everyone wins with Chunker!

Value: 
LIST EXTRA SPACE
Turning excess warehouse space into 100% profit is quick and easy when you list it with Chunker. Users needing your space will find it just as easily and license it directly from you. Listings are free and you can post as many properties as you'd like. Chunker will make the connections.

LOCATE SPACE FAST
Finding short-term warehouse space has always been time consuming, inconsistent, and unreliable. Not anymore. No one can give you access to more warehouse space available for temporary use than Chunker. And no one can help you find it faster. Feel free to contact Chunker and they will jump on the task.

BOOK SPACE NOW
Endless hours and details can make licensing short-term warehouse space a huge hassle. Chunker simplifies the process for all parties by providing an online licensing and payment system that brings everyone together to get deals done.

name: Trailer Dynamics
one_liner: Develops electric drive train systems for truck trailers to reduce emissions and fuel costs in long-haul transportation
description: Trailer Dynamics offers a comprehensive and so far unique solution concept for long-haul trucks by installing an additional electric drive train in the trailer. The core of the development is an electric drive train that has been outsourced to the trailer and enables the trailer to be connected to any conventional, conventional tractor unit using the plug-and-play method. Their powerful electric axle replaces one of the conventional non-driven axles of the trailer. They have also developed a sensor-based kingpin and additional sensors that enable real-time control of the electric drive train in the trailer, independent of the tractor unit. In combination with the diesel vehicle, the entire articulated truck system is converted into an electric plug-in hybrid. emission reductions and diesel cost savings of up to 40% on average, depending on the payload and topography of the route.

one_liner: Fox Robotics provides robotics and software solutions.
description: Warehouse automation robotics - autonomous mobile robots (AMR), picking systems, or sortation for logistics operations.

name: Gather AI
one_liner: Gather AI is the world's first software-only autonomous inventory management platform for modern warehouses.
description: Warehouse automation robotics - autonomous mobile robots (AMR), picking systems, or sortation for logistics operations.

name: Easy Aerial
one_liner: Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS) for Autonomous Monitoring
description: Tethered UAS/drone solutions for military surveillance and inspection. DIU Blue Clear List. Made in USA.

one_liner: FLX Solutions has patented and developed intelligent inspection/maintenance robots that are miniaturized to operate in spaces that humans can't easily access.

name: Ottonomy IO
one_liner: Autonomous robot fleets to make contactless deliveries for safe and enhanced user experience in both indoor and outdoor environments.
description: Technology company classified under robotics / Logistics taxonomy.

name: Kidou Systems
one_liner: Making autonomous mobility robots (AMR) accessible to everyone
description: We recognize the transformative potential of Autonomous Mobility Robots (AMR) in sectors like manufacturing. It is our firm belief that such groundbreaking technology should be within everyone's reach. Guided by this principle, our mission is to democratize AMR through full-stack automation solution, powered by autonomous teleoperation technologies.

name: Autumn Labs
one_liner: Real-time monitoring and control platform for factory robots and industrial automation equipment
description: Autumn Labs provides a platform that integrates robotic assembly, automated testing, and manual process stations to enhance factory efficiency, enabling engineers to capture critical context and remotely debug and update equipment.

name: Pivot Robotics
one_liner: AI-enabled robotic automation for high-mix manufacturing
description: Technology company classified under manufacturing / Industrial Robotics taxonomy.

name: Aersys, Inc.
one_liner: Aersys, Inc. is an AI and automation startup focused on developing automated infrastructure for package transportation to integrate in “buy online, pick-up in store” (BOPIS), drone/rover delivery, and stockroom modernization.
description: Warehouse automation robotics - autonomous mobile robots (AMR), picking systems, or sortation for logistics operations.

name: Devron
one_liner: Machine learning platform for distributed data without centralization
description:
Devron is a developer of a data science product platform intended to democratize machine learning in distributed silos. Devron enables businesses to run machine learning on distributed data for faster insights and better outcomes without the cost, concentration risk, long lead times, and privacy concerns of centralizing data.

Kartik Chopra founded the company in 2020 in North Brunswick, New Jersey.
tags: Artificial Intelligence / AI / Machine Learning / ML / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS

name: Amogy
one_liner: Builds novel carbon-free energy storage systems using ammonia fuel for large transportation applications.
description:
Amogy is working on a novel carbon-free energy storage system using ammonia as a fuel. 

Amogy's technology:
- Has substantially-increased energy density (higher than 700 Wh/kg).
- Can act as a renewable fuel, boosting zero carbon emissions during operation. 
- Offers simple liquid refueling, with no adjustments from today's infrastructure. 
- Is cost-efficient, costing less than a quarter dollar per kWh.

name: Saascharge
one_liner: Saascharge provides open, highly scalable, electric vehicle charging software enabling companies to enter the EV market and better engage with drivers.
description: Saascharge’s scalable, open platform enables e-mobility providers to profitably operate and control their own EV charging networks for the first time. By leveraging e-roaming, ensuring broad, intra-network charging, coupled with a novel, geo-advertising application, Saascharge not only enables the most profitable network economics but also the best driver engagement and charging experience available.
tags: Automotive / Connected Car / B2B / Back Office / Cleantech / Climate Change / Cloud / Connectivity / Driver / Passenger Monitoring / Electrification / EV / Electronic Vehicles / EV Charging / Fast Charging / Wireless Charging / Location Marketing / Network Management / Platform / Smart Charging / Smart City / Smart Infrastructure / Software as a Service / SaaS / Transportation / Utilities

name: Nohms
one_liner: Nohms Technologies specializes in Battery Solution, providing Lithium Ion Battery and NanoLyte Electrolyte Solutions.
description: Manufacturing operations platform within supply chain ecosystem - production, quality, or supplier management.
tags: Advanced Manufacturing / Battery / Battery Materials / Battery Membrane / Consumer Electronics / Distributed Energy / Electronics / Energy Efficiency / Energy Saving / Energy Storage / Energy Trading / Grid Storage / Energy Grid / Hardware / Solid State Battery / Transportation

name: EV Edison
one_liner: Developer and provider of high-power electric vehicle charging solutions

name: Aerovy
one_liner: Provides OEMs with a turnkey platform to deploy cloud software and AI-driven energy management for connected hardware products
description: Aerovy enables hardware companies to transform their products into intelligent, connected ecosystems. Their platform provides OEMs with a turnkey solution to deploy cloud-based software, AI-driven energy management, and fleet health monitoring—seamlessly integrated with their hardware. By leveraging advanced capabilities such as Virtual Power Plant (VPP) integration, predictive maintenance, and system optimization, Aerovy helps companies unlock new revenue streams, enhance operational efficiency, and accelerate time-to-market for connected products. Whether launching new electrified systems on the Spectra could platform or augmenting an OEM’s existing cloud system, Aerovy empowers OEMs to scale and monetize advanced software solutions with ease.

name: Piper Networks
one_liner: Piper Networks specializes in proximity technology to provide real-time asset tracking solutions that meet any enterprise’s location awareness needs.
description: Industrial IoT platform for supply chain visibility, monitoring, and connected operations.
tags: Agtech / Agriculture / Analytics / Asset Tracking / B2B / B2B2C / Big Data / Cloud / Cloud Computing / Cloud Security / Data Analytics / Delivery / Last Mile Logistics / Digitalization / E-Commerce Logistics / Edtech / Education / Enterprise / Hardware / Industry 4.0 / Industrial IoT / Infrastructure / Large Enterprise / Logistics / Predictive Analytics / Prescriptive Analytics / Pricing Analytics / Smart Infrastructure / Software as a Service / SaaS / User Experience / UX / Wearables

name: AmpUp
one_liner: EV charging management software and network provider for businesses, property owners, and fleets
description:
AmpUp is an electric vehicle (EV) software company and network provider that enables drivers, hosts, and fleets to charge stress-free. AmpUps technology gives businesses and property owners the ability to efficiently manage multiple charge stations and locations in one platform. Advanced features, such as smart scheduling, dynamic access control and energy optimization provide site hosts more flexibility and affordability for their charger investment. With headquarters in Cupertino, CA, AmpUp operates in all 50 states as well as Canada, Mexico, and Puerto Rico.

AmpUp was formed by nomad electric vehicle drivers to solve a problem that many others experience: owning electric cars without home charging. AmpUp first released a mobile app to build a peer-to-peer charging network, or a way for hosts to make their charge stations publicly available for all electric vehicle drivers. The service quickly began to decrease range anxiety, providing an important service to the EV community. AmpUp has since released new charging management solutions for customers of all types yet their commitment to public charging is still ingrained in all of their products today.

name: Via
one_liner: Provides on-demand shared rides and transit technology for cities
description: Via provides shared rides for an affordable flat rate. Operating in NYC, D.C. and Chicago, Via is changing the way people move around cities. They’ve built revolutionary technology that is changing the way people get around cities. Using Via, a ride booked on your phone costs little more than the bus. Via is on-demand transit on a mass scale; it’s transportation that’s friendly to their planet.
investors: Evolution VC Partners (formerly Evolution Corporate Advisors)
tags: Business Travel / Car Sharing / Ride Sharing / First / Last Mile Travel / Group Travel / Online Travel / Payments / Mobile Payments / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Transportation / Travel Booking / Trip Planning / Travel Insurance / Travel Search / Traveler Journey / Web App / Mobile App

name: Essentium
one_liner: Essentium is an innovator in both engineering filament materials and industrial additive manufacturing platforms.
description:
Essentium is an innovator in both engineering filament materials and industrial additive manufacturing platforms. Its new generation of automated high-speed industrial production system combines performance, accuracy, reliability, and economics. BASF and Essentium partner to establish a consistent global materials supply chain supportive of Essentium’s High Speed Extrusion (HSE) and FlashfuseTM plasma technologies to enable additive manufacturing scalability.

The company was founded in 2018 and is headquarted in Pflugerville, Texas.

name: Solideon
one_liner: Develops AI-powered robotic manufacturing systems for building vehicles and infrastructure on Earth and in space
description: Solideon, formerly Additive Space Technologies, leads the aerospace industry transformation with a focus on agility and reduced production times. They employ AI for generative designs and additive manufacturing improvement to enhance aerospace structure efficiency and design flexibility. Their revolutionary technology, Aperture, is an integrated robotic additive manufacturing system emphasizing vertical integration and patented 3D welding. Solideon aims to increase mission frequency through rapid refurbishment and sustainable practices, reducing reliance on external vendors and exploring advanced propulsion and launch techniques to accelerate aerospace processes while minimizing waste and costs.

name: Continuous Composites
one_liner: Develops CF3D™ continuous fiber 3D printing technology for moldless, out-of-autoclave composite manufacturing with embedded functionality
description: Owning the earliest patent on 3D printing continuous fibers (CF3D™), our technology leverages rapid curing resins paired with continuous fibers creating a moldless, Out of Autoclave (OOA) composite manufacturing process no longer limited to stacking 2D slices. Our technology has the ability to embed functionality such as; copper wire for power, nichrome wire for embedding heaters and fiber optics for sensing and collecting data to name a few. We are the future of manufacturing.

name: Orbital Composites
one_liner: Develops robotic 3D printing systems for large-scale composite manufacturing in aerospace and industrial applications
description: Robotic 3D printing

name: Inkbit
one_liner: Develops an AI-powered additive manufacturing platform that combines multi-material 3D printing with machine vision for industrial production.
description:
Inkbit creats a next-generation additive manufacturing platform that combines 3D printing with machine vision.

MIT-trained scientists and engineers combines expertise in industrial systems, design software, and material science to identify and seize opportunities for mass-market additive manufacturing.

The company has developed a 3D printer, called Snapper, which currently features 16 print heads that can deposit liquified polymer materials to create multi-material parts.

name: AREVO
one_liner: Develops 3D printing technology and carbon fiber composite materials to manufacture ultra-strong, lightweight polymer parts for industrial applications
description: Introducing Advanced Materials, Intelligent Software, and 3D Printing Technology to make high performance and ultra-strong polymer parts. They tailor materials to optimize mechanical, thermal, and electrical properties of printed objects. Their new advanced, carbon fiber reinforced polymers make parts stronger, lighter, and more durable. Their Intelligent cloud-based software tunes mechanical properties of 3D printed objects. This results in production parts with unique characteristics that cannot be made using any conventional manufacturing techniques.

name: Atomus
one_liner: Developer of 3D printing analytics platform.
description:
At Atomus they are solving a fundamental problem in additive manufacturing - monitoring 3D printing processes. Their platform can track what a 3D printer has been making, what material it has been printing with, and who is printing what. They are a team of dedicated engineers working with the Department of Defense and major private 3D printing groups to bring a tracking capability and analytics across any 3D printing enterprise that works on any printer with any software. 

Atomus offers secure sharing of 3D design files for on demand manufacturing. Their technology allows companies to securely share the digital files needed to 3D print objects with their customers without worrying about the file being corrupted or pirated. Their customers include the US Marine Corps, Air Force, and the automotive industry.
tags: Advanced Manufacturing / Artificial Intelligence / AI / Monitoring / Platform / Software as a Service / SaaS

name: Mantle
one_liner: Mantle’s TrueShape™ technology prints, shapes, and sinters precision metal parts from a CAD file in a fraction of the time and cost of conventional manufacturing.
description:
Provider of 3D metal printing technology intended to produce high resolution metal parts. The company's 3D metal printing technology enables companies to bring products to market faster by 3D printing tooling and end use parts. Mantle’s TrueShape™ is the first additive technology that creates parts that are true to CAD with CNC-quality surface finish and details. TrueShape Delivers accurate dimensions, fine details, smooth surface finish, exceptionally hard and strong materials, and crisp & sharp edges.

At the foundation of the TrueShape™ process is a line of proprietary Flowable Metal Paste (FMP) materials. FMP materials incorporate metal particles within a liquid to ensure safety and consistency during printing. Different particle types and sizes within the paste minimize dimensional change during sintering and tailor the final metal for optimal material properties.

name: NEXA3D
one_liner: NEXA3D is making ultrafast industrial-grade Stereolithography 3D printers affordable to professionals and businesses of all sizes.
description: NEXA 3D is making ultrafast industrial-grade Stereolithography 3D printers affordable to professionals and businesses of all sizes. The company's printers are powered by proprietary Lubricant Sublayer Photo-curing (LSPc) Technology and patented structured light matrix capable of reaching top speed of 1 cm per minute, drastically reducing 3D printing cycles of precision functional parts from hours to minutes.

name: Authentise
one_liner: Process Automation Software for Additive Manufacturing.
description: Authentise is the leader in process automation software for additive manufacturing. The core product is a Manufacturing Execution System that connects seamlessly to data from 3D printers and other digital manufacturing devices and uses it to automate actions such as order status updates, traceability reporting, quoting and more. Clients include Ricoh, Boeing, 3M, Danfoss, and others. The company is based in Mountain View and was started at Singularity University.

name: 3DK Tech
one_liner: Develops ultrasonic vibration technology to upgrade existing metal 3D printers for production-grade industrial manufacturing
description:
3DK Tech has developed a technology that uses ultrasonic vibrations to upgrade the metal 3D printing process in such a way that 3D printed parts can reach durability/reliability and cost effectiveness comparable with traditional manufacturing. Our solution can be used to upgrade any number of the 8000 metal 3D printers in the US that are currently being used for prototyping and iteration, enabling a large and agile metal manufacturing supply chain.
The first users of our technology are legacy industries such as Mobility, Maritime, Energy, and more, which are experiencing a very painful shortage of spare parts to keep their infrastructure running.
tags: 3D Modeling / 3D Printing / Advanced Manufacturing / Advanced Materials

name: 3D Architech
one_liner: Affordable, high-resolution metal additive manufacturing using proprietary gel-based lithography
description:
We offer gel-based metal additive manufacturing. We leverage the existing lithography-based 3D printing technologies with our proprietary gel materials and gel-to-metal connversion to make metals. This method bypasses the fundamental metal manufacturing limitations and offers affordable (x100 lower cost than existing metal 3D printing), high-resolution (10 microns), sustainable, and multi-material metal additive manufacturing.

Our applications include heat sinks, motor cores/stators, electrodes for enregy devices, and medicals devices as the platform technology.

name: Seurat Technologies
one_liner: 3D metal printing technology for high-volume, decarbonized industrial production
description: Seurat Technologies is transforming manufacturing for people and our planet. Area Printing by Seurat is the next generation of 3D metal printing designed for high-volume, decarbonized industrial production. By decoupling resolution and speed, Seurat is creating a scalable process that can compete with traditional manufacturing in every way. Seurat’s pioneering approach was originally developed at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) and has over130 patents granted and pending.

name: Azul 3D
one_liner: Develops high-area rapid printing (HARP) technology for high-throughput additive manufacturing of large-scale consumer and industrial goods.
description: Azul 3D aims to revolutionize advanced manufacturing with high-throughput 3D printing technologies that take ideas from prototyping to manufacturing in a streamlined, low cost solution. With High-Area Rapid Printing (HARP) technology, Azul 3D can print large objects at unparalleled speeds from a wide range of consumer and industrial grade plastics. Our aim is to provide an industry-ready solution that enables the production of consumer goods ready to go directly from the printer to the shelf.

name: Formetrix
one_liner: Advanced Materials for Metal Additive Manufacturing / 3D Printing
description:
Formetrix is an advanced materials company specializing in 3D-printable steel alloys with exceptional hardness and toughness. Formetrix’s tool steel powders are designed for very demanding applications and to be easily printed on a variety of standard laser powder bed fusion printing platforms.

The advanced materials from Formetrix ENABLE the significant advantages of Additive Manufacturing for many segments of the tool, die, mold, and specialty part industries. Formetrix is working hard to become “The New Standard” for 3D printing materials in these market segments.

To support the growth of it’s AM business, Formetrix was spun out of NanoSteel, a company with a long history of developing highly engineered steel alloys. The company now resides in a new, state-of-the-art facility with in-house 3D printing capabilities, metallurgical characterization equipment, and a highly capable technical staff.  The company 's headquarters and R&D center are located in Mansfield, MA.

name: Digital Alloys
one_liner: Digital Alloys provides additive manufacturing solutions for manufacturers of hard metal parts.
description:
Digital Allows provides technology and expertise for manufacturers to use metal additive manufacturing in their production, which enables them to save time, shrink costs, and produce new products. The company is backed by Boeing, Lincoln Electric, Khosla Ventures, and G20 Ventures.

Digital Alloys develops high-speed, multi-metal additive manufacturing systems that print production quality parts, in almost any metal, at a fraction of the cost of other systems, making metal 3D metal printing economical for a greatly expanded mix of applications. Digital Alloys metal 3D printers have the unique ability to mix multiple metals in a solid part, enabling customers to push the limits of design and create new products with optimized thermal, electrical, magnetic, and mechanical properties. It was formed in January 2017 as a spinout from the NVLabs division of New Valence Robotics, Inc. (NVBOTS).

name: Arris Composites
one_liner: Manufactures high-performance continuous fiber-reinforced composite parts using patented Additive Molding technology for aerospace, automotive, and consumer electronics.
description: Arris Composites provides next-gen composites for mass-market applications including aerospace, automotive, and consumer products. Founded by manufacturing veterans, Arris Composites develops continuous carbon fibre composites that can be combined with other materials in a high-speed process that combines 3D printing and traditional high-volume manufacturing. They specialise in advanced manufacturing, utilizing their patented Additive Molding™ technology to produce high-performance, continuous fiber-reinforced thermoplastic composite parts at scale. This process enables the creation of lightweight, durable components for industries such as consumer electronics, aerospace, automotive, and industrial applications.

name: Impossible Objects
one_liner: Develops composite 3D printing technology for manufacturing high-strength functional parts
description:
Impossible Objects has developed a new 3D printing process which prints parts stronger, faster and with a greater variety of materials.

As an example our carbon fiber reinforced parts which are as much as 10 times stronger than conventionally 3D printer parts. We produce functional parts.

name: Elementum 3D
one_liner: Manufactures advanced metal powders and composite materials for additive manufacturing
description: Manufacturer of metal additive materials intended to help clients get stereographic printing materials. The company's materials include advanced metals, composites, metal powders, and ceramics which are capable of withstanding higher loads while maintaining conductivity and resistance to abrasion, heat, oxidation, and corrosion, enabling clients to meet the printing industry's growing demand and offer good quality products.

name: Mechnano
one_liner: Mechnano is a 3D printing startup that is working to improve additive manufacturing materials.
description:
Mechnano is a 3D printing startup that is working to improve additive manufacturing materials. MechT, a Mechnano proprietary technology, provides static dissipative properties to 3D printed parts without sacrificing mechanical performance. It allows the fabrication of high surface finish and resolution ESD parts such as nozzles, grippers, carriers, and tooling while improving mechanical performance using existing laser-based, DLP, and LCD additive manufacturing processes. 

Mechano aims to exponentially improve AM materials and bring to light the true benefits of CNTs across a wide range of material properties and additive manufacturing processes.

name: ALL.SPACE
one_liner: ALL.SPACE has developed the 5th generation smart terminal, capable of linking with all satellites, all networks, in all orbits, all at once.
description:
One Device. All Networks. No Compromise. The world’s first smart terminal delivers total communications convergence.

ALL.SPACE, formerly Isotropic Systems, has developed the 5th generation smart terminal, capable of linking with all satellites, all networks, in all orbits, all at once. Our ground-breaking software-defined service enablement platform integrates intelligent routing, edge computing and on-demand services to deliver unprecedented network resilience and application performance. Whether you're on land, sea or air, we ensure that you stay connected.

Our S2000 range is customisable across a range of sizes, Tx/Rx ratios, aperture combinations and scan ranges with up to 8,100 unique configurable options. Our modular architecture allows you to pick the exact terminal configuration to meet your requirements.

name: CesiumAstro
one_liner: CesiumAstro provides out-of-the-box communication systems for satellites, UAVs, launch vehicles, and other space or airborne platforms.
description: CesiumAstro delivers communication systems for satellites, UAVs, launch vehicles, and other space or airborne platforms. Each of the company's products combines carefully selected COTS components with the traditional reliability necessary for aerospace systems. Its products enable connectivity between satellites, drones, planes, cars, and other mobile devices and generate electronically steerable beams of radio waves carrying information between the devices, and its software stitches the information together.

name: Albora
one_liner: Provides high-precision geolocation solutions for asset tracking and autonomous navigation in industrial and logistics applications.
description:
Albora offers a hardware-agnostic, software-based geolocation service platform that boosts the accuracy of any GNSS receiver. By using proprietary algorithms and leveraging edge and cloud technologies, our platform delivers high-precision positioning for a wide range of devices, from IoT and mobile phones to embedded vehicle trackers. In addition, Albora licenses proprietary algorithms to HW GNSS receiver manufacturers and systems integrators for critical applications.

Albora’s key offerings include:

•	AlbaSpot: Cloud-based solutions designed for mass-market applications. AlbaSpot IoT increases GNSS chip battery life by up to 90%, delivering meter-level accuracy for low-cost devices with low-frequency updates. Using your smartphone for both AlbaSpot Track which provides higher-frequency updates with sub-meter accuracy for continuous tracking (lane-level accuracy); and AlbaSpot Survey provides decimeter-level accuracy for survey-grade precise geolocation pinpointing.
•	AlbaSnap and AlbaCypher: Advanced solutions for defense and security use cases, addressing GPS-denied environments and spoofing and/or jamming threats.
investors: EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs
tags: Automotive / Connected Car / Autonomous Vehicles / Driving / Cloud Computing / Cloud Security / Connectivity / Decision Tools / Delivery / Last Mile Logistics / Drones / First / Last Mile Travel / Fleet / Auto / Fleet Management / Flying Cars / Hardware / Industrial Robotics / Industry 4.0 / Industrial IoT / Intellectual Property / IP / Internet of Things / IoT / Location Tracking / Machine to Machine / M2M / Mapping / Navigation / Sensors / Software / Software as a Service / SaaS / Transportation / Trucking / UAVs / UGVs / V2V / V2I / V2X

name: Sofant Technologies
one_liner: Sofant Technologies offers Smart Antenna and tunable RF solutions for next generation mobile and wearable devices.
description:
Sofant Technologies is a high growth innovative technology company incorporated in 2011. It's technologies have been researched and developed since 2006 and have a strong patent portfolio. The company is a spinout from The University of Edinburgh.

Sofant Technologies provides smart antenna and tunable RF solutions to mobile manufacturers. Sofant solutions enable ultimate wireless experience for mobile users.
investors: EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs

name: Xona Space Systems Inc.
one_liner: Xona Space is developing a next-generation 'Super-GPS' system to provide the high accuracy, security, and availability that the autonomous and connected word needs, both indoors and out.
description: The modern world is critically dependent on GNSS (aka GPS), with everything from power grids and banks, to planes, trains, and cars using it to operate. However current GNSS signals suffer from poor signal strength and have no security leaving them vulnerable to hacking and interference, and even in perfect conditions can only give ~1m level accuracy making them unsuitable for precision or critical navigation. Xona is developing a low cost small satellite system that can provide cm level global positioning through a high security and high power signal at a fraction of the cost of current systems. This system can also be expanded with ground-based 'pseudo-satellites' to provide indoor positioning.

name: Sateliot
one_liner: Operates a LEO nanosatellite constellation providing global 5G NB-IoT connectivity for remote IoT devices
description:
Sateliot is a telco connecting IoT devices in no-coverage areas through a LEO constellation of Nanosats.
The Sateliot business model aims to offer a roaming like service to final customers allowing the mobile operators (MNO) to deliver a full coverage service to its final customers.

The technology developed by Sateliot permits a seamless roaming between the covered areas through the base stations of the MNOs to the satellite areas covered by Sateliot. This is possible because our unique technology splits the 4G/5G core in two between the ground station and the satellite and the adaptation of the IoT protocols to the space. 

Sateliot's satellite technology is like an IoT based station from space.

name: Orbitare
one_liner: Develops nanosatellite networks to provide affordable personal satellite communications.
description: Swiss startup Orbitare develops nanosatellites for communication and network connectivity. With lesser weight than typical satellites, these satellites allow the startup to form a network of network connectivity. SPACELOOP is the fleet of nanosatellites that the startup deploys in low earth orbits. The design of the network accommodates how people communicate today. This entails an emphasis on instant messaging and social media communication. Through this, the startup cuts the cost of infrastructure to a tiny fraction of other solutions in the market. Spaceloop commoditizes satellite communications for all individuals.

name: Involve Space
one_liner: Stratospheric pseudo-satellite platforms and AI software for autonomous aerospace missions
description:
Involve Space
Autonomous stratospheric pseudo-satellite platform and intelligent software to enabling access to space

Involve Space is the only Italian supplier of stratospheric flights, and one of the leading in Europe. 
We offer a pseudo-satellite platform for aerospace launches for testing, Earth observation and atmospheric research missions.
The company also develops an innovative intelligent software to effectively and autonomously manage both the individual and collective positioning of networks of entities of various kinds (including stratospheric balloons, satellites and drones).

name: BitRipple, Inc.
one_liner: Real-time data delivery platform enabling ultra-low latency interactive experiences across challenging network environments
description:
BitRipple has developed a real-time data delivery platform that enables flawless interactive experiences.

Interactive experiences, such as cloud gaming, remote collaboration, augmented and virtual reality, require the delivery of large volumes of real-time data across wireless networks with consistent ultra-low latency. BitRipple real-time data delivery software solutions are designed and deployed commercially to enable flawless interactive experiences. BitRipple solutions are also deployed within cybersecurity applications in the defense and satellite communications industries.

name: Sibros
one_liner: Provides OTA software update and data logging platform for connected vehicles
description: Sibros provides the world’s first Deep Connectivity Platform for full vehicle Over-the-Air (OTA) software updates and live data collection in a single vehicle to cloud system. The platform also securely manages all in-vehicle software and data between vehicles, networks and the cloud, from R&D to end-of-life, to enable the connected vehicle ecosystem of today and the future. This software-first approach empowers vehicle OEMs to reduce software recalls while addressing hundreds of connected vehicle use cases spanning fleet management, predictive maintenance, owner personalization, data monetization and beyond. Built by a core expert team from the likes of Tesla, Uber, Faraday and other auto/mobility leaders, Sibros solutions have been designed with the latest safety and cybersecurity standards in mind and can be rapidly integrated on any vehicle hardware, system or architecture.

name: ALCAN Systems
one_liner: Develops ultra-thin smart antenna systems for satellite and 5G communications
description: ALCAN is the smart antenna company focusing on developing a new class of low-cost smart antenna system that represents a technological breakthrough in satellite and cellular communication. Smart antennas which are ultra-thin, flat and able to adjust its beam electronically without any moving parts, will allow them to be mounted inconspicuously on moving vehicles (cars, trains, airplanes, ships etc.) to track all satellites (GEO, MEO & LEO) as well as 5G cellular networks.

name: Celestial Space Technologies GmbH
one_liner: Telecommunication for space and terrestrial mobility applications
description:
Celestial develops telecommunication hard- and software for satellite communication. 
The specific products offered are a communication system and patch antenna.
This patch antenna is also the basis for advanced systems, like a GNSS terminal and Phased Array Antenna (PAA). PAAs have high application potential in mobility.

name: Pivotal Commware
one_liner: Pivotal Commware develops software-defined antennas and radios that use holographic beamforming to increase network speed and capacity.
description: Pivotal Commware develops software-defined antennas and radios that use holographic beamforming to increase network speed and capacity. Pivotal Commware was established in 2016 to commercialize a breakthrough in electromagnetic physics, Holographic Beam Forming (HBF). Years ago, Pivotal's founders recognized that wireless demand for data would outgrow the complex coding, multiplexing and modulation schemes that network operators have deployed thus far.

name: NanTenna
one_liner: NanTenna is enhancing performance of narrow to mid band antennas while drastically improving form factor to benefit military communicators in modern warfare.
description:
NanTenna: Ultra-Compact Antenna Technology for a Connected Battlespace

NanTenna is an advanced RF technology company redefining antenna design for modern defense, aerospace, and critical communications. Our proprietary, ultra-low-profile antennas deliver uncompromised performance in the smallest possible form factor—solving the size, weight, and visibility challenges that conventional antennas cannot.

At the core of our innovation is a patented architecture that enables high-efficiency radiation in extremely compact, ruggedized enclosures. NanTenna’s products operate across UHF, L-band, and SATCOM bands, with expanding support for Iridium Certus®, MEO/LEO constellations, and resilient beyond-line-of-sight communications. Designed for seamless integration onto vehicles, aircraft, drones, and wearables, our antennas require no drilling or platform modification—accelerating deployment while reducing system impact.

Unlike off-the-shelf solutions, NanTenna’s technology is engineered specifically for contested and constrained environments. The designs are stealthy, magnetically or adhesively mounted, and built to survive extreme operational stress—making them ideal for tactical edge and mission-critical use cases.

Our IP-rich platform ensures long-term defensibility and value, with a growing portfolio of protected designs that cannot be easily replicated. We’re already supporting programs with U.S. and allied defense organizations, and our products are fielded globally through strategic partnerships and primes.

NanTenna is not just delivering antennas—we’re delivering a new class of RF capability for the modern battlefield. For partners and investors, this is a rare opportunity to engage with a scalable, high-margin technology at the intersection of innovation, defense modernization, and secure global connectivity.

name: Notch
one_liner: Develops metamaterial antennas for drones and wireless communications, enabling electronic beamforming and protection against RF jamming
description: Developer of a technology intended to boost the communications capabilities of drones and guarding against attempts to jam their radio-frequency signals. They are developing metamaterial solutions that enable antennas to be electronically controlled for beamforming and boosting communication ranges while simultaneously providing cyber-security protection.

name: Metawave
one_liner: Develops intelligent beam steering radars for autonomous vehicles and smart antennas for 5G networks using metamaterials and AI
description:
Metawave is a technology company that seeks to revolutionize the future of wireless communications. Leveraging adaptive metamaterials and artificial intelligence. Metawave's primary market focus is to build intelligent beam steering radars for autonomous driving. Changing the way automakers think about radar. Metawave is building high-performance radars capable of 3D imaging and vehicle-to-vehicle communications, making autonomous cars safer, smarter, and more connected.

In parallel, Metawave is also developing smart beam steering antennas for 4G and 5G networks to provide faster networks and near-instant connectivity for billions of users. Metawave's current flagship beam steering technology platform was developed at Xerox PARC. Founded in 2017, Metawave is located in PARC's headquarters in Palo Alto, California, in the heart of Silicon Valley.

name: Flexoo
one_liner: Develops and manufactures flexible printed electronics including sensors, heaters, and circuit boards for industrial applications
description:
FLEXOO is a Germany-based company that develops and manufactures flexible components using printed electronics. Its products include sensors, heaters, antennas, and flexible printed circuit boards. The company originated as a spin-off from InnovationLab GmbH and expanded its production capabilities through the acquisition of Heidelberg Printed Electronics GmbH.

FLEXOO’s technologies include large-area sensor matrices for measuring pressure, temperature, and humidity; sensors integrated into battery systems for real-time temperature monitoring; customizable foil heaters; and multi-layer flexible PCBs and antennas made with various conductive materials.

name: US Air Tech
one_liner: US Air Tech develops a low-cost advanced satellite communication ground terminal and satellite module.
description: US Air Tech develops a low-cost advanced satellite communication ground terminal and satellite module. The company's headquarters are in Tucson, Arizona.

name: Anywaves
one_liner: Designs and manufactures ultra-compact high-performance antennas for nanosatellites and UAVs
description: ANYWAVES designs and manufactures revolutionary antennas for small carriers. ANYWAVES takes up the challenge by offering ultra-compact and lightweight high-performance antennas for various radiofrequency applications: GNSS, telecommunications, earth observation, atmospheric input and other. Its patented revolutionary technology enables rapid antenna development for Nanosatellites and UAVs.

name: Skynopy
one_liner: Ground-station-as-a-service platform for satellite operators
description:
Skynopy offers the simplicity of mobile connectivity for satellite operators with its end‑to‑end, ground‑station‑as‑a‑service platform. The Paris‑based startup combines a hybrid network of timeshared antennas, including AWS locations and Kinéis sites, with its own proprietary ground stations. Their virtualized modem infrastructure and unified API enable operators to double data volumes, reduce latency, and streamline RF integration with pre‑tested modulations before launch.
Founded in late 2023, Skynopy has already deployed 15+ antennas and supports more than a dozen satellites. In 2025, the company closed a €15 million funding round led by Alven and CNES to scale toward over 100 ground stations by 2028. With Skynopy, satellite operators benefit from reliable, sovereign data pipelines and near‑real-time connectivity, all managed through a simple, mobile‑style service model.

name: Incirt
one_liner: Develops extremely high-bandwidth, highly energy-efficient DAC/ADC technology for high-performance applications such as next-generation mobile communication (5G-Advanced and 6G).
description: Incirt provides extremly wide modulation bandwidth and highly energy-efficient data converter IP solutions, exploiting a novel, ground-breaking approach. The technology can be applied for high datarate wireless communication, high datarate wireline communication (copper and optical) and for quantum computing purposes.

name: SatEnlight
one_liner: Satellite free-space optical communication technology using Orbital Angular Momentum for high-speed data transmission
description:
SatEnlight is a project conceived in the laboratories of University of Milano dealing with the development of a innovative and proprietary technology for satellite free-space optical communication. This technology, integrable with traditional optical solutions, implements digital multiplexing of data transmitted through an optical channel, exploiting the Optical Angular Momentum (OAM) property of the electromagnetic radiation (typically imprinting a vortex shape to a laser beam wavefront).

This makes possible to decode information simultaneously received from several lasers. Since the decoding is carried out through an interferometric measurement that analyzes a small portion of the laser wavefront, main focus is to design and produce a receiver with small dimensions compared on other solutions on the market. In conclusion, SatEnlight technology enables optical data transmission from LEO, MEO and GEO both for intersatellite links and downlink. It allows to increase data rate, transmission security and design a receiver simply integrable with current infrastructure.

name: Gapwaves
one_liner: Develops patented waveguide antenna technology for high-performance 5G and automotive radar applications
description:
Gapwaves offers a waveguide technology that helps 5g wireless providers provide better wireless experiences. It develops waveguide and antenna products based on the patented Gapwaves waveguide technology. The innovation lies in the patented Gapwaves waveguide technology with unique capabilities such as combining extremely low losses with market leading cost-efficiency for high production volumes. 

The technology is based on an Artificial Magnetic Conductor (AMC) surface that enables propagation of electromagnetic waves in contactless artificial waveguide structures.  By combining high performance and standardized manufacturing technologies, Gapwaves antennas can be tailormade to fulfill the requirements of a wide range of millimeterwave applications.

name: Unio Global
one_liner: Bridges space and terrestrial networks to provide global, ultra-secure broadband connectivity for mobility applications across land, sea, and air
description:
Specialising in next-generation services for all mobility markets, UNIO powers innovation through its enterprise-class, global coverage and seamless, always-on connectivity solutions. They are focused on the elimination of network dead zones and the efficient bridging of space and terrestrial (e.g. 4G, 5G) networks for a cohesive and uninterrupted user experience.

Connectivity is pivotal for the future of driving. UNIO is seamlessly bridging terrestrial and space networks for all mobility use cases and delivering reliable, always-on connectivity.

The core of our NewSpace approach is providing affordable, high-speed low latency data rates, on a secure communication platform forcommercial and government sectors. The complete end-to-end system will be vertically integrated to maximise design reuse and take advantage of the economies of scale, to bring down the price of the overall system. The goal here is to sell the users the desired performance, but not the taxpayer the entire technology.

UNIO is a joint venture led by Isar Aerospace, Mynaric, Reflex Aerospace, and SES, deploying a game-changing Low-Earth Orbit (LEO) mobility-focused meshed network constellation.

name: Stellar
one_liner: Provides satellite and cellular internet connectivity for vehicles and passengers
description:
Co-developing with leading car manufacturers, and combining cellular, wi-fi, and satellites, we will deliver fast, reliable, and secure internet to vehicles and passengers, to bring mobility into the digital era.

We have designed a multi-step approach to market to accelerate the path to cash positivity while de-risking the involvement of investors. 
Our multi-step strategy starts with a software-only solution, and culminates into a full-stack connectivity network for an outstanding ubiquitous broadband connectivity for the transportation industry. 
Each one of the various products and services in our offering is designed to be standalone and profitable, while allowing new products to be built upon our previous successes.
investors: A leading EU car manufacturer and EU Institutions

description:
Neuron is a London-based technology company utilising distributed ledger technology to connect the next generation of intelligent transportation systems. Their network can be used to enable drone deliveries, to share data between e-bike providers and to connect vehicles to smart technology

Their API's provide developers with tools for sharing and monetising data in a secure, permissioned environment allowing for frictionless integration and resilient automation of critical processes.

Neuron provides the benefits of blockchain, with the performance of the cloud, and the economics of a marketplace. If you would like to learn more about how you can benefit from the network, please reach out to out team

name: Cognomotiv
one_liner: Automotive-grade, data-driven AI at the edge and in the cloud to detect and predict system faults, failures, malfunctions, and misbehaviors
description:
Cognomotiv Predictive Guided Maintenance transforms vehicle Maintenance, Repair, Overhaul (MRO), increases uptime. Cognomotiv provides comprehensive end-to-end AI-driven vehicle failure detection, prediction, and guided repair as a service. Our cutting-edge B2B, software-only solutions enhance uptime and service quality, enabling businesses to deliver superior customer experience and uptime. Cognomotiv Predictive Guided Maintenance is continuously learning, AI-enabled monitoring, analysis, reporting, and validation solution that ensures the health of vehicle systems is constantly evaluated. Cognomotiv leverages AI and generates diagnostics, prognostics and accurate repair procedures for efficient and speedy issue resolution. Cognomotiv goes beyond merely reading Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) and significantly reduces diagnosis and repair times. Cognomotiv solutions optimize vehicle operation, boost uptime, provide accurate parts and labor identification, minimize costly comebacks, empower technicians to achieve more, and drive customer satisfaction.
Cognomotiv's core Value Proposition is a scalable, cost-efficient, End-to-End solution across brands and asset classes that can be deployed both as SaaS (Software as a Service) or on-prem.

description: SkyBuys delivers an innovative solution to connect the online and offline world for duty free and travel retailers. For passengers, duty free shopping becomes more accessible. For airlines, we maximise in-cabin efficiencies by removing the trolley, generate new revenue and improve the passenger experience. By linking the inventory into a passenger’s smartphone, SkyBuys also makes fulfillment easier for retailers. Additionally, we provide airlines and travel agents with ancillary revenue.

Helix develops antennas and systems that defeat the vulnerabilities and threats to GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite Systems) and position, navigation and timing (PNT).

Autonomous systems and drones depend on highly resilient and accurate positioning information, and our patented DielectriX™ technology enables precise position to be determined in harsh situations where satellite signals are disrupted by the built environment, RF interference, and malicious jamming and spoofing attacks.

Our products and customised solutions enable precise data transfer across all main markets; aerospace, automotive, critical national infrastructure, data communication, defence and military applications.

name: Coflux Purification
one_liner: Coflux Purification uses a patent-pending in-stream module that breaks down PFAS using a novel absorbent for chemical-free water.
description:
Our solution permanently destroys PFAS in the filtration cycle, using only light and our Photocatalytic Absorbent Foam. Our target market is industrials focused on PFAS remediation – either in preparation for impending PFAS legislation or mandated remediation – specifically in North America. According to Safer States, a national
coalition of environmental health organizations, in the US there are 192 current policies in 29 states and 72 adopted policies in 21 states, which will continue to drive up demand across North America. The estimated total addressable market is ~$4B, with potential for the market to grow to $6.5B by 2030. Industry experts estimate these markets will expand with urgency and need, as local, state, and federal regulation develop. 

Current technologies to remove PFAS are incredibly energy intensive and don't permanently destroy PFAS. By using Coflux, customers can avoid energy use (and emissions) through using our solution, which uses significantly less energy per gallon of water processed. Additionally, the chemical industry uses 20% of the electricity in the US for industrial heating, without having to account for PFAS destruction - by utilizing Coflux, companies will use an energy efficient catalytic degradation system for a low-emissions process to permanently destroy PFAS. Given the DOE's Industrial Heatshot initiative, our solution is an alternative way for chemical industries to mitigate energy use and emissions from industrial heating.

name: Apian
one_liner: Apian is an API that integrates drones into the healthcare ecosystem in a simple, scalable and sustainable way.
description:
Apian is transforming healthcare logistics, bringing everyday on-demand delivery to the NHS and beyond. Apian was founded in 2020 by NHS doctors Christopher and Hammad, and ex-Google Health entrepreneur Alexander. 

Our mission is to make people and planet feel better. We believe that healthcare should benefit from on-demand delivery much like consumers do in their personal lives. If a patient can have a pizza delivered in 30 minutes, why must they wait days for their lab test results or medication to arrive?

Our roots lie in the NHS Clinical Entrepreneur Programme, from which Christopher and Hammad were the youngest ever graduates in 2019. Today, Apian is a diverse team of 20+ with backgrounds including air traffic control, transplant surgery, engineering simulation and global supply chains.

We’re loosely based in London, but work across the UK and beyond.

We're building an autonomous logistics network to instantly deliver medical supplies. Apian partners with the world's leading drone operators and ground couriers across remote and rural locations.

Apian is an API. We integrate the healthcare industry with the drone industry, abstracting the complexity into a simple end-to-end system.

name: Elementium Materials
one_liner: Elementium Materials is a battery spin-out based on technology developed at MIT. Elementium is at the forefront of revolutionizing battery technology with our groundbreaking novel liquid electrolyte solutions.
description: Elementium Materials is an energy storage company that develops novel electrolyte formulations for advanced lithium-ion chemistries. Their technology improves cell stability, enabling batteries that charge faster, hold higher voltage, and endure more cycles compared to legacy systems. The electrolyte works with various electrode materials—such as silicon anodes, manganese-rich cathodes, and high-nickel cathodes —while addressing common degradation issues, including dendrite formation and corrosion. It supports applications in electric vehicles, grid storage, consumer electronics, and industrial systems by offering solutions focused on safety, longevity, and cost improvement. The company adapts its electrolyte to emerging battery chemistries, aiming to support broader energy storage needs.

description: Carbon removal marketplace and corporate carbon offsetting platform. 6th fastest-growing startup in Europe.
tags: Carbon Capture / Personal Finance / Social Impact / Software / Sustainability

one_liner: ANRA Technologies provide operators with an off the shelf, field proven DroneOSS operational platform.
description: Technology company classified under general / Aerial Robotics taxonomy.
