name: Vecna Robotics
description: Vecna Robotics builds autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) for warehouse and logistics operations. Their Pivotal platform orchestrates mixed fleets of human and robotic workers.

name: Aircon
one_liner: AI-powered gateway-as-a-service platform for air freight consolidation
description: Aircon is a technology-focused airfreight consolidation company that is disrupting the $270 billion airfreight market. Our differentiator is that we are the first company to deliver gateway services at scale to the freight forwarding community. Our algorithms pool shipments that combine dense and voluminous cargo to achieve the best master consolidation available while passing the “net effect” or savings back to the freight forwarder.e costs

name: Amitruck
one_liner: Digital marketplace for efficient trucking logistics in Africa
description:
Amitruck is an innovative mobile and web based trucking logistics platform that brings together cargo owners and transporters for their mutual benefit.

Logistics spending in Africa by manufacturers and retailers has crossed the $160 billion mark back in 2018 and keeps growing. However the sector across the continent suffers from fragmentation and lack of transparency. According to a study by the United Nations Economic and Social Council, in accessing foreign markets, on average, Africa’s transport and insurance costs represent 30 per cent of the total value of exports. 

By matching cargo owners with trucking logistics professionals through a digital competitive bidding process, Amitruck brings trust and transparency into the African logistics sector.  Amitruck’s solution cuts out expensive middlemen whilst increasing security as all drivers and vehicles are vetted and goods in transit insured.

name: Atmo AI
one_liner: AI-powered weather forecasting with 100x higher resolution than traditional models for governments and enterprises.
description: Atmo AI is an advanced meteorology firm that uses AI and deep learning to revolutionize weather forecasting. The company combines real-time data from global weather satellites, radars, and ground stations, with over 60 years of historical data to create forecasts that are faster and more precise than traditional methods. Atmo’s models update every 15 minutes, offering forecasts with up to 100 times the resolution of standard models, which is crucial for predicting microclimates and localized weather events. Atmo partners with governments, militaries, and private enterprises to deliver tailored forecasting solutions that support disaster response, agriculture, renewable energy, and national security efforts globally.

name: Autobon AI
one_liner: Retrofit autonomous driving platform for commercial semi-trucks
description: Autobon is on a mission to upgrade America's existing semi-trucks into safer and more efficient vehicles with the Autobon retrofit platform that delivers advanced driver assistance features, real time video and GPS tracking feeds, and access to Autobon's online portal. Autobon's vision is to ultimately automate the highway portion of long-haul trips with our Autopilot platform that has already proven Level 2 autonomous capabilities. Autobon provides fleets with software integration libraries to integrate vehicle telematics with their own custom Transportation Management Systems. TMS also includes a set of custom APIs like GPS Tracking, Real-Time Video Feedback, and Delivery Information.

name: Basetwo AI
one_liner: No-code AI platform that enables manufacturing teams to optimize production processes through physics-based digital twins and machine learning
description: Basetwo is an AI company that enables manufacturing teams to optimize their production processes through a no-code platform that combines physics-based simulations with machine learning. Their core product allows process engineers to create digital twins—virtual models of real-world operations—to simulate, predict, and improve manufacturing performance in real time. By integrating with existing data systems, Basetwo helps users identify root causes of inefficiencies, optimize parameters, and reduce costs, cycle times, and quality deviations. The platform is designed to be user-friendly for engineers without coding expertise, making advanced AI accessible for day-to-day process decision-making across industries such as pharmaceuticals, chemicals, and consumer goods.

name: Bosta
one_liner: Overnight delivery and logistics platform for e-commerce companies in Egypt
description:
Bosta is an overnight delivery provider for E-commerce companies in Egypt. Leveraging technology to empower businesses is what we do best. Bosta's goal is to disrupt the logistics industry by bringing technology and experience altogether to provide a one-stop-shop for delivery solutions.

Bosta relies on advanced technology to deliver orders to customers in a fast way. Businesses can track and connect with couriers and follow up on their orders - all in one system.

name: Cafler
one_liner: AI-powered marketplace and operating system for car services and mobility companies
description: Cafler, founded in Barcelona in 2021, operates a software‑centric marketplace for B2B and B2C vehicle services, integrating IoT-enabled fleet monitoring with transactional logistics. The platform facilitates scheduling, pickup, delivery, and execution of routine automotive services—MOTs, maintenance, tire changes, cleaning, fueling—via a network of professional providers. Architects of a unified operational layer, Cafler consolidates vehicle telemetry, service history, and driver coordination through an API‑first system with white‑label capability. Its SaaS offering equips fleets, dealerships, rental agencies, and workshops with real-time dashboards, CRM, booking, and reporting modules. Leveraging connected‑car data and historical usage patterns, Cafler automates reminders and service dispatch, delivering full traceability across multi‑service workflows.
investors: Banc Sabadell and the Institut Català de Finances (ICF)

name: Carbon Ridge
one_liner: Modular onboard carbon capture for maritime shipping.
description:
Carbon Ridge's solution to reduce maritime carbon intensity is Onboard Carbon Capture and storage (“OCCS”) which enables near-term decarbonization.

OCCS requires an alternative approach to point-source carbon capture compared to conventional CCS technology for stationary emitters. 

Carbon Ridge's systems are modular and externally mounted on board vessels, capturing CO2 from the exhaust systems and storing it in liquified tanks.

name: Claimit
one_liner: AI-powered SaaS platform that automates shipping invoice auditing and claims recovery to eliminate hidden logistics costs
description: Claimit’s B2B SAAS platform pro-actively manages and automates the process of claiming what you are owed from the couriers. Their solution streamlines the traditionally manual and analog process of reconciling invoices, thereby optimising the workload for Operations and Finance teams. This innovative solution leverages AI-powered technology to automatically audit shipping transactions for errors, such as incorrect rates, damages, or late deliveries and help businesses and couriers to process claims. Claimit uncovers a problem that is estimated to be accounted for 20% of the shipments bringing visibility to businesses thanks to a dashboard that provides analytics, transparency and useful information that can be used to negotiate with couriers.

name: Colonia Tech
one_liner: B2B marketplace for truck and trailer sharing
description: Colonia brings logistics companies into the 21st century. Our mission is to turn all trucks and trailers into a global sharing fleet. Accessing trucks and trailers should be as easy as booking an Uber or Bolt scooter. For our hard-working customers, we go the extra mile to give them the service they deserve. Our team is ambitious and diverse. We are backed by Europe's most successful early-stage investors, industry experts and experienced angel investors.

name: Data Gumbo
one_liner: Data Gumbo provides blockchain-based smart contracts to automate contract execution between industrial companies.
description: Provider of a blockchain based smart contracts platform intended to automate contracts in the oil and gas industry. The company's platform offers smart contract capabilities to oil and gas companies that collect, clean, standardize and encrypt data from field operations, automating the execution of contracts, eliminating accounting and reconciliation expenses, time delay, inaccuracy, legal fees, mistrust and disputes, enabling companies to increase audibility and profitability. While oil and gas was our beachhead market, we can deploy our solution to other asset-heavy industries to optimize 3rd party workflows and provide visibility into your supplier risk.

name: Datch
one_liner: Customizable mobile platform for frontline industrial teams to capture asset data and manage equipment maintenance
description:
Datch makes frontline data discovery and capture easier and faster. This enables your team to correctly document and collaborate on the status of equipment, creating the insights that prevent issues.

Datch works on top of your existing EAM set up, ensuring that there’s no tradeoff in your backend stability and front end configurations. Save time customizing front end solutions to each and every use case. By making all of your frontline workers knowledge workers, you dramatically increase the breadth and depth of insights. From optimizing OEE to enabling lean principles, you can make all of your decisions data informed.

To stay within reporting and safety compliance you need quality reporting data. Datch makes real time reporting simple, ensuring you always capture the required information and no corners are cut. Human centric design is critical for change management. Datch's applications are purpose built for both the frontline worker and those in the business of process deployment. Empower your IT teams to deploy and maintain effective infrastructure, while your frontline teams effectively operate and maintain your assets.

name: Dyna Robotics
one_liner: Dyna Robotics develops high-performance, autonomous robots powered by embodied foundation models, enabling sustained, dexterous operation in real-world environments.
description: Dyna Robotics pioneers the first production-ready robot foundation model, enabling truly autonomous behavior in real-world conditions. Their flagship, DYNA‑1, delivers round-the-clock dexterity through stationary robotic arms capable of complex tasks—such as napkin folding—for more than 24 hours continuously and without human intervention. The model achieves a remarkable 99.4% success rate, operates at 60% of human throughput, and stands as a landmark in embodied artificial general intelligence. ￼ ￼

name: Drift
one_liner: Conversational marketing and sales platform that generates qualified leads and accelerates the sales cycle
description:
Drift provides a buying experience for potential customers, generate more qualified leads, and dramatically accelerate the sales cycle.

Drift is a conversation-driven marketing and sales platform. With its quickly evolving set of tools and playbooks, Drift unlocks the insights buried in conversations to accelerate business success. Customers use Drift to provide a modern buying experience for potential customers, generate more qualified leads, and dramatically accelerate the sales cycle.

Customers include: Gong, Zenefits, Wake Forest University
Case studies can be found here: https://www.drift.com/case-studies/

name: Everest Networks
one_liner: Develops AI-powered Wi-Fi access points using phased array antennas for high-density venues like stadiums and arenas
description:
Everest Networks' technology solves today’s most pressing connectivity issues such as; high user engagement, high network capacity, and fast throughput, whilst delivering a lower total cost of ownership (TCO). Everest Networks recently was awarded the “Wi-Fi StartUp of the Year, 2019” award at the WiFi NOW event in London. This makes Everest Networks Wi-Fi the platform of choice for venues such as stadiums, arenas, convention centers, shopping malls, transport hubs, auditoriums, campuses, and smart cities.

Everest Networks offers a new product architecture for wireless LANs. Specifically:
1. Everest make APs with software-controlled phased array antennas to customize AP radio coverage
2. Everest have multiple radios operating simultaneously to provide the highest capacity in a single AP
3. Everest combines AI algorithms with live user location data from our APs, to provide customized radio coverage in real time.

name: Ferto
one_liner: On-demand delivery platform connecting consumers with local stores for instant delivery
description:
We deliver goods and happiness to your doorstep in less than 20 minutes. Ferto allows you to easily find and order any product from your favorite stores. Do not waste time waiting for hours for your order, Ferto is a modern service that gives you convenience, flexibility and consistency.

Ferto is an on-demand delivery platform that connects consumers with local stores through a crowdsourced courier network. Ferto currently has 3 co-founders plus 2 full-time employees.

Ferto brings together, consumers, local stores and couriers to achieve instant deliveries without relying on their own dark stores. They are partnering with the mom and pop stores and groceries that act like Ferto’s dark warehouses. 

Just add your card once, and you will not have to deal with payment, cash and change again! Stripe.com, the popular payment platform, guarantees the security of your transaction. Do not worry, be happy.

name: GenLots
one_liner: GenLots is how manufacturing companies plan their external material purchases.
description:
GenLots is a Swiss start-up having created an entirely new version of the MRP (Material Requirements Planning), powered by a proprietary AI, developed at ETH in Zürich.

The result? All orders for external materials flow are systematically optimized, daily, across 5 dimensions: scale prices, logistics costs, inventory, scrap, and production continuation.

It works with different set-ups (classic MRP, DD-MRP, daily, weekly orders, etc.) and generates up to 30% inbound inventory reduction and 30% LESS inbound deliveries (also playing into sustainability goals), achievements verified with our clients Merck (Life Science) and AB InBev (Consumer Goods).

GenLots is considered a value-enabler for end-to-end platforms such as SAP IBP, Kinaxis, O9, etc. by ensuring that NO optimization performed on parameters and planning is lost when it comes to ordering materials. Implementation is done swiftly (we have a technical partnership with SAP and standard APIs).

name: HausBots
one_liner: Builds surface-climbing robots for inspecting critical infrastructure like bridges, storage tanks, and pipelines
description: HausBots, a UK-based robotics firm founded in 2018, specializes in constructing robots for inspecting critical infrastructure across industries like Chemicals, Pulp and Paper, Power Generation, and Transport. These robots and sensors supply vital integrity data, addressing the challenges of hazardous, costly, and time-consuming conventional inspection methods. HausBots' distinctive robots are surface-agnostic, capable of climbing concrete, brick, stainless steel, and steel, setting them apart from magnetic-surface-restricted competitors. Their flagship HB1 robot, with a proprietary design generating substantial adhesion force, can integrate various inspection sensors, such as ultrasound, microwave, and cameras. This innovation enables HausBots to perform inspections three times faster and more cost-effectively while eliminating work at height. They offer three business models: inspection services, product sales and training, and custom solutions. Notable clients like Georgia Pacific, CRH (Tarmac), Dow Chemical, and UK National Highways have benefited from their solutions, delivering high-quality data, a complete elimination of work at height, and superior coverage compared to traditional methods.

name: Krave Mart
one_liner: Quick-commerce darkstore model for Pakistan
description: 15 mins deliveries in Pakistan.

name: Koffie Labs
one_liner: AI-driven insurance for commercial fleets.
description: Koffie is an insurance company purpose-built for the autonomous vehicle era. Their AI driven predictive models are able to underwrite every commercial vehicle on the road today, based on their vehicle specific characteristics, in real time. They will be offering their first commercial auto policies to the trucking market, where incumbents have failed to turn a profit for the past 8 years and autonomous vehicle technology is critically impacting risk.

name: Kardinal
one_liner: AI-powered route optimization platform for delivery logistics that dynamically adapts routes in real-time to operational disruptions.
description: The company's platform uses AI and offers automatic dispatch, pick up and delivery support, routing optimization, static and dynamic delivery management and time prediction of courier arrival. Their solutions assist your operational teams on a daily basis by dynamically adapting tour plans according to exogenous shocks (breakdown, traffic, schedule changes, etc…). Their algorithms are constantly looking for the best solution, taking into account the new information that arrives in real time. The company provides an accessible SaaS solution easy to use for complex transportation tasks. By relying on technological supports (smartphones, cloud services, etc.), the intelligence system artificial integrates completely with the logistics processes put in place in transportation companies and allows them to respond more quickly and effectively to all problems encountered.

name: Lyrid
one_liner: Airbnb-like platform for cloud computing enabling cost-effective scaling through local data centers
description:
Lyrid is a next-generation cloud infrastructure platform company that helps our customers scale their cloud services with lower infrastructure costs. With AI-powered Kubernetes automation, we built an Airbnb-like platform for cloud computing, partnering with international data centers to provide cost-effective, efficient infrastructure.

We offer an open platform with local data center partners, simple pricing models, and straightforward Kubernetes cloud management to address these issues. We help you quickly deploy and manage your workloads more efficiently and cost-effectively by using untapped resources in your local data centers.

name: Maximum AI
one_liner: AI-powered communications platform that automates phone, email, and chat outreach to help freight brokers match shipments with available truck capacity
description: Maximum AI is a communications platform built for freight brokers that maximizes their matches for potential quotes to potential capacity.

name: Nemodata
one_liner: AI-powered predictive maintenance platform for commercial vehicle fleets to prevent breakdowns and optimize operations
description:
Nemodata is a vertical AI company, on a mission to accelerate EV adoption and reduce greenhouse gas emissions while enabling the world's fleets to run continuously.

They begin by tackling the $100B+ in costs and lost revenues caused by heavy-duty vehicle breakdowns in the United States. Nemodata's proprietary AI-based prognostics layer sits on top of the existing data sources to predict breakdowns and generate an optimized maintenance schedule for the entire fleet. 
Simply by following Nemo’s schedule, fleets increase their capacity by 150% and revenues by $5,000 per truck annually.

Nemo technology is fully modular and can be used across ICE, hybrid or fully electric fleets to optimize maintenance and operations. They prevent breakdowns, increase productivity, and color the world just a little bit greener.

name: newtrul
one_liner: Expedia-like search platform enabling freight carriers to find and book shipments instantly.
description:
Overview:
newtrul aggregates available shipment data from multiple sources (demand) to provide a centralized search experience for freight carriers (supply). Once a carrier finds its ideal shipment, through proprietary integrations and partnerships with most enterprise TMS', newtrul is able to provide an instant booking experience which leverages the existing workflows of many shippers and brokers.  

Value: 
1) Demand fragmentation for carriers (carriers are logging on to over 50 websites per day).
2) The high cost to procure a truck (the best brokers spend $70+ to find a truck).

name: Oloid
one_liner: Computer vision-based authentication and workplace safety platform for deskless industrial workers
description:
Oloid offers computer vision-based solutions for workplace safety and security. Oloid offers an authentication technology for the workplace. It is very easy to implement as it works as a downloaded app on standard iPad/tablets and integrates into existing systems such as time and attendance and access control. Oloid also offers temperature scanning of employees to detect elevated body temperature along with QR-code based wellness attestation questionnaires and forms. Used together, facial bio metrics, wellness attestations and thermal imaging are an effective way of identifying potential risk before an employee is in proximity with other workers.

Oloid's has enabled some of the largest manufacturers with return to work programs at their factories and warehouses. The resulting benefit is estimated to be in double-digit millions of dollars. Oloid is backed by Emergent Ventures, Unusual Ventures, and other marquee investors, and headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA.

name: Qaptis
one_liner: A carbon capture kit that can capture up to 90% of carbon emissions from trucks.
description: Truck & ship industry are together responsible for more than 10% of global CO2 emissions and are part of the hard-to-decarbonize sector. There is a strong pressure to bring rapid changes! However, the current solutions, like hydrogen and electric vehicles, are not ready to clean these sectors before decades. This is why Qaptis is committed to a greener tomorrow and their mission is to solve the climate change challenge in the transportation industry by capturing the emissions at their source. With their plug-in technology, their solution is able to capture up to 90% of the emitted CO2, store it in liquid form directly onboard and recycle it (fuel, plastics, building materials, CO2 sequestration).

name: Qualle
one_liner: Automates street turn requests for shipping containers to reduce empty miles
description:
Qualle was established in late 2019 and just launched their soft beta in 2021 with Maersk. Qualle is building out a street turn automation tool, targeted at truckers to request the reuse of containers with shipping lines. A street turn is when a carrier uses a container from one trip, and instead of bringing the empty container back to the rail, they use it for a pickup. The carrier makes money from both loads while running less miles. 

Qualle takes an outdated process of communicating with the Steamship Lines to effectively facilitate Street Turn requests, while empowering truckers to do more by connecting fragmented dots between all stakeholders within the ecosystem. Their software helps with container triangulation to match import containers with exporters demand. Right now navigating and booking street turns is a very manual process and can take hours finding, uploading and negotiating prices through email. With Qualle’s first product “V1” you can do it all on one dashboard within minutes. Qualle has two more products coming to market “V2” that helps with container triangulation through an empty container marketplace for truckers and “V3” that integrates with importers and exporters to help build out the entire street turn ecosystem.

name: Rafay Systems
one_liner: Provides a SaaS platform for automating lifecycle management of containerized applications and Kubernetes operations across cloud and edge environments.
description:
Rafay delivers a turnkey SaaS offering that automates lifecycle management for containerized applications. DevOps and site reliability engineering (SRE) teams face a steep learning curve and ongoing complexity when running containerized applications in Kubernetes clusters in cloud and on-premise environments. Rafay’s application abstraction, cluster blueprinting, multi-cluster operations and enterprise-ready integration capabilities collectively address the acute pain these teams face.

Consumed as a service, Rafay’s platform eliminates the need to build an in-house platform or developing any specialized compute distribution capabilities. The platform significantly simplifies the deployment of containerized apps in cloud and on-premise environments. Organizations can now achieve their desired levels of reliability, availability and performance with any combination of public cloud environments through a developer-friendly SaaS offering.
investors: Ridge Ventures (Formerly known as IDG Ventures USA)

name: Ship Angel
one_liner: AI-enabled rate management platform for global shippers and cargo owners.
description:
Ship Angel introduces a SaaS rate management tool for shippers to address the rise in container freight rate complexity. The increasing prevalence of macro events, such as Covid, geopolitical events and severe weather, have greatly amplified the frequency and intensity of market fluctuations in the global supply chain ecosystem, especially in the area of container freight rates. Today, managing shipping rates is a significant pain point for shippers as they work with short term contracts, are forced to dive into the spot market more often, face  greater surcharge variability and find large rate differentials on trade lane port pairs. Additionally, the Ship Angel rate management tool helps reduce ocean carrier invoice issues, another industry pain point.

Cloud-based, AI-powered Ship Angel rate management further distinguishes itself with a modern user interface (UI) and streamlined user experience (UX). Shippers access rate data that has been enriched with valuable insights, providing intelligent “best option” predictions for each shipment. Ship Angel will help shippers save time, reduce costs and increase revenue with easy implementation digital logistics solutions. The company’s first product is a revolutionary AI-first Rate Management Platform aimed at medium and large shippers.

name: Sinay
one_liner: Maritime data analytics platform for fisheries and marine environment monitoring
description: Sinay provides numerous solutions for maritime sector stakeholders, such as collecting and analysing maritime data.With 10 years experience in the marine environment, fisheries, underwater acoustics, and Big Data, SINAY offers tailored solutions to meet the needs of maritime professionals.

name: Taloflow
one_liner: AI-powered collaborative platform for enterprise technology vendor evaluation and selection
description:
Use Taloflow to replace Gartner and homegrown technology vendor selection processes that last months with collaborative tools, AI and experts insights

Taloflow is a collaborative and interactive notebook that helps product teams run faster vendor evaluations with data curated by the top experts in the world.

'Taloflow's buying insights allow us to find and compare products in verticals like cloud cost management and storage with technical rigor.' - David Wilson, CFO at NS1

Core benefits:

- Tailor insights to your specific use case: Within minutes, you'll have a matrix of vendor pros and cons, a shortlist of vendors, and an objective analysis as to who wins and why.
- Research faster with built-in vendor data: No more Excel sheets. No more 'gotchas'. Tap into 10s of thousands of vendor data points curated by top analysts with experience at Gartner.
- Collaborate and drive accountability: Asynchronously build consensus on requirements between leaders and contributors in product and engineering.
- Integrate into your procurement workflow: Seamlessly handoff and track the status of your technology evaluation as it moves through legal, compliance and finance review.

name: ThroughPut
one_liner: AI-powered supply chain optimization platform for predictive replenishment and industrial operations.
description: ThroughPut.ai is a Silicon Valley-based supply chain optimization & predictive replenishment company. The company’s software AI platform has the ability to identify location-, product-, and customer-based demand changes sooner in order to adjust order frequencies, vendor sources, and parts buffer levels at a global and local scale. ThroughPut’s platform was designed by Fortune 500 & technology executives with real-world experience managing demand & supply chain disruptions and war-zone logistics across the world.

name: Turbodega
one_liner: Digitizing the supply chain of small grocery stores in Latam
description: Turbodega is an order management system that connects digitally bodegas (independent small grocery stores) with distributors through WhatsApp. The traditional trade in Latam is fragmented and while it represents up to 80% of sales of multinational CPGs, where the supply chain is the largest source of inefficiencies in the channel. Distributors have sales reps. that visit face-to-face the stores once a week to take orders for inventory fulfillment, with Turbodega distributors now engage digitally with stores reducing the cost to serve and getting data insights to improve inventory management and the cost of logistics. Stores now receive recommendations to improve their purchases and optimize the number of products to order each week. The vision is to have the largest distribution network for the traditional trade without owning the assets.

name: USYNCRO
one_liner: Cloud platform that digitizes international trade by synchronizing shipment documentation, transactions, and logistics processes across supply chain stakeholders.
description:
Usyncro's value proposal is to simplify, digitize, and accelerate the logistic processes avoiding the double entry of data, eliminating the use of paper, prioritizing security ,traceability and transparency in the whole process, including the customs part, giving an integral service to our customers.

Usyncro allows to have all the documentation regarding international shipments in the same place only by having internet access, giving the possibility of sharing it in a simple and safe way with the different participants of the shipment, by sea, air, land and space.

Their target markets are importers, exporters, freight forwarders, carriers, insurance companies, banks, government institutions and any other party involved in the supply chain. 

Their platform is cloud-based and internationally scalable. We use, among others, Blockchain and AI technology, which provides total transparency, traceability, security, and automation in transactions.

name: Veho
one_liner: Crowdsourced last-mile delivery platform for e-commerce companies
description:
Veho is an end-to-end parcel delivery carrier for e-commerce companies. It is powered by next-generation technology and final mile crowdsourcing.

The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Boulder, Colorado.

name: Wilya (FKA Gig and Take)
one_liner: Wilya is a workforce scheduling platform that helps manufacturers build a flexible, cross-skilled labor pool to meet shifting production demands.
description:
Wilya has developed a workforce management software intended to reimagine the future of work in industrial manufacturing and logistics. The company aims to co-create the future of work with factories by enabling them to manage their own flexible, on-demand workforce, thereby breaking the century-old construct of rigid work schedules and unlock disproportionately diverse talent pools to work in a key sector of the economy.

Wilya enables two way real time communication between the factory supervisor and the worker, making it easy for factories to match their needs on-demand with flex worker availability . Current customers include Michelin, Carlisle Industries, Hanford Pharmaceuticals and Apex Tool Group all of who both jumped at the opportunity to unlock a new source of talent in this tight labor market.

Wilyua is reimagining the future of work in Industrial Manufacturing and Logistics. Wilya believes the future of work is on-demand and flexible - factories and warehouses are no longer an exception.

name: xNova International
one_liner: SaaS platform providing SMEs with market intelligence to find buyers and expand in international markets
description:
Currently, when an SME wants to expand to a foreign market, it does not have an effective way to find buyers, nor information about what its competitors are doing. xNova provides SMEs with information on all the buyers of their product in the target market and real time data of all their competitors' transactions.

We do this through an intuitive, user-friendly, and affordable tool that processes and analyzes international transactions.

This allows companies to find more buyers and increase their sales in the destination market, in addition to staying competitive against their rivals with information on what is happening in the market in real time.

name: YellowBird
one_liner: On-demand marketplace connecting insurance carriers and brokers with vetted EHS and risk management professionals
description: YellowBird is connecting experts in the field of risk, regulation, and EHS programs with businesses on-demand. Think 'Uber Model' but for highly skilled, vetted and insured and ready providers to the insurance industry. Our platform matches professionals based on their specific experience, certifications, industry expertise, location and more, with Carrier and Brokers with LC and project needs, both virtual and on-site. Our nationwide network of over 2500 professionals including workers, assessors, loss engineers, trainers, supervisors and more, ensuriung that we can match the right professional to the right job.

name: Zeew
one_liner: Latvian startup offering on-demand B2C and C2C delivery services via taxi networks, like Uber for packages
description: Zeew is Latvian startup that offers on-demand delivery to businesses, we're changing the way people think about shipping and delivery. Not that long ago we were just an app to request delivery. Now we're a part of the logistical fabric across Riga, wither it is a sandwich, or a package, we use technology to give people what they want, when they want it. We use taxi's on the road to deliver goods from businesses to clients (B2C) as well clients to clients (C2C)

name: Zuum Transportation
one_liner: Zuum provides shippers with on-demand truck drivers ready to pickup and deliver their freight.
description: Zuum provides shippers with on-demand truck drivers ready to pickup and deliver their freight. Zuum partners with other brokers and trucking companies on an automated platform to bring you ultimate efficiency. Zuum provides real time shipment locations at all times from pick up to delivery with instant location updates, reducing your operational cost.

name: Figure AI
one_liner: Figure Robotics is an AI robotics company that is building a multi-purpose humanoid form robot.
description: Figure is an AI robotics company that builds a multi-purpose humanoid form robot. The company has created a humanoid robot with the purpose of being introduced into the workforce to tackle problems such as labor shortages, and undesirable or unsafe jobs, and to assist in global supply chain operations. Figure 01 combines the agility of the human body with advanced AI technology to surpass the capabilities of robots designed for specific tasks. It provides assistance in various sectors including manufacturing, logistics, warehousing, and retail.
investors: Evolution VC Partners (formerly Evolution Corporate Advisors)

name: 1X
one_liner: 1X designs and develops humanoid robots to operate in the physical world.
description: 1X introduces EVE, a versatile humanoid robot equipped with advanced cameras and sensors for seamless interaction with surroundings. With mobility, dexterity, and balance, EVE navigates complex environments autonomously, excelling in tasks across industries like factory operations, logistics, and building surveillance. In partnership with trained human operators, fleets of EVEs ensure workplace safety by performing tasks such as opening doors and patrolling premises. Operating autonomously using AI, EVE adapts to diverse environments, providing support in tasks like office patrolling and ID badge checks. 1X offers comprehensive training and support, ensuring smooth integration of EVE into workplaces, from mapping spaces to utilizing telepresence for control, empowering businesses with enhanced workforce capabilities.

name: Humanoid
one_liner: Humanoid is the first AI and robotics company in the UK creating commercially scalable, and safe humanoid robots
description:
Humanoid’s mission is to create commercially scalable, safe, and advanced humanoid robots that seamlessly integrate into daily life and amplify human capacity. The company’s general-purpose humanoid robots are developed to be flexible and capable of adapting to complex environments. They will expand the market for industrial automation, including use cases in manufacturing, warehouses and logistics, among others. 	
By deploying Humanoid’s general-purpose humanoid robots in hazardous or monotonous environments the company envisions the future where human well-being is safeguarded while closing the gaps in critical global labour needs.

name: Mentee Robotics
one_liner: Mentee Robotics combines robotics, sensing, and artificial intelligence to create a humanoid robot.
description: Mentee Robotics combines robotics, sensing, and artificial intelligence to create a humanoid robot with human-like dexterity and perception that can be personalized and adjusted to various surroundings and tasks through natural human contact. It aims to improve productivity and daily operations in both households and warehouses.

name: Doozy Robotics
one_liner: AI-Powered Humanoid and Autonomous Robots for both Commercial & Industrial Applications.
description: Developer of social humanoid robots designed for industries to improve productivity. The company's platform provides artificial intelligence-powered human-like robots that can see, hear, sense, and interact and have no trouble in perceiving their environment and entering into a conversation when they see a person, enabling industries to automate their intra-logistics material movement without any infrastructure changes.

name: Pollen Robotics
one_liner: Pollen Robotics develops humanoid service robots specialized in the interaction and manipulation of objects.
description: Developer of robots intended to serve the healthcare, retail, and education industries. The company's robots specialize in humanoid services that are customizable and provide access to common connectivity through an advanced robotic arm for object manipulation by utilizing technology and antennas to convey emotions, enabling scientists, artists and innovators to explore usages and make the robotic revolution an available opportunity for everyone.
investors: EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs

name: Roomie-IT
one_liner: Humanoid Robotics and Artificial Intelligence Solutions.
description: Six years ago, Roomie was created with the objective of creating the first Mexican humanoid robot. We knew this was an ambitious vision that would take a lot of effort and resources. We knew we could have gone to Venture Capitals and pitched our idea to obtain funds for research and development, but we chose a path that could allow us to gain business understanding, technical expertise and the trust of our clients while we built a profitable company. In 2014 Roomie was born as a Data & A.I. Solutions company, two years later we managed to fund our own R&D lab and the process of building the first Mexican humanoid robot officially started. To date, we differentiated ourselves through the development of our own modular components, based on business understanding, therefore, we can create specific robots for our customers, so we are not tailor-made, yet, we are adaptable. Thus, we have built strong partnerships with Intel and AWS, gained strategic clients and sold over $2M USD in 2019.

name: Persona AI
one_liner: Persona is commercializing a multi-purpose humanoid to personify AI, enabling the next wave in robotics.
description: Operator of a robotics engineering company that specializes in commercializing a versatile humanoid robot that embodies artificial intelligence, allowing it to perform tasks traditionally requiring human-level coordination and mobility.

name: Pal Robotics
one_liner: PAL Robotics is a team of passionate engineers that design, craft and customize humanoid robots.
description: PAL Robotics is a worldwide leading company in biped humanoid robots based in Barcelona. Our mission is to develop service robots that enhance people’s quality of life. The team is composed of passionate engineers that design, craft and customize humanoid robots to help you to push your organisation to the next level. Founded in 2004 by four engineers, we have successfully built several robots for services and research, contributed to open-source projects and participated in several robotic competitions. PAL robotics works in 4 different areas: logistics, retail, social and research. Regarding the logistic area, the company offers mobile robots and software tools, which optimize your indoor deliveries smartly. PAL Robotics helps you automate intralogistics deliveries and increase productivity thanks to flexible technologies and solutions extremely easy to integrate and deploy. Retail robots enable top retailers to stay ahead in the market. Stock-taking robots ensure daily and exhaustive control of the stocks, whereas interactive humanoid service robots deliver a unique customer experience. StockBot robot does inventory tracking every day, and provides accurate stock information to smartly manage your store, such as a 3D map with the product’s location.

name: Clone
one_liner: Musculoskeletal, intelligent androids to solve all the common problems of daily life.
description: Developer of biomimetic and power-dense androids designed to advance the evolution of intelligent machines. The company's products include anthropomorphic hands, biomimetic skeletons, custom portable hydraulic powering supply, proportional force valves, and proprietary artificial muscles, helping robotics developers and researchers to replace humans with robots safely and easily.

name: Macco Robotics
one_liner: Macco Robotics specializes in developing creative and friendly humanoid robots for different sectors.
description:
Macco Robotics specializes in developing creative and friendly humanoid robots for different sectors such as leisure and entertainment, marketing, health, education, tourism and engineering household robots.

They work in two ways, developing own robots, and representing third marks, which will develop the necessary software to generate the final product sought. 
With headquarters in Seville, Macco Robotics has offices in Madrid, Barcelona, ​​London and Dubai.
Their mission is to bring people robotics in the day to day, getting robotics, makes us more human.

Selected by The Technology Headlines as one of the 10 technology companies to follow.
investors: EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs

name: Oversonic Robotics
one_liner: Oversonic provides cognitive computing systems for robots.
description: Oversonic Robotics is an Italian startup developing RoBee, an advanced humanoid cognitive robot designed to support industrial workers by autonomously navigating environments and performing complex mechanical tasks. Their innovative robotic solution aims to enhance operational efficiency across various manufacturing and industrial sectors.

name: Sics
one_liner: Developer of AGI for pick and place robotics and humanoid robotics.
description: SICS AI is an innovative Swedish software company at the forefront of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) development, founded by Karim Nouira. Its flagship product, Droid Brain One, is a hardware-agnostic digital brain designed for industrial automation, enabling robots to learn and adapt in a human-like manner.

name: Reflex Robotics
one_liner: We're building affordable general-purpose robots to free humanity from the drudgery of boring and repetitive tasks.
description: Developer of general-purpose robots designed to automate repetitive tasks. The company's robotic technology helps in beverage packing, warehouse palletizing, and picking totes from shelves, enabling industries to ease their day-to-day operations through robotic engineering.

name: Beyond Imagination
one_liner: Beyond Imagination leads the AI industry in developing autonomous general-purpose AI for physical work.
description:
With a team compiling over 150 years of combined experience in AI and robotics, we achieved a remarkable milestone by completing our first AI robotic prototype within a single year.

Our pioneering AI Brain technology, paired with the exceptional capabilities of our humanoid robot, is designed to address labor shortages across various sectors, including medicine, manufacturing, and agriculture.

By taking on tasks often considered undesirable or unsafe, our robots amplify workforce productivity while ensuring a globally secure and efficient supply chain. With Beyond Imagination as the epitome of a highly functional and rigorously tested Ai humanoid, we possess the potential to become a trillion-dollar company.

Beomni AI is a powerful AI brain that can power humanoid robots and other robotic systems and learns tasks just like the human brain. Our cutting-edge technology allows Beomni AI to transform physical labor by learning tasks over time, first mastering individual tasks and eventually learning entire professions.

Founded in 2018 by Dr. Harry Kloor and Ray Kurzweil, Beyond Imagination has pioneered the development of a multi-modal Omni-purpose AI Brain, Beomni AI

name: Exploration Robotics Technologies Inc.
one_liner: Xplorobot provides affordable, EPA-approved methane detection solutions for oil and gas operators to streamline emissions compliance.
description: Xplorobot offers a handheld, EPA-approved methane detection system that enables real-time leak detection, reporting, and mitigation for the oil and gas industry. Its sensor-to-cloud technology supports both aerial and handheld surveys, reducing labor costs and compliance time. The system’s AI-powered accuracy and digital recordkeeping provide regulatory confidence with minimal training required.

name: CARRIER1
one_liner: Carrier1 is an all-in-one operating system for trucking carriers that unifies dispatch, document management, invoicing, payments, and embedded financial services into a single workflow, automating the end-to-end load lifecycle from assignment to payment.
description: CARRIER1 offers a modern operating system for the trucking ecosystem, integrating tools like Vault for secure document and tender management, TMS for load planning and dispatch, and Driive, a driver app for real-time updates and document capture. By replacing fragmented processes with automation, CARRIER1 reduces manual work, accelerates payment cycles, and enhances visibility across freight movements.

name: Skild AI
one_liner: Any Robot. Any Task. One Brain
description: Skild AI develops a unified 'omni-bodied' brain for robots, enabling them to perform complex physical tasks like navigation, manipulation, and autonomous packing in unstructured environments. Their AI learns from human demonstration videos, offering a scalable solution to real-world robotics challenges.

name: Mosaic
one_liner: Mosaic unifies technology, people, and process to help distributors and manufacturers accelerate sales, optimize freight costs, and gain network-wide visibility.
description: Mosaic serves distributors and manufacturers with a unified platform combining technology, people, and process to optimize freight costs and gain supply chain visibility across North America.

name: Nexxa AI
one_liner: Nexxa AI builds specialized AI agents that augment industrial engineers in heavy project industries like railroads, energy, construction, and mining.
description: Nexxa AI's multi-agent platform integrates with existing engineering tools to automate technical documentation, project planning, and compliance workflows across capital-intensive industries.

name: Onyx
one_liner: Onyx Robotics is a Boston-based software platform that optimizes AI models from real hardware data to improve accuracy in simulation and robotic controls without requiring teams to manage AI/ML infrastructure.
description: Onyx Robotics builds software that closes the sim-to-real gap: it takes data from real hardware deployments, uses it to refine AI/ML models, and feeds the results back into simulation and control systems — eliminating the need for in-house AI/ML teams.

name: Upwell
one_liner: Upwell is an AI-powered accounts receivable automation platform built specifically for logistics companies to streamline billing, collections, and cash flow.
description: Upwell automates pre-invoice auditing, billing, collections, and cash flow management for logistics companies — replacing manual AR processes with AI-driven workflows that reduce DSO and increase revenue capture.

description: Everest AI provides an AI-powered driver recruiting platform tailored for trucking companies, automating the outreach, screening, and qualification of driver applicants in real time. description: The company specializes in addressing the tactical data bottleneck by providing innovative software and technology solutions. Its products are designed for users operating in high-demand environments requiring secure, efficient data handling. Blackwire emphasizes proprietary, mission-driven technology with a focus on operational effectiveness.

name: Tracer Validation
one_liner: Tracer Validation ensures supply chain integrity for critical industries by providing end-to-end authentication and verification of high-value components like semiconductors using digital fingerprinting technology.
description: Tracer Validation offers an innovative end-to-end solution that establishes an unbreakable chain of custody for critical components using proprietary digital fingerprinting technology. Its system provides complete visibility and verification across the supply chain, ensuring authenticity, security, and integrity for industries such as semiconductors, defense, aerospace, and pharmaceuticals. The solution is designed to be simple, affordable, and non-intrusive, offering physical proof of integrity rather than relying on documentation.

name: Protex AI
one_liner: Protex AI provides AI-powered proactive safety solutions for enterprise EHS teams across industries like manufacturing, logistics, and retail.
description: Protex AI uses advanced AI and computer vision to continuously monitor workplace environments through existing CCTV infrastructure, identifying unsafe behaviors and conditions in real time. The platform enables enterprise EHS teams to make data-driven, proactive safety decisions with customizable rules, predictive analytics, and integrated workflows. Its on-site data processing ensures privacy and security while delivering actionable insights across industrial and logistics environments.
